Peter – [**_here are three reasons why we urgently need your support of $5, $25, or any amount:_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75306768/444268134/753177839?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.00.00_B1_Three_30op&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjgyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTM3MmIzOS03MDljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sKr4zWPajkoDZOIp_wI2iC4dWLO_eFMgCuL0viumJj0=)
1. **I came up short by 1,600 votes last year, making MI-10 the third closest House race in the entire country.** MI-10 is a pure toss-up and national Republicans are going to flood this race with millions in outside spending because they know that they have to keep MI-10 red if they want to maintain the House majority.

2. **_The Cook Political Report_ is calling John James one of the most vulnerable Republicans up for re-election**. That’s why the GOP is swooping in to prop up John James in a desperate attempt to buy this seat.

3. **Our MAGA opponent John James has raised a whopping $2.4 million this year alone.** We’re being outraised and this is likely to be our most expensive race yet.

The bottom line: This race will be won (or lost) because of resources. Resources to get ads on the air, make thousands of phone calls, and knock doors in communities across the district. Resources we simply won't have if we fall behind our mid-quarter goal. [_**Peter, your support will decide whether we have the resources to win or not. MI-10 is a pure toss-up and national Republicans are going to flood this race with millions in outside spending because they know that they have to keep MI-10 red if they want to maintain the House majority. 2. The Cook Political Report is calling John James one of the most vulnerable Republicans up for re-election. That’s why the GOP is swooping in to prop up John James in a desperate attempt to buy this seat. 3. Our MAGA opponent John James has raised a whopping $2.4 million this year alone. We’re being outraised and this is likely to be our most expensive race yet. The bottom line: This race will be won (or lost) because of resources. Resources to get ads on the air, make thousands of phone calls, and knock doors in communities across the district. body:
Derek, did you see
Cassi's message about polls showing a deadlocked race in Wisconsin?

With Donald Trump promising to end fair elections and be a dictator on day
one, all of America is counting on us to win in Wisconsin. That's why this
is a critical moment.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2213?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231216_FR_mmfr_0_3MO_TonyEvers.com_NA_NA_mmfr.3.9&t=1001&akid=6531%2E1827488%2EA656d4 ]Please pitch in here before tomorrow's critical mid-month fundraising
deadline. We need to raise another $12,542 to close our budget gap so we
can fully fund the organizing infrastructure we need to put in place to
win in November and save American democracy.

Onward,

Team Evers

— Read Cassi's Message Below —

Derek,

As Tony's campaign manager, I've learned a
thing or two about what it takes to stand up to unlimited Republican money
and win razor-close elections in Wisconsin.

Polls show Wisconsin is deadlocked, and with abortion rights and the
future of fair elections on the ballot, we can't leave anything to chance.

That's why we need to start making critical investments right now. We
can't afford to wake up after the election and wonder what more we could
have done.

Hello, my name is Jesus Rivera. I’m a U.S. Marine combat veteran and a patriot.

On January 6, 2021, I recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. for a local news station back home in Florida.

I shot that video on my smart phone and a digital camera to provide for my wife and kids.

I didn’t attack police or even protest.

I just recorded what was happening, and peacefully entered the Capitol like many other patriots that day.

**But around 7:30 AM on January 20, 2021, between 12 to 20 heavily armed FBI agents raided my home with guns drawn. It was terrifying. They had no probable cause, and their search warrant was obtained through lies, even outright fraud.**

Let me tell you, I felt shocked and confused.

**And frankly, I was scared my family would get hurt!**

I was forcefully handcuffed, then moved to the FBI building.

My wife asked for the search warrant several times, but didn’t get it until after the FBI agents finished searching our home.

**As a U.S. Marine, I survived rocket attacks and exploding roadside bombs trying to bring freedom to the people of Iraq and Afghanistan. But then my freedom gets trampled on right here at home by FBI agents!**

Can you imagine being treated like this in America?

I sure couldn’t ... but then it got worse.

**Leftist District Judge Colleen Collar-Kottelly sentenced me to 8 MONTHS in federal prison!**

Between you and me, my wife and kids spent those brutal 8 months with knots tied in their stomachs. They lost sleep. Because they didn’t know if I’d get killed or badly beaten by the real criminals in that prison.

**Well, I’m free now – and I’m fighting back in court with a game-changing, class action lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means our criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And our criminal trials MUST STOP.**

My lawyer, Larry Klayman, filed this crucial lawsuit.

Larry is founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

He’s a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 41 years.

You’ve seen him on CNN, Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

**Larry took on Bill Clinton, and is the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President committed a crime.**

Larry knows what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.

**And with this critically important case, Larry can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

The shocking, un-American conduct alleged in my lawsuit can’t be allowed to go on.

**If the FBI can illegally arrest me, an innocent U.S. Marine ... and if the DOJ can throw me in prison unjustly for 8 months ... they can do it to you, our families,**

**our friends, and our fellow Americans.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

We simply can’t win this case without your urgent help. This lawsuit is very, very expensive.

**[Friend, PLEASE help me GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxkj8GumzAQRb9m2IHsMWBYsGiLUqmVuu-qMvYQHDExMSY0f_8Eit7mbc8czb3X8DL78dWB_g6Ik3crIIL6BoiPvzvH7ca_f-a_bv_zR_2Hq-OIPwAxvRb6NN9PCmLj54PqPnOdGp0oM-qkFqg1ylpmUzeYsRmVaOuhLFtUVrTUmFEZco0m41zmOxSoJEothCyFLsiNqkVSthmqqhICSnHmFIYpemvkmnYTYwhc2MDZ3E0pLetZ7AJ4GSORC7ybZKci0vNZ2HDiwPmN1m3No39SNDkPeWBQly3xvzVs0RKo_osGWB8Ck_Mbg-oDv4k1vBh_vYPqeXizRPFw9igBa8NhuydQPVZZ7Nyy-3n2a62hFNdzjw38EQAA__9UV362)**

Please give what you can right away!

Sincerely,

Jesus Rivera
Proud American and U.S. Marine combat veteran

**P.S. Friend, my NEW class action lawsuit PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means our criminal convictions will be THROWN OUT ... and that our criminal trials MUST STOP.**

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, Hello, my name is Jesus Rivera. I’m a U.S. Marine combat veteran and a patriot. On January 6, 2021, I recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. for a local news station back home in Florida. I shot that video on my smart phone and a digital camera to provide for my wife and kids. I didn’t attack police or even protest. I just recorded what was happening, and peacefully entered the Capitol like many other patriots that day. But around 7:30 AM on January 20, 2021, between 12 to 20 heavily armed FBI agents raided my home with guns drawn. It was terrifying. They had no probable cause, and their search warrant was obtained through lies, even outright fraud. Let me tell you, I felt shocked and confused. And frankly, I was scared my family would get hurt! I was forcefully handcuffed, then moved to the FBI building. My wife asked for the search warrant several times, but didn’t get it until after the FBI agents finished searching our home. As a U.S. Marine, I survived rocket attacks and exploding roadside bombs trying to bring freedom to the people of Iraq and Afghanistan. But then my freedom gets trampled on right here at home by FBI agents! Can you imagine being treated like this in America? I sure couldn’t ... but then it got worse. Leftist District Judge Colleen Collar-Kottelly sentenced me to 8 MONTHS in federal prison! Between you and me, my wife and kids spent those brutal 8 months with knots tied in their stomachs. They lost sleep. Because they didn’t know if I’d get killed or badly beaten by the real criminals in that prison. Well, I’m free now – and I’m fighting back in court with a game-changing, class action lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means our criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And our criminal trials MUST STOP. My lawyer, Larry Klayman, filed this crucial lawsuit. Larry is founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch. He’s a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 41 years. You’ve seen him on CNN, Fox News, and other cable news outlets. Larry took on Bill Clinton, and is the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President committed a crime. Larry knows what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win. And with this critically important case, Larry can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS! The shocking, un-American conduct alleged in my lawsuit can’t be allowed to go on. If the FBI can illegally arrest me, an innocent U.S. Marine ... and if the DOJ can throw me in prison unjustly for 8 months ... they can do it to you, our families, our friends, and our fellow Americans. That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time. We simply can’t win this case without your urgent help. This lawsuit is very, very expensive. Please give what you can right away! Sincerely, Jesus Rivera Proud American and U.S. Marine combat veteran P.S. Friend, my NEW class action lawsuit PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means our criminal convictions will be THROWN OUT ... and that our criminal trials MUST STOP.

subject: Elon: "Extremely concerning and obviously illegal."
body:
A brave whistleblower came forward and shared with us a disturbing video of the CEO of IBM demanding racial quotas be met in hiring for the giant tech company – or executives would lose bonuses or be fired.
[View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kD1v8jAUhX_NzUZkn2swDB54XxTaSkXqAEM349jEwoY0CW3TX19Badf78ZxHx-Y2xTAa0v8IaGLdE0C8JOAy8M5ut8_dODnm9WQ93eFwXeI_AcPY-r_LO6T02cZ0nepVURsFK4MrvJFaQGuWM1k0xoKVttIFZi_UtFYB8-AxhXZu5he2iAYCLCG1EAzW5V4KL-ZBuYWUgfcLUuIWVIbO-6GJp6PvahvTWLpzLpJphqHtb2IVoTrX-_J0cclf-p8vd86E6q5MqN4J1aZ7GR_yYfP5RFzdSuDVcv36uHpLX0Vn6vYjphT7mSYlDr-U7wAAAP__aJNfmQ)

[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxMj02PpCAQhn9NedNA4YoePOyusU977L5uEAolDWIQM_HfT-z0TOb6vE99vCps3tmzB_kHEBdndkAE8RsQjywe6n7_l87yGW7l7dcD5yvEv4CYz42-zfeSioJy_qJyKExfo-JWF9RzyVBKwRteLH3bKG2pqVXXTW2rjaJOtBNr6k5aYqwpXI8MBUcuGRMoZDVxRqy1te44t2LqoGavQ5VNRHlx65OSUc6flY6h8P2S87a_HhsBx530kahSK5mYLwNwjE8iS4GMU3OKxwY4ko9rGdfSTaEMUxkDiPHI4f8ej6QJxPBDAGyu6Jo_AoghfhGtwqbcvIIYwvRmmdLl2Gx4kXqzfTjv3d5IqNn8aqFj-AwAAP__l-N6oA)

[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxMj02PpCAQhn9NedNA4YoePOyusU977L5uEAolDWIQM_HfT-z0TOb6vE99vCps3tmzB_kHEBdndkAE8RsQjywe6n7_l87yGW7l7dcD5yvEv4CYz42-zfeSioJy_qJyKExfo-JWF9RzyVBKwRteLH3bKG2pqVXXTW2rjaJOtBNr6k5aYqwpXI8MBUcuGRMoZDVxRqy1te44t2LqoGavQ5VNRHlx65OSUc6flY6h8P2S87a_HhsBx530kahSK5mYLwNwjE8iS4GMU3OKxwY4ko9rGdfSTaEMUxkDiPHI4f8ej6QJxPBDAGyu6Jo_AoghfhGtwqbcvIIYwvRmmdLl2Gx4kXqzfTjv3d5IqNn8aqFj-AwAAP__l-N6oA) Friend,

A brave whistleblower came forward and shared with us a disturbing video of the CEO of IBM demanding racial quotas be met in hiring for the giant tech company - or executives would lose bonuses or be fired.

After we released the video, Elon Musk watched it and commented on X, "Extremely concerning and obviously illegal."

And he's right. In the opinion of our attorneys, IBM was violating Title VII of the Civil Rights Act of 1964 by using coercion to discriminate against white and Asian males in favor of meeting internal quotas based on gender and race.

Please help us expand today so we can keep exposing corruption and malfeasance.

Within hours of releasing our video on IBM, it was seen by 3.7 million people on X alone! That's a record because this topic hits home.

According to Glassdoor, one in six hiring managers has been told to stop hiring white men! Fifty-two percent of those executives consider it reverse discrimination, but let's be honest about it: it's flat-out discrimination that has become the norm in corporate America.

I grew up in this country, believing that if you work hard and educate yourself, you can get a job and provide for your family regardless of race, gender, or economic status.

| Hi friends,

We hope you're enjoying a wonderful weekend! As one of our most engaged grassroots supporters, we're excited to share some exclusive news with you!

**Jane's 86th birthday is fast approaching on December 21, and we've planned something truly special to celebrate her on this significant day.**

Our work is only made possible by sustained support from grassroots supporters like you and Jane's unwavering dedication and leadership, and we would love for you to join us in celebrating!

For this special occasion, the talented Shepard Fairey has created a unique illustration inspired by Jane's iconic 1970 mugshot photo. As one of our most engaged grassroots supporters, we're excited to share some exclusive news with you! Jane's 86th birthday is fast approaching on December 21, and we've planned something truly special to celebrate her on this significant day. Our work is only made possible by sustained support from grassroots supporters like you and Jane's unwavering dedication and leadership, and we would love for you to join us in celebrating! For this special occasion, the talented Shepard Fairey has created a unique illustration inspired by Jane's iconic 1970 mugshot photo. = = We're thrilled to share that this artwork will be featured on a select range of merchandise items! =. name: Adam Schiff
subject: I don’t always agree with Liz Cheney, but on this I do
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=4775%2E5257348%2EyrAcLL ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — my
former colleague Liz Cheney and I don’t always agree on policy. And
frankly, if you had told me while her father was vice president that we’d
be on the same side of any political issue, I probably wouldn’t have
believed you.

But after CBS News’ John Dickerson asked Liz what would happen if Mike
Johnson was the Speaker on January 6, 2025, Cheney replied, “He can’t be.”

I have to agree.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20231216_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=4775%2E5257348%2EyrAcLL ]Politico headline that reads: Liz Cheney would rather see Democrats win
in 2024. She warned of the 'threat' from within her own party.

Cheney is part of a lonely breed of Republicans.

Of the 10 Republicans who voted to impeach Trump for inciting the January
6 insurrection, only 2 remain in Congress. 147 voted to overturn the
results of the 2020 election.

Cheney has maintained the courage that virtually all of her fellow
Republicans lack — by speaking out against the existential threat to our
democracy that Donald Trump and the Republican House majority represent.

Republican primary voters in Wyoming rewarded her honesty last year by
replacing her with a QAnon conspiracy theorist in Congress, who told Steve
Bannon live on air that Joe Biden is “the most destructive human
trafficker in our history” and that my censure is the “least of what he
should be subjected to.”

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20231216_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=4775%2E5257348%2EyrAcLL ]That is the story of the Republican Party leadership all across this
country. There is no moderating influence left. It’s why I’ve worked so
hard to protect our democracy — with impeachment, on the January 6
Committee, and through this campaign. I’m asking for your help. Can you
chip in before our FEC deadline?

Conspiracy theories that were once confined to the deepest, darkest
corners of QAnon are now part of the mainstream Republican Party platform
and finding their way onto the House Floor. The architect of the GOP House
effort to overturn the 2020 election and Trump’s impeachment defense
counsel, Mike Johnson is now Speaker. Every conceivable alarm bell is
going off.

If anybody has any doubt that Trump would not incite another violent
assault on our Capitol, they should look at what he tried to do in the
last presidential election that he lost. And they should listen to what
Donald Trump says today. He is making it clear again that when he loses,
he will contest it. He will argue that it’s rigged and fraudulent. And he
will terminate the Constitution if he’s allowed to. He will be a dictator
on day one.

When a wannabe dictator shows you who they are, believe them.

I am doing everything I can to hold Trump to account. Many of his biggest
enablers serve in the United States Senate, and I’m running to stand up to
them too.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20231216_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=4775%2E5257348%2EyrAcLL ]Please chip in today before my FEC deadline to help me hold Trump and
his acolytes’ feet to the fire — the fate of our democracy depends on us
defeating Trump once and for all.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=dec2023_abs_em.8jAHEM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20231216_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1007&akid=4775%2E5257348%2EyrAcLL ]EXPRESS DONATE

name: Team Debbie
subject: Rick Scott's Navy hat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
this is what Rick Scott doesn't want you to know
| | |
---
Look, Rick Scott is a fraud.
He proudly wears his Navy baseball cap at every opportunity: photo ops, interviews, and even in his new attack ad. **But the truth is that Rick Scott made a FORTUNE while his company defrauded the health insurance provider for _millions_ of active duty service members, veterans, and their families.**
Rick Scott resigned from his role, pled the Fifth, walked away with zero consequences, and used the massive fortune he made to jumpstart his political career.
And that's just the tip of the iceberg. Rick Scott has made a political career out of lying to voters while getting richer and richer behind the scenes.
He _claims_ to support working families, but he wrote the plan to end Medicare and Social Security. He _claims_ to be a proud American, but he's undermined our democracy by pushing Donald Trump's Big Lie about the 2020 election. **He _claims_ to be a public servant, but he's shown us time and time again that, in reality, he only serves himself. **
**In 2024, we have the chance to defeat him: Democrat Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is fighting to flip this seat blue and a poll shows that this race is already a tie![But Rick Scott is ready to shell out millions to retake the lead, so Debbie needs grassroots donors like you to stand with her during this critical fundraising moment. name: Gabe Evans
subject: An American of Hispanic descent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ElectGabeEvans
body:
| | | Friend, I want to tell you a story about why I don't use the phrase "Hispanic American." You see, it's kind of a deal I made with my uncle. He told me all about how my grandfather, who immigrated from Mexico, earned our citizenship by fighting for America against the Nazis in World War II. My uncle explained to me that from that moment on, we were Americans first, and people of Hispanic descent later.
---
[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2a7a2b7eec994c84aaa88ac7a2b3105c&_e=vCAIfenXr1yutzb9VZeSo5JVuFyxHRX82GzxVq_lJJhxHYRZXPO2h1RPahtjU8gUMl9ypIdvQ3e3aIQ7hfzgorSaUnEUilci5blvCIQWuZUf8JM_AzgZ1v8dt2V1JkusBvE1VfG3TFqgvLyCoIXQfhN3euUPqXypSzR76qskL5g-yTKMarMXj6KC8A4C2-OuOK3IEuMAH4Cxe6kxr5YbrxSHfqc1gb5lMnznOuRa1ymDOECyMw69d9msWkhVBb3RZlsEHev0Zy2qQxKRJZMhI5eNYc2GQxNZBnBe7lXMGWkgHC1k3bpGijewMLRTVy10ztms7E0npmCy3OAtbzyWD7pdV3puEpnvFM77t1KpSdGzK1LPEHOBO7LpCGhBmfHpkl3xvQlpag4wcUdvhzaVgXyVyL9jMVTtDCtncUe18pP7wXvphST0gbNI0w4nyN60)
---
**That 's why I call myself a proud American of Hispanic descent.** You see, in America, it doesn't matter where you come from, what your skin color is, or what ethnicity you are. **The one thing that unites all of us, whether we were born here or legally immigrated here, is that we are Americans.**
---
[**SECURE OUR BORDER**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2a7a2b7eec994c84aaa88ac7a2b3105c&_e=vCAIfenXr1yutzb9VZeSo5JVuFyxHRX82GzxVq_lJJhxHYRZXPO2h1RPahtjU8gUMl9ypIdvQ3e3aIQ7hfzgorSaUnEUilci5blvCIQWuZUf8JM_AzgZ1v8dt2V1JkusBvE1VfG3TFqgvLyCoIXQfhN3euUPqXypSzR76qskL5g-yTKMarMXj6KC8A4C2-OuOK3IEuMAH4Cxe6kxr5YbrxSHfqc1gb5lMnznOuRa1ymDOECyMw69d9msWkhVBb3RZlsEHev0Zy2qQxKRJZMhIx34mkd2TyzfLHAGRK4dq9CcET_h_oyuZRT4JwzXN-I5JKUsOy__apB8upoi8JFhVcIuzYZJTsABltvCfnNJ1TWQVUau-Jq6QG2tjXUvw2R6qa7yVfKf2GM_DXiDwbtti8B2jpYKmkz8-M5C1XGz9cVsdxrqEKWhqiYXLnP8vIjB)
---
Now, criminals, traffickers, cartel members, even TERRORISTS are coming into our country through Joe Biden's open Southern Border. These cartels don't want to work to earn their citizenship like my grandfather did; they want to push fentanyl into our communities and commit acts of violence against the American People. **It 's a slap in the face to every legal immigrant who came here the right way.** I'm very proud of my Mexican heritage, but I'm even prouder to be an American because that honor was won with the blood, courage, and sacrifice of my family. My Grandfather earned his citizenship with two Purple Hearts. I followed in his footsteps and joined the Army to honor him and our nation. I'm running for Congress because it's time to SECURE our border, and I won't rest until America is safe again. **[Can you make a small contribution to my campaign today and help me restore American sovereignty?](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2a7a2b7eec994c84aaa88ac7a2b3105c&_e=vCAIfenXr1yutzb9VZeSo5JVuFyxHRX82GzxVq_lJJhxHYRZXPO2h1RPahtjU8gUMl9ypIdvQ3e3aIQ7hfzgorSaUnEUilci5blvCIQWuZUf8JM_AzgZ1v8dt2V1JkusBvE1VfG3TFqgvLyCoIXQfhN3euUPqXypSzR76qskL5g-yTKMarMXj6KC8A4C2-OuOK3IEuMAH4Cxe6kxr5YbrxSHfqc1gb5lMnznOuRa1ymDOECyMw69d9msWkhVBb3RZlsEHev0Zy2qQxKRJZMhI0Dq1p54uK7WFJfSHzkQPyDHCgMOMQ4zvddrqKw-VDNW3w_6sZnd8EvyTXBWisIwLxeT6-hODpW6UlmdTUo7JIaaLXv_P4KjvGlkb8cxd0xSrmlTwxL6bs7zYBlS6EgxQ6HgRN5QylnfRftWeBc1hIH37ngSh5ItPOMtwu3PbZnT)**
---
[**SECURE OUR BORDER**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2a7a2b7eec994c84aaa88ac7a2b3105c&_e=vCAIfenXr1yutzb9VZeSo5JVuFyxHRX82GzxVq_lJJhxHYRZXPO2h1RPahtjU8gUMl9ypIdvQ3e3aIQ7hfzgorSaUnEUilci5blvCIQWuZUf8JM_AzgZ1v8dt2V1JkusBvE1VfG3TFqgvLyCoIXQfhN3euUPqXypSzR76qskL5g-yTKMarMXj6KC8A4C2-OuOK3IEuMAH4Cxe6kxr5YbrxSHfqc1gb5lMnznOuRa1ymDOECyMw69d9msWkhVBb3RZlsEHev0Zy2qQxKRJZMhI4UqR_zvYrrIzuw0HcyFJ9wkWYdjhBdTqKCDrHAKJM4m2g5407Bn1Lbvi2K0sfiRV21SdsB9CvzX5-xlct_LNquu9uTKdFE7bdzSXO1p6I5EJ6scUU-LATf274KEBB2GE4bOS9yZzKUPhR5_xjjtyUqDaSGKtVy8iNqdTXI0IZ7K)

[**END THE BIDEN BORDER CRISIS**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2a7a2b7eec994c84aaa88ac7a2b3105c&_e=vCAIfenXr1yutzb9VZeSo5JVuFyxHRX82GzxVq_lJJhxHYRZXPO2h1RPahtjU8gUMl9ypIdvQ3e3aIQ7hfzgorSaUnEUilci5blvCIQWuZUf8JM_AzgZ1v8dt2V1JkusBvE1VfG3TFqgvLyCoIXQfhN3euUPqXypSzR76qskL5g-yTKMarMXj6KC8A4C2-OuOK3IEuMAH4Cxe6kxr5YbrxSHfqc1gb5lMnznOuRa1ymDOECyMw69d9msWkhVBb3RZlsEHev0Zy2qQxKRJZMhI1iV2Iu5SRpCzl_dbH-3YTywnCkTLFR730JcvfgJNmV-VKFr55bzucOotdl_j_5xECM69rx3siYqVArMvulWe-CyjBfUwz6XkfpWzs47NFhWcSD_F5OaZOmze-7Hh1BRdkHla0ecCNYMmjNXY3k6RWjOmRgBxF04pgoqWDuO5upu)

Gabe Evans

name: Josh Harder
subject: A personal note
body:
This will be quick.

Peter —
Josh here with a quick note. We are only $1,200 away from hitting our $5,000 fundraising goal before the midnight deadline, so I want to email you one last time.
With the stakes so high, it’s important we build up the resources we need to defend this seat. Outside attacks are already starting, so I’m asking for your help. We set a goal to raise $5,000 before tonight at midnight because it’s what we need in order to stay on track and win this race.
If you’re with me, can you send in a donation to our campaign to help us hit this goal? You can use this personalized link:

Thank you so much for your support,
Josh

The sitting president – who is on track to lose in a LANDSLIDE – is turning to the courts to subvert the will of voters and remain in power for 4 more years.

**You have my solemn word: I will fight this tyrannical abuse of power with every fiber of my being.**

_...The very survival of our Free Republic depends on it._

But I will humbly admit that I cannot win this fight all on my own.
---
_That is why I’m asking you, Patriot, at this historic moment, to become a Founding Member of**THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST** to peacefully defend our movement from the endless witch hunts._

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: I have a secret
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

You may have seen some news headlines like the ones I’ve stumbled across recently. Headlines like . . .

**“Why Biden’s Weakness Among Young Voters Should Be Taken Seriously” _– New York Times_**
**“Biden Loses Ground With Young Voters, Prompting Dem Concerns” _– The Hill_**
**“Young Voters Are Getting Less Likely to Identify as Dems. It Spells Trouble for Biden” _– Politico_**
Pro-Life Friend, I couldn’t help but laugh when I read those.

_After all, these are the very SAME reporters and the SAME pollsters who’ve been telling everyone for months 2024 has already been decided because young voters are so pro-abortion!_

So, I have a secret to tell you . . .

There’s a big reason why Vice President Kamala Harris has been crisscrossing college campuses in Battleground States in recent weeks, trying to mobilize young voters on abortion.

**_It’s because President Biden is FREAKING OUT_!**

Well, Pro-Life Friend, I’m ready to put the President in hysterics. __Will you help me_?_

**[Will you agree to your most generous contribution of $500, $250, $100, $50, or $25 to help _Students for Life Action_ BEAT the Abortion Lobby with young voters in 2024](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-siyekd-duchtdja-y/)?**

We CAN do it.

If 2024 is as close as expected, moving the youth vote numbers even by as much as 10% in Battleground States could result in a blowout for pro-lifers.

As National Public Radio’s Domenico Montanaro put it, “Just 44,000 votes in Georgia, Arizona and Wisconsin separated Biden and Trump from a tie in the Electoral College.”

The great news, as we’ve seen from our campus tours, we can convert anywhere between 10%-19% of the pro-abortion/on-the-fence young people we talk to.

**Through our digital targeting, we’ve found we can convert roughly the same numbers of young people – many times at just a few dollars per conversion!**

But even besides our work converting young people with digital ads, our campus tours, my speaking tours, and our 1,400+ campus groups, _turnout is also going to be huge_.

In 2022, roughly 70% of young voters didn’t vote . . .

Despite the fact that young Christian voters are overwhelmingly pro-life and agree voting is important, turnout among young Christians wasn’t much better.

_Students for Life Action_ is working to build turnout MACHINES on Christian college campuses in Battleground States and major colleges with sizeable Christian populations.

But that means recruiting campus captains NOW to _build student networks_ , _register young Christians and other pro-lifers to vote_ , and then _insist they pledge to VOTE PRO-LIFE FIRST in 2024_!

Pro-Life Friend, I know I’ve talked to you so much about all of the state legislative battles _Students for Life Action_ is fighting right now in states like Nebraska, South Carolina, and New Hampshire.

We’ve had some BIG wins across several states in recent years . . .

But President Biden and his pals want to wipe them all off the books if he wins reelection, forcing abortion until birth on every state in the country.

That’s why _Students for Life Action_ is ready to hit the ground running with these programs _(and others)_ in January.

**[But I’m counting on your generous contribution of $500, $250, $100, $50, or $25 to help _Students for Life Action_ to do it all](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-siyekd-duchtdja-j/).**

The great news is, as you saw from all of the news headlines I sent you, our efforts are working!

President Biden and his pals don’t understand it.

They KNOW abortion is going to be one of the most dominant political issues in 2024.

And they KNOW young voters, aged 18-34 are the biggest chunk of the electorate at 31%, and could decide it all . . .

And they don’t understand why they’re hemorrhaging young voters.

I’m not going to tell them our little secret, Pro-Life Friend.

The reason is you and me . . .

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, Students for Life Action

P.S. – With everything on the line in the New Year, I’d really appreciate it if you’d consider signing up as a _Students for Life Action_ monthly contributor – at least through November 2024.

You can sign up by **[clicking here](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-siyekd-duchtdja-i/).**

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

[update preferences](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.updatemyprofile.com/j-siyekd-026154D2-duchtdja-d) | [unsubscribe](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-u-siyekd-duchtdja-h/)
**

**
---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo4tqhq7uqcv4s0bouel325pnmdq5e0jlq8f50e8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3g6eoj2cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0uai6gepilpdvtskrbp42h686bqq9nrn0gbl3lg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3g6eoj2cjh2bs)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z29drn55jlq08lbekp982u8h7q9dfl7o8k9et1m8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3g6eoj2cjh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhd603ufmvo4gp4qhv7q8u4mhr6u2m2tahj2uh30_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3g6eoj2cjh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Trump Train News

name: John Kennedy
subject: Enjoy it while it lasts…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Can you imagine what would be in store if they won again next year?

| |

---
| | | As I always do, let me give it to you straight:

The Democrats JUST squeaked ahead in the polls and activated their army of Liberal megadonors to grow their lead even further. _**[Unfortunately, I'm left with no other choice than to ask you for a small contribution before we lose everything.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8d6cm09ql05gptv3lcbm0s1mrtu20qhu04cqpeg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i60o74c3h2bs "Unfortunately, I’m left with no other choice than to ask you for a small contribution before we lose everything.")**_

Look,

The Democrats are working from dawn 'til dusk to force-feed Liberal propaganda in our classrooms, trash the reputations of Conservative Supreme Court justices, re-up mask mandates, leave the border wide open, and woke-ify our military - that's enough to drive folks like you and me up a wall...

**But their Limousine Liberal buddies eat it up. And the huge checks roll in one after another. **

They'd love nothing more than to see the downfall of our House Majority. They know Conservatives would be powerless to stop them if they take full control of Congress.

_I know Mike Johnson reached out...
I know Steve Scalise reached out...
I know Kellyanne Conway reached out...
I know Newt Gingrich reached out...
I know Byron Donalds reached out...
And I know James Comer reached out..._

But now I'm reaching out ONE LAST TIME because the latest reports show the Radical Democrats with a devastating $8 million lead on us.

_**[If we don't get it together, the Democrats will be sitting pretty with complete control of the House, Senate, and White House before we know it. That's why I'm asking you to dig deep and kick in just a few bucks to save our House Majority and take back this country of ours.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8p9fmbv9f5vignspbqhfs2irglfvs8str7u6he0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i60o74c3h2bs "If we don’t get it together, the Democrats will be sitting pretty with complete control of the House, Senate, and White House before we know it. That’s why I’m asking you to dig deep and kick in just a few bucks to save our House Majority and take back this country of ours.")**_
---
| | | [KICK IN TEN BUCKS](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuku1nge5b1sbevrhjipth7t4hsp1asg2iund4c0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i60o74c3h2bs "KICK IN TEN BUCKS")
---
| | | [KICK IN TWENTY BUCKS](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7vvbfc0esrv98rvpu6mk4r2ls02oc30hdkeoc28_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i60o74c3h2bs "KICK IN TWENTY BUCKS")
---
| | | [KICK IN ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfm7q20vf3th5q53p4ng4vgjt664cme4efsbbim0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i60o74c3h2bs "KICK IN ANOTHER AMOUNT")
---
Let me put it plainly:

**WITH YOUR HELP:** We have a direct path to sweeping the next elections.

**WITHOUT YOUR HELP:** We might as well enjoy our House Majority while it lasts... because the Democrats will crush us in no time.

_**[So can we count on you? This is really, REALLY important.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcieldo8n11ensfhk0aupodb049gk6pvqcu0prc8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i60o74c3h2bs "So can we count on you? This is really, REALLY important. ")**_

- Senator John Kennedy

---

---

---
| |
* * *
---

---

It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise.

I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk7hofsk3hoo7v8cpn1f5jj0dk474aeilrn7tt78_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i60o74c3h2bs "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")**_ at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

name: Your America
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37990%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fTXU0r0kWDUJ4UDMxT8NhQ&sysid=1) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. And it isn't another virus.

Listen up... Teddy Daniels is not only a man that I trust - he's a man I have tremendous admiration for.

And Mr. Daniels has just released an [EMERGENCY DOCUMENTARY](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4ui632tjaved5vktn2b0klpme07v7pk7vpacmmo_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i60p70c9h2bs) that not only proves America is on the cusp of the greatest food shortage in recorded history...

But reveals rock solid evidence that this "Final Famine" could start on Friday.

Plus, in Mr. Daniels' shocking documentary, you'll also discover:
*Why Every Patriot MUST HAVE 3 Feet of Copper Wire In Their Home, To Be Properly Prepared For This "Final Famine"
*How An Accused Spy In Our Government (Codenamed: "The Red Dragon") Has Paved The Way For This Food Shortage. Plus Her Secret Identity Exposed!
*What President Trump whispered to Teddy in their secret meeting - and why it means that Stockpiling Food Won't Save You or Your Family...

Watch Teddy Daniels' EXPLOSIVE documentary right now - because folks, this is NOT a drill.
As you might know, I consider myself to be a man who can survive almost anything.

But the deadly evidence Mr. Daniels presents, and the incredibly unique nature of this threat... even has ME afraid.

Afraid for my family. Afraid for my friends. And afraid for YOU.

More urgently, when you [watch Teddy's EMERGENCY documentary right now](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgobu0rp6mc3hu91vhhaqct1lj2iaq4gmorr2c5o_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i60p70c9h2bs) - you'll immediately realize that his report will be deleted by the powers that be as soon as they become aware of it.

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Help me train the next generation of leaders…
body:
Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp9ldinea2fq9gh6b8q5iigtfi6d8los7pj4rf50_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i60p74chh2bs)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z975ralee8er9l9b435c7u1k42224hv9cs6jopeo_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i60p74chh2bs)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo3g41jjqkvflfmktv0gjd8vm4jdi37ghs75dh70_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i60p74chh2bs)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr80fr098am34u2n9beh37k5arorolv47i48gkp0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i60p74chh2bs)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

ICYMI News
---

Friend,

You may not know this, but grassroots supporters like you play a **KEY** role in the outcome of my presidential race.

Thanks to the thousands of supporters who have already stepped up, we're rising in the polls, building strong momentum, and gaining the confidence of voters across America.

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0irujmfldqjs82o783avasv489q45ehph5sv0u8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i60o72c3h2bs)
---

But, we can't stop there. _It's going to take all hands on deck to win on Election Day,**DEFEAT** the Democrats, and **RESTORE** a strong and proud America. _

**[That's why I wanted to ask, would you be willing to spare just $3 or more to help me fund my campaign and save our great nation?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6laj6umcgsnfe6helkv30r57m1rkk69aarg2acg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i60o72c3h2bs "That’s why I wanted to ask, would you be willing to spare just $3 or more to help me fund my campaign and save our great nation?")**

---
| | [CHIP IN $3](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z36bthkuaag3s4l4kks7ljcip9tnvj8bcetqhufg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i60o72c3h2bs)
---

Under Biden's leadership, Americans are facing tough times. Families are struggling to cover the costs of groceries and pay their utilities bills. So if you don't have $3 to spare, I understand. **[But I want you to know that if you can chip in, even just $3 makes a huge difference.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkj8ftk9n1jf4mdb7mhgdv251ftgt6bc2u70i4q8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i60o72c3h2bs "But I want you to know that if you can chip in, even just $3 makes a huge difference.")**

It may not seem like a lot, but every dollar adds up and makes an important impact.

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z13qui9jj8csgva9339a8up90e4a8i80orejqvco_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i60o72c3h2bs)
---

_I look forward to hearing from you and having your support._

My very best,
---

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5m306m4dhccme3f9venctp1se6i4rlu00qmn77g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i60o72c3h2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpabhg5r98re1v8s1l3p37nqdn4bbqeb6gj3ofvg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i60o72c3h2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

name: Brent Bozell
subject: The media wants to destroy the family
body:
Here is why the left-wing media’s agenda is evil:

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687050%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nWGocnGKYe3jgZvmiLWomg&sysid=1)

Friend,

The leftwing media’s agenda for the United States isn’t just wrong, socialist, woke, or a bad idea... It’s evil.

Allow me to explain.

But before I do, I MUST tell you about the Media Research Center’s (MRC) URGENT fundraising goal of raising $65,000 to defeat left-wing radicals at CNN, MSNBC, and The New York Times. I am counting on your help to reach this goal in the next 72 hours. [Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $500 or ANY amount >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687051%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=brWl9bUBtjN7wQiT04qfHQ&sysid=1)

Here is why the left-wing media’s agenda is evil:

Yes, the Fake News machine wants to establish a socialist country, rig elections for their favorite candidates, conceal facts or embarrassing stories about their friends, and make lots of money off of deceiving the American people... but you’d be surprised about one of their ultimate motives.

**Destroying the family unit.**

I’ll explain how they intend to do this shortly.

Since I founded the Media Research Center in 1987, I have gone to war with the left-wing media and done everything in my power to destroy their reputation and expose them to the public. I am happy to report that MRC is winning this battle, and polling shows Americans distrust the media more every day!

How did we accomplish this?

The Media Research Center has built a database of 900,000+ hours of video dating back to 1987. It empowers MRC to expose inconsistencies, lies, and outright propaganda from the networks. We’ve also created a system to capture when Big Tech engages in censorship.

We distribute this message to MILLIONS of Americans each week via our social media network, email list, and alternative media strategy.

Our work has led to CNN staffers being FIRED from their jobs, big-name anchors (such as Don Lemon, Brian Stelter, and Brian Williams) removed from the airwaves, and exposed the Hunter Biden laptop story to millions of Americans.

You can support our work by helping us reach our $65,000 goal by using one of these links to donate:

[Donate $10 Here >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687052%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6oaNyj8OXOuwZplafRmcNQ&sysid=1)
[Donate $35 Here >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687053%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Oh1IPwbWMt4%2bAyXFiYA8jQ&sysid=1)
[Donate $50 Here >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687054%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=553d%2fXTk4LcKWogIqIQ9mg&sysid=1)
[Donate $100 Here >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687065%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Jzr5b0XeTUU6225vibq8hw&sysid=1)
[Donate $250 Here >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687066%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fVOKoPf%2bm0x56fgc5CCfwg&sysid=1)
[Donate $500 Here >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687067%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xiKV7Ehdc5uIA2pBfm2kQQ&sysid=1)
[Donate $1,000 Here >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687068%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iHdIz1IrkHU%2bTKgqyv9ZTQ&sysid=1)
[Donate Any Amount Here >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687069%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xC%2fSW3CIUqQROwiLyrXtVw&sysid=1)

_**Alright, now allow me to explain why the media wishes to destroy the family unit:**_

The nuclear family is the bedrock of the United States.

Our Founding Fathers knew this.

You and I know this.

Families promote common sense traditional values, bring people closer to God, keep kids in school, provide economic and social stability, and so much more.

Which is why the leftwing media absolutely despises this institution.

**The left-wing media and Big Tech have created an unholy alliance hellbent on capturing the hearts and minds of young people with a twisted message of Woke propaganda that is DESIGNED to separate children from their families, create distrust between men and women, and eliminate cultural norms holding society together.**

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: An opportunity to save our nation
body:
Unfortunately, a conservative victory in the next election is not enough to save our country.

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687942%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5IhQFPhsAXQSLMdV53tA1Q&sysid=1)
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,

The next presidential administration could be a turning point for our country.

After years of inflation, open borders, reckless spending, and rampant crime, America desperately needs effective governance grounded in our founding principles.

Unfortunately, a conservative victory in the next election is not enough to save our country.

That’s because today, the deep state controls D.C.

**Regardless of who is in office, career bureaucrats in our federal agencies like the Justice Department, Environmental Protection Agency, and the State Department independently push their own leftist agendas.

**In order to implement common-sense, conservative policies, we must have a plan to rein in these agencies and replace these leftist bureaucrats with principled conservatives.

The Heritage Foundation has that plan--called Project 2025.

**Through Project 2025, The Heritage Foundation has united 80 conservative organizations and is leading the charge for the next presidential transition plan.**

Heritage’s policy scholars created a comprehensive policy book and a plan to implement it starting day one of the next administration.

These policies include securing our borders, ensuring election integrity, and reversing the growth of regulations, spending, and inflation.

Additionally, we’re identifying and training qualified patriots to staff the next administration and replace the leftist bureaucrats - ending their control of the deep state.

**The radical leftist mainstream media has published several panicked articles attacking Heritage and Project 2025.**

But as we like to say, if the leftist media is angry at you, you’re over the target.

As 2024 rapidly approaches, we’re kicking Project 2025 into high gear.

Will you help us make this much needed program a massive success? Will you support Project 2025 with a special gift today?
**
****If you’re ready to ensure the next presidential administration can enact conservative policies you and I believe in, please make a tax-deductible year-end gift to The Heritage Foundation using the secure link below.

[https://secured.heritage.org/eoy-campaign/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687943%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gR6tU0%2fbQlicMWA9587URg&sysid=1)**

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. Next year is a critical year and here at The Heritage Foundation, we’re ramping up our Project 2025 efforts to save America. Please make a tax-deductible contribution today to help us defeat the leftist deep state and create major conservative victories for America using this secure link below: [https://secured.heritage.org/eoy-campaign/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687943%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gR6tU0%2fbQlicMWA9587URg&sysid=1)

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo1cv93ioiaq5rda5ql6fvre46utbqvuj9i56gvo_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i62ob1cjh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z899cp41ttcgkljnonq412e3pgh0kajuf7tbq2p0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i62ob1cjh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zk06fgcglgd6dssgjq055tiqgcu1q6mk77cjhph0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i62ob1cjh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvgh4fr515ff0536s8kcics8t93roi1klkjh22i0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i62ob1cjh2bs)

name: ICYMI News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3pgu25u0oalnfvc2r9b3tl3oe51sfs0f2eb2igo_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i62ob6cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zefagd2ohv9bflkarup25su5i5bnfhej9ikdmhjg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i62ob6cjh2bs)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd9cvv66nsv30msbdb2q81hcippdtpt3k1nnl2kg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i62ob6cjh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdeokah1bqnphehb0jk6cc0eul2tc3soogoic258_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i62ob6cjh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

ICYMI News
---

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Join Me in Standing Up for Women’s Sports and American Values
body:
Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znj8a7irrc6n8vn1eq1akhp135p6k9i7j1gqqmm8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i62ob6cjh2bs)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0v98ih3c4j0ggpak6k02qapvkvmaf9ie9kv6u1g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i62ob6cjh2bs)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu8pdj42e2u7vep0q1nq8oiquklapq7k4a2gvps8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i62ob6cjh2bs)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zieu86eknb4q3joj483g1ptvet793mv6qeu34c4o_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i62ob6cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

GOP Presidential
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z37b8qg1n9t5816bkjmontoo2denfv9su0ul3e2g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i62ob6cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshh68pr3cli649fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0tipk0ibj68d1uol9il71o6hn652tljkvvdvcrg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i62ob6cjh2bs)_

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z27tpp0gkepdp20qjcv8chk7obkasor3s086l980_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr0c9ge8ob1cpie49fg)

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Three?
body:
You may not know this, but grassroots supporters like you play a KEY role in the outcome of my presidential race.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrmn5qre1vjrpb5u95hr3iidgl717p581vsut47g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i62ob1cjh2bs)
---

Friend,

You may not know this, but grassroots supporters like you play a **KEY** role in the outcome of my presidential race.

Thanks to the thousands of supporters who have already stepped up, we're rising in the polls, building strong momentum, and gaining the confidence of voters across America.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp870n04oerdnv4coisu2629k6t3bou35l336fv0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i62ob1cjh2bs)
---

But, we can't stop there. _It's going to take all hands on deck to win on Election Day,**DEFEAT** the Democrats, and **RESTORE** a strong and proud America. _

**[That's why I wanted to ask, would you be willing to spare just $3 or more to help me fund my campaign and save our great nation?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znqnl35debn7j5hjfurnioagadd5q3mq1kmh9p8g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i62ob1cjh2bs "That’s why I wanted to ask, would you be willing to spare just $3 or more to help me fund my campaign and save our great nation?")**

---
| | [CHIP IN $3](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za8q4pmc1r4fqc1jr075hevgbs73ellqo1rk6vk0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i62ob1cjh2bs)
---

Under Biden's leadership, Americans are facing tough times. Families are struggling to cover the costs of groceries and pay their utilities bills. So if you don't have $3 to spare, I understand. **[But I want you to know that if you can chip in, even just $3 makes a huge difference.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkbqcbh5hsb0gk0nbbi2ju5f8hvcok715h1c4qvg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i62ob1cjh2bs "But I want you to know that if you can chip in, even just $3 makes a huge difference.")**

It may not seem like a lot, but every dollar adds up and makes an important impact.

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh6ku0qk96i34s0q1lpev1m78vapk3nukkt0pts8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i62ob1cjh2bs)
---

_I look forward to hearing from you and having your support._

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8ut8rut9ie8ona0omvl7k51ie5ruoq5hedvtp50_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i62ob1cjh2bs)
---
Nikki Haley

---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr2re1jnhihnj7r07thaj29v11jgflpvchh7ljoo_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i62ob1cjh2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zerc3uetd733vd22uc9knsue18lplq0nrn7km2dg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i62ob1cjh2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqcs2nhnlhl81ebe13nklajd2ob699tg29rlgumg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i62ob1cjh2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlj8he909vmq7g83spop7qrt9s4qk70t0oddtut0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i62ob1cjh2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---

name: American Action News
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z81j72rou9lmotbr538ad7vfnlrml9d144ag4qoo_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i61o31clh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zte19psr298tp227caedp9taciiifdcluk8jilgo_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i61o31clh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za4bi40j90dlcjcmf9g8uedcj5u78kjs2051b5t0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i61o31clh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcket104cjpfis8kbm08gcvsod3ggndqnngbc20g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3i61o31clh2bs)
---
