body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoh8eg6j4049i0iv7rd4l3g5adlpr53ss0dpt79o_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3h68or2cph2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfdope7o407cs8mp1cf0k7i7b644o4ogsjeu8ep8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3h68or2cph2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo28a7piqhf75f3mcss1pcj0d7n0joekji5ic948_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3h68or2cph2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zct9f66f62ql9ingvd674l55619kc4cnpfv6q0k0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3h68or2cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp32chjm6pr2c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq3s2vc1paklln5o1cc5fpm7rdge3t8st3g1vg78_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3h68or2cph2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqds3dld83e6onnn58hcvivrggr5mjksio6d00l0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c3h68or2cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

I go to great lengths to maintain the ability to go out and run 3 to 4 miles as many times as I can because it is my mental health therapy! I’ve found that I can solve most of my problems in the course of a good run. Even the things I can’t solve don’t seem as bad after a sweaty four to five miles. My ideal run is a half marathon. I wake up knowing that I get to spend the next two or so hours running by myself, listening to some good music, enjoying the camaraderie of other runners, and celebrating being healthy enough to accomplish that distance. Once the adrenaline starts flowing, and I get in the groove, it goes by fast and I’m happy as a clam to be out there. Whether it’s running on the trail or running for Congress in the most competitive race in the entire nation, I always give it all I have…. So no matter what lies and attacks the Democrats throw at me in an attempt to capture this House seat, I’m going to put up a fight and never back down. But I can’t do it alone. I need help to make sure we run the strongest race possible. Here are three things you can do right now to help make sure Republicans keep control of the House: 1. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=8104c432154462979aebf89d112b86ea4c08849bab0308495cf9779d0dad3733092837c7bad78a132342f26f61b13b96cf346a655a6fd3242271daf3ff16de49 Make a donation to my campaign .Whether it’s just $5 or $500, anything you can contribute today will help us get our message out and combat the lies from the Democrats. 2. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=8104c4321544629747ba727e5ded9f4c4c53ff2eba9e1f9cae38180e1ba7d9008fc0808670eec00b699cd68447c6a298982d5ff028a4d89199e688987b10017d Sign up to volunteer .Whether it is making phone calls, putting up a sign, or knocking on doors, I hope you will join our grassroots team. 3. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=8104c43215446297a81bcb313bc4c8550d620dd0e508be9ec033c7ddf5cae70c44555a490df295994de92490dc715f64bd96732beaa2d7333de8876d148fa21c Follow me on Facebook and SHARE our content. It may seem like a small thing, but it’s incredibly helpful to help us get the truth out!If you can tackle those three quick tasks right now, it will go a LONG way in helping make sure we WIN the race and keep the House in Republican hands. Hope to see you soon on the trail…or out on a run! Thanks for your help, https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=8104c432154462979aebf89d112b86ea4c08849bab0308495cf9779d0dad3733092837c7bad78a132342f26f61b13b96cf346a655a6fd3242271daf3ff16de49 Jen Kiggans https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=8104c43215446297ddc620de37b43048bdbf00436da84957ad1f8c04a9743c4465d4cf4138e9dc56ce85b23fd57edc94538540dd10a20a68eecf91fbe6119327 JEN KIGGANS is running for Congress in the most competitive House race in the entire country, and she needs our urgent support. choosing the wrong one could wreak havoc on your retirement.

|
# 7 Mistakes People Make When Hiring a Financial Advisor
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/FCiBMK0EvWYRX2bWJuORBg~~/AARclAA~-ZfaYrK5SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "Take Retirement Quiz")

---
| | | [ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/S9aAkArE1UaWyT2rEmZdkQ~~/AARclAA~-ZfaYrK5SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

| _Life should be a balance of adventure and relaxation - not finances._ Enter: Working with a financial advisor. But [choosing the wrong one](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/S9aAkArE1UaWyT2rEmZdkQ~~/AARclAA~-ZfaYrK5SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) could wreak havoc on your retirement.

According to a 2022 Northwestern Mutual study, over 60% of US adults think their financial planning skills need improvement — and yet, only 36% of them work with a financial advisor.1

_Why?_ With thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. Plus, it can determine your financial trajectory for years to come. But some things are better left to the professionals. While advisors are prohibited from promising returns, research suggests that people work with a financial advisor:
* Feel more at ease about their finances, and
* Could end up with 15% more money to spend in retirement.2

_So, how does that play out over time? _
Let’s pretend we have $500,000 to invest — a good chunk of change. According to a 2019 Vanguard study, here’s what that investment would be worth after 25 years:
* $1.69 million with self-management alone
* $3.4 million with a financial advisor _(read: 2x more)_

In other words, an advisor-managed portfolio would average 8% annualized growth over a 25-year period, compared to just 5% from a self-managed portfolio.3

_Okay... but how do I find one?_
SmartAsset’s [no-cost tool](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/FCiBMK0EvWYRX2bWJuORBg~~/AARclAA~-ZfaYrK5SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) simplifies the time consuming process of finding an advisor. A short questionnaire matches you with up to three vetted financial advisors serving your area, each legally bound to work in your best interest. In many cases, you can be connected instantly to compare and decide on the best fit for you.

Ready to know what to look out for? Check out SmartAsset’s list of [seven mistakes to avoid when choosing an advisor ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/S9aAkArE1UaWyT2rEmZdkQ~~/AARclAA~-ZfaYrK5SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)so you can work towards a more comfortable retirement.

[See all 7 mistakes >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/S9aAkArE1UaWyT2rEmZdkQ~~/AARclAA~-ZfaYrK5SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---
|
---

Please see the methodologies employed in the Vanguard whitepaper. To receive a copy of the whitepaper, please contact compliance@smartasset.com.

| This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. body:
Can you imagine what would be in store if they won again next year?
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| |

---
| | | As I always do, let me give it to you straight:

The Democrats JUST squeaked ahead in the polls and activated their army of Liberal megadonors to grow their lead even further. _**[Unfortunately, I'm left with no other choice than to ask you for a small contribution before we lose everything.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZOtz6gBiUqCTgeW-4K3Q8Q~~/AARclAA~-Zd8cmwpSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "Unfortunately, I’m left with no other choice than to ask you for a small contribution before we lose everything.")**_

Look,

The Democrats are working from dawn 'til dusk to force-feed Liberal propaganda in our classrooms, trash the reputations of Conservative Supreme Court justices, re-up mask mandates, leave the border wide open, and woke-ify our military - that's enough to drive folks like you and me up a wall...

**But their Limousine Liberal buddies eat it up. And the huge checks roll in one after another. **

They'd love nothing more than to see the downfall of our House Majority. They know Conservatives would be powerless to stop them if they take full control of Congress.

_I know Mike Johnson reached out...
I know Steve Scalise reached out...
I know Kellyanne Conway reached out...
I know Newt Gingrich reached out...
I know Byron Donalds reached out...
And I know James Comer reached out..._

But now I'm reaching out ONE LAST TIME because the latest reports show the Radical Democrats with a devastating $8 million lead on us.

_**[If we don't get it together, the Democrats will be sitting pretty with complete control of the House, Senate, and White House before we know it. That's why I'm asking you to dig deep and kick in just a few bucks to save our House Majority and take back this country of ours.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZOtz6gBiUqCTgeW-4K3Q8Q~~/AARclAA~-Zd8cmwpSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "If we don’t get it together, the Democrats will be sitting pretty with complete control of the House, Senate, and White House before we know it. That’s why I’m asking you to dig deep and kick in just a few bucks to save our House Majority and take back this country of ours.")**_

---
Let me put it plainly:

**WITH YOUR HELP:** We have a direct path to sweeping the next elections.

**WITHOUT YOUR HELP:** We might as well enjoy our House Majority while it lasts... because the Democrats will crush us in no time.

_**[So can we count on you? This is really, REALLY important.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZOtz6gBiUqCTgeW-4K3Q8Q~~/AARclAA~-Zd8cmwpSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "So can we count on you? This is really, REALLY important. ")**_

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Tell the EPA to protect bees
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2202664?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Pesticides are KILLING BEES, and wild pollinator populations are being pushed to the brink!** Scientists are warning of an “insect apocalypse.” Over the past three decades, neonic pesticides have made U.S. agriculture _**nearly 50x more toxic to bees!**_ It gets worse. Every year, millions of acres are planted with neonic-coated seeds – **but the EPA uses a loophole to avoid regulating these seeds as pesticides.** Until the EPA stops shirking its responsibility, these neonic-coated seeds will continue to **push wild bee species closer to extinction![Friend, tell the EPA to regulate BEE-KILLING pesticides applied to seeds! We need 2,171 more signatures by MIDNIGHT tonight!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2202665?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2202666?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The pesticide coatings on treated seeds can contaminate the soil and wash off into streams, rivers, and **into the very water we drink!** Neonics on seeds are also taken into the crop as it grows and **cannot be washed off our food.** Exposure to these pesticides has been linked to **birth defects of the heart and brain.**
The EPA has a responsibility to protect people, pollinators, and our environment. Instead, it’s allowing neonic-treated seeds to harm people, pollinators, and our environment. A comment from YOU could help change that – but **every second we wait, pesticides are killing more bees and hurting more people![Please, Friend, protect people and pollinators from toxic pesticides!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2202667?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2202668?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy Director of Science,
Friends of the Earth**
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)
---
##### Email Preferences:
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Faction.foe.org%2Fpage%2F2555%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3Fea.broadcast.id%3D279693&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC)
##### Learn more:
[www.foe.org/news](http://www.foe.org/news) [www.foe.org/about-us](http://www.foe.org/about-us) [www.foeaction.org](http://www.foeaction.org)
---
##### Connect:
[](https://www.facebook.com/foe.us?fref=ts) [](https://twitter.com/foe_us) [](https://www.flickr.com/photos/foeaction/)
---
© 2021, Friends of the Earth. All Rights Reserved.

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: We are in the midst of a great crisis
body:
You understand that the anti-American Left is working every day to undermine intelligent patriotism and radically transform our free system of government and our American way of life.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37ac6155fa9e40dbb57655e92bb9f5db&_e=Or71J_lbiqzmvgSZjPt-7aUgQcJMVs41qibQlJVVPC4c1nTMird2ksdBYHs8LCStHltvfxK732NHBSPOsebYpNYTM53Ce5L5KsilJJkMv5C_qTYdJ0ST_3Hbfy5eMGCJkFhxYMHcKJHQt_SI-DZDOuq3LdqaILKFwfS7wFyrX1eG4i78fl4hrpM1-hCUJi3s2pUvZqwTZHq7eteG3fkr83mhbeEo_T7f_OoGxQReY4QeSATotZxKxtxh-AR_ZqcKT5AUvAyCKXnJI6r_yCh6kHqAFZZ0pswjiLjGyNWmMOVPVOkh_7RKZCo0GN-ksSFx-pgzH0fOpLy-eosBJAikSEIbrHdUtQKJODF8QdYNhPQaXPTV5ra-8yimXI65dCcU)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I am writing to you today because we are in the midst of a great crisis. And fortunately, you understand this ...

You understand that the anti-American Left is working every day to undermine intelligent patriotism and radically transform our free system of government and our American way of life.

You understand the urgency of the situation as we approach 2024--a **critical year** for America...

We must engage the anti-American Left on the battlefield of education to defend liberty and constitutional government.

Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades.

**Your generosity helps us to counter an anti-American education agenda that includes promoting radical gender ideology to young schoolchildren and encouraging college students to celebrate terrorism.**

That's why we're asking for your year-end support to continue and expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.**

**We must do more.**

With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation.

That's why we've set a goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2024.

Your generous donation will help us to ...

* **Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our monthly digest of liberty.** With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to more than 7,000,000 households and businesses in 2024.
* **Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses.** Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2024.
* **Restore excellence to American K-12 education.** Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

We cannot do this work without you ...

Hillsdale needs your support for its work on behalf of liberty because the forces arrayed against it on the battleground of education are many and powerful.

They are also incredibly well-funded, with Hollywood, Big Tech, mega-corporations, and liberal billionaires like George Soros on their side.

Hillsdale College relies on the support of citizens like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty and want their children and grandchildren to enjoy the blessings of liberty and the American way of life.

**To do our work on behalf of liberty, we need your help.
**
As I've explained in the past, Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts** --as it does all of its work--while refusing to accept **one penny** of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. Most of our supporters' contributions are in this range.

We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2024, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye-2023](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37ac6155fa9e40dbb57655e92bb9f5db&_e=Or71J_lbiqzmvgSZjPt-7aUgQcJMVs41qibQlJVVPC4c1nTMird2ksdBYHs8LCStHltvfxK732NHBSPOsebYpNYTM53Ce5L5KsilJJkMv5C_qTYdJ0ST_3Hbfy5eMGCJkFhxYMHcKJHQt_SI-DZDOuq3LdqaILKFwfS7wFyrX1eG4i78fl4hrpM1-hCUJi3s2pUvZqwTZHq7eteG3fkr83mhbeEo_T7f_OoGxQReY4RejzK1gFy_RIOIjMxadKUGnFUZJKYMR9Bbv6T5ZrKYSJVTlK85nBYBjJ55cvgVOnuNjx0N-E465io_pDnUmniP8FUOaJBCMQWEOdRJ-B8QqX8f7sl64Lww6-1nGF6aXAS59kl2ID20VF-gCoXjGLJy)**

In the coming year, the anti-American Left will pull out all the stops to keep its stranglehold on government and on education alike.

It will continue in its efforts to undermine intelligent patriotism in our schools and to radically transform our free system of government.

It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty hangs in the balance.

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift before the December 31 deadline.

Every dollar you give will get us closer to our **$6,000,000** online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2024.

Thank you for your generosity. We are grateful for friends like you who understand what is at stake at this critical time for our nation.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Defend the Constitution
---

clean_body: You understand that the anti-American Left is working every day to undermine intelligent patriotism and radically transform our free system of government and our American way of life. This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, I am writing to you today because we are in the midst of a great crisis. And fortunately, you understand this ... You understand that the anti-American Left is working every day to undermine intelligent patriotism and radically transform our free system of government and our American way of life. You understand the urgency of the situation as we approach 2024--a critical year for America... We must engage the anti-American Left on the battlefield of education to defend liberty and constitutional government. Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. Your generosity helps us to counter an anti-American education agenda that includes promoting radical gender ideology to young schoolchildren and encouraging college students to celebrate terrorism. That's why we're asking for your year-end support to continue and expand our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. We must do more. With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation. That's why we've set a goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions in 2024. Your generous donation will help us to ... Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with Imprimis , our monthly digest of liberty. With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of Imprimis to more than 7,000,000 households and businesses in 2024. Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses. Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2024. Restore excellence to American K-12 education. Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. We cannot do this work without you ... Hillsdale needs your support for its work on behalf of liberty because the forces arrayed against it on the battleground of education are many and powerful. They are also incredibly well-funded, with Hollywood, Big Tech, mega-corporations, and liberal billionaires like George Soros on their side. Hillsdale College relies on the support of citizens like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty and want their children and grandchildren to enjoy the blessings of liberty and the American way of life. To do our work on behalf of liberty, we need your help. As I've explained in the past, Hillsdale College conducts its educational outreach efforts --as it does all of its work--while refusing to accept one penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between $25 and $100. Most of our supporters' contributions are in this range. We will also need a significant number of $500 to $1,000 donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated. Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2024, we urgently need your help. You can safely and securely renew your support using this link: In the coming year, the anti-American Left will pull out all the stops to keep its stranglehold on government and on education alike. It will continue in its efforts to undermine intelligent patriotism in our schools and to radically transform our free system of government. It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty hangs in the balance. That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift before the December 31 deadline. Every dollar you give will get us closer to our $6,000,000 online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2024. Thank you for your generosity. We are grateful for friends like you who understand what is at stake at this critical time for our nation. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. name: Conservatives Give
subject: The greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59cd3a209a624885b2cd394cbf869fda&_e=FDFTtfjOXkCDUFwy5WESPxn7IKj3aE0dJyoCghiHrommxVpbaa4OkrnBNuNYMRYePE9FBZ4_A0T-smAw_X6g9RQf--uNBe2YtwqGI6wRwzZDyaHJLMPVBy5L6x7HFrlU2_sck0HNavBleiTT9O4-LifW7r4RUbOisxRk8guVMnWxC5wpvT6lZzkZbD_ovewZs3jgpMSP0VWbT0XaqhSzPK8qqQhJJTIL9IBCfA_-J7CRMVsMwojXs70ssCnbV5Ufgmf0CpW_fOokGTxx04dhczmOPc5ZhKKTL7IoNDmgPHtdyjFM-2mg6E2Wuy68XOaRSFLjdTRJ4pqQqpr2Pfrv9cX_Tpt9lP91tJQ9t-0Qbk-Sfepq6CIKp4YeTTdLvmTY0g666iaiTtI6Ai5xz4gUuZ_6T8dwof959uKwkdzaLOyNqrDtebtBiShp5HF2JEbS)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59cd3a209a624885b2cd394cbf869fda&_e=FDFTtfjOXkCDUFwy5WESPxn7IKj3aE0dJyoCghiHrommxVpbaa4OkrnBNuNYMRYePE9FBZ4_A0T-smAw_X6g9RQf--uNBe2YtwqGI6wRwzZDyaHJLMPVBy5L6x7HFrlU2_sck0HNavBleiTT9O4-LifW7r4RUbOisxRk8guVMnWxC5wpvT6lZzkZbD_ovewZs3jgpMSP0VWbT0XaqhSzPK8qqQhJJTIL9IBCfA_-J7CRMVsMwojXs70ssCnbV5Ufgmf0CpW_fOokGTxx04dhcxC93BBHLr4mA9u6C00ixIb8_wkVMgmSfCOAhhFZlh1LFSPMO_f2KQW6_-86fFaoEBe-DAYGAvyL16oapAH7f5HowDa4lVDuuqLopUOs5jSrOxwkG3fB48ysBKQ_PgrJ1O5PAu76ef7sjEKPY0vX_65cYUBAvD575cCmsxjvioJB)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59cd3a209a624885b2cd394cbf869fda&_e=FDFTtfjOXkCDUFwy5WESPxn7IKj3aE0dJyoCghiHrommxVpbaa4OkrnBNuNYMRYePE9FBZ4_A0T-smAw_X6g9RQf--uNBe2YtwqGI6wRwzZDyaHJLMPVBy5L6x7HFrlU2_sck0HNavBleiTT9O4-LifW7r4RUbOisxRk8guVMnWxC5wpvT6lZzkZbD_ovewZs3jgpMSP0VWbT0XaqhSzPK8qqQhJJTIL9IBCfA_-J7CRMVsMwojXs70ssCnbV5Ufgmf0CpW_fOokGTxx04dhcybi0Pmt8DxgxM4QIJbYRxHHU3fDEaZ4TO_KSj1lWz3QyRLVKswRSlIDFrcg86lCT7XSxtA-oJ0qLl0QIWjzcBSHAy3WY-lai3RUGLfemUChxP4NsxmoOoexrNFPWUM6ny7LQFbWC6flCTtDCJ1_ocqt7VizqSlVauloq33kJCuU)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59cd3a209a624885b2cd394cbf869fda&_e=FDFTtfjOXkCDUFwy5WESPxn7IKj3aE0dJyoCghiHrommxVpbaa4OkrnBNuNYMRYePE9FBZ4_A0T-smAw_X6g9RQf--uNBe2YtwqGI6wRwzZDyaHJLMPVBy5L6x7HFrlU2_sck0HNavBleiTT9O4-LifW7r4RUbOisxRk8guVMnWxC5wpvT6lZzkZbD_ovewZs3jgpMSP0VWbT0XaqhSzPK8qqQhJJTIL9IBCfA_-J7CRMVsMwojXs70ssCnbV5Ufgmf0CpW_fOokGTxx04dhc0SOQql2NmYOBsDQkMRq9l_emamDWYZlefhwr7T-oApBK9MKwBgJgBeH3x_--Cn-HeVtt0rOw1du1TboEgI3e8Nu7a1po7oI2sCYyG-uA6dZm1yTQdu8pzoJqEusDW7ZS9MDxJtiII7wyIn2VGpXuV7g4401pfXi0fwFUMm-QSTW).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. | | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we produced "" which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

| | | | | Here's the _truth_ , Peter: The frontrunner for the GOP nomination for Governor of North Carolina, Mark Robinson, is a self-described conspiracy theorist. He has accused school shooting survivors of being “crisis actors.” He referred to the Holocaust as “hogwash.” He agreed with claims that Jewish bankers are working with China, Islamic leaders, and the CIA to “control the world.” My opponent’s lies aren’t just outrageous, Peter . **They’re dangerous.**
---
|
---

Mark Robinson is too extreme for North Carolina — and we deserve better. Democrats CANNOT afford to lose this race.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2394b2f5-420f-4e7f-a0b9-57046d057c4a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

That’s why, as Speaker Johnson moves forward with measures to hold Joe Biden accountable, I am in full agreement. [**_END THE BIDEN CRIME SPREE_**](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/els/v2/xjZ_sYAyP-Jb/b1kySm1CNEtzZ2E1M0NkNmNDTDdacWFkc3p4Ykl1RU9JQ0JNWXhSTzV3a2VpSnBjUytCR09aVXhrU1U3VW84NGNJOTlMNTgxWkJVWXBud1c2UjN4Mk4yUEdxOVE0NDA1Z05vc0owSGVnc2k0L2ZCSEZ0d2s1QT09S0/)

He’s literally been in public office since the Nixon Administration, with just a four-year gap between leaving as Obama's VP and entering the White House. How does he explain the millions of dollars that have allegedly been pouring into his bank account through a dozen shell companies??? He doesn’t. He can’t. So my Republican colleagues and I will hold him accountable. Ron and Casey DeSantis have spent years fighting for children and parents. If we let the Left run away with pushing late-term abortions in every state, there won't be anyone left fighting for our nation's youngest generation. We can't let them get away with convincing the world that this isn't murder. We need you to help us put an end to this NOW.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2da8ec4618e8dfcddead297ba7f6942880b69de7f670dfa7082d55337279cb4a24d068707f208b0dd1ba04a4047df5367ed0f8c4a755c079175a32ef16c407cd

CHIP IN $15

— Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2da8ec4618e8dfcddb6ee7cad996b3a9fc07088f26319bab5ce1e555b1ff801fddbf19d50c7b5e40366420d5e9d8c8697aa580dace27cc53fb42212e5e3f7d53

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2da8ec4618e8dfcd58b2331ce2fbcef4be46e1bddf2d58f290604d5c6a01b3b0dbd1e0ba24a4deb59d2bfcb553c6bfacafc91fbc811973b6fc9ce0341d494e09
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2da8ec4618e8dfcddb6ee7cad996b3a9fc07088f26319bab5ce1e555b1ff801fddbf19d50c7b5e40366420d5e9d8c8697aa580dace27cc53fb42212e5e3f7d53

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2da8ec4618e8dfcddb6ee7cad996b3a9fc07088f26319bab5ce1e555b1ff801fddbf19d50c7b5e40366420d5e9d8c8697aa580dace27cc53fb42212e5e3f7d53

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Ron and Casey DeSantis have spent years fighting for children and parents. If we let the Left run away with pushing late-term abortions in every state, there won't be anyone left fighting for our nation's youngest generation. We can't let them get away with convincing the world that this isn't murder. We need you to help us put an end to this NOW. Will you chip in just $15 to help? CHIP IN $15 — Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead. If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win. Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). Dear Fellow Patriot,

The next presidential administration could be a turning point for our country.

After years of inflation, open borders, reckless spending, and rampant crime, America desperately needs effective governance grounded in our founding principles.

Unfortunately, a conservative victory in the next election is not enough to save our country.

That's because today, the deep state controls D.C.

**Regardless of who is in office, career bureaucrats in our federal agencies like the Justice Department, Environmental Protection Agency, and the State Department independently push their own leftist agendas.

** In order to implement common-sense, conservative policies, we must have a plan to rein in these agencies and replace these leftist bureaucrats with principled conservatives.

The Heritage Foundation has that plan--called Project 2025.

**Through Project 2025, The Heritage Foundation has united 80 conservative organizations and is leading the charge for the next presidential transition plan.**

Heritage's policy scholars created a comprehensive policy book and a plan to implement it starting day one of the next administration.

These policies include securing our borders, ensuring election integrity, and reversing the growth of regulations, spending, and inflation.

Additionally, we're identifying and training qualified patriots to staff the next administration and replace the leftist bureaucrats - ending their control of the deep state.

**The radical leftist mainstream media has published several panicked articles attacking Heritage and Project 2025.**

But as we like to say, if the leftist media is angry at you, you're over the target.

As 2024 rapidly approaches, we're kicking Project 2025 into high gear.

Will you help us make this much needed program a massive success? Will you support Project 2025 with a special gift today?

Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6c4bc57866c5424080c0c5e8d38d603b&_e=wVwo6A4UhdLV_DnmsLpdLYqsOHk4ENtp3_vuUzXmud-GhUOH-dygTYKslhRiCw1e5JL9fwVBRb1RbpvPXgm0Xsl8ssioz5j35y3nYBba9yUO1dKHn5k3dL75AWxth6gRHbb2mLg4ApJQR8eOraezdAPYX2mhieL-2mDqj1XcD5lgSSlW3bCOE7DX3cmsPUorvHleXRpvVZ-5BcI6Dn8tic8ntFdbRrLifxHArS7yJhdkffjjyJeWo0ELFeGeUdQG9SSLSdTdeZuHBmMUub2KuKoZtGfC2zyKCFIRWRtX74Kvz3pN19ZCoyfxAbEbDy6HW6jBdYvQERgvAht_fEbPZaaqQJLOs6is0OVhpWD_kFTQr3RNgijl-xUr3UtRv3KfbaRblnsjHNiE5OadK9XxAQ%3D%3D)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6c4bc57866c5424080c0c5e8d38d603b&_e=wVwo6A4UhdLV_DnmsLpdLYqsOHk4ENtp3_vuUzXmud-GhUOH-dygTYKslhRiCw1e5JL9fwVBRb1RbpvPXgm0Xsl8ssioz5j35y3nYBba9yUO1dKHn5k3dL75AWxth6gRHbb2mLg4ApJQR8eOraezdAPYX2mhieL-2mDqj1XcD5lgSSlW3bCOE7DX3cmsPUorvHleXRpvVZ-5BcI6Dn8tic8ntFdbRrLifxHArS7yJhdyrhXwxhz75kmPC5vLLOElKx-yz0cr-z5cq5yzdCrZMiGJndYn9OS_Nkz3gG7L1vhGHJxjwmnk5lRfS3WiZd6AZJcEZMgk_iIR61HcKf2wJAWHRKCLEBkWvjQVFGG6gwPvBxUiYYdTo2tngYpr3kEor23M9e-vo1ACIT08mmPf0A%3D%3D)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/nSvV41DAAAMrY7Rw9m6Big~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/nSvV41DAAAMrY7Rw9m6Big~~/AARclAA~~~)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/nSvV41DAAAMrY7Rw9m6Big~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/nSvV41DAAAMrY7Rw9m6Big~~/AARclAA~~~).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0bc61bf73055445b95abba965f20854b&_e=vLsWO5GBayZ342r4U4yYGJpQBINJJsZ-zOpzgSYpa3qb4GngeVKT1L7ElnN_7jyjCxreX7Ed1_ki4pQmcjE_jNDJ38vRuw5VmGRctCqjX6KwCOFMjsOy7eeLPBshDFQYWWs-OeYao5SPbmqX_5BnXn-Y_ypmujAF1AzL1eM10TFOHwZa4Gq7GIaTNa2-8kaHoB5eRbnsnJMMvx85K-tp8GVgWusnL2sf4Dr90rlsUqTx1fEjpb2gS2G4Oc8ddYedL845DsbXv672Mkk-sHFpleBI-GuA2eVlMz-I63G-N7xPbtOTsiDVD6DUlqh9v-q2) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0bc61bf73055445b95abba965f20854b&_e=vLsWO5GBayZ342r4U4yYGJpQBINJJsZ-zOpzgSYpa3qb4GngeVKT1L7ElnN_7jyjCxreX7Ed1_ki4pQmcjE_jNDJ38vRuw5VmGRctCqjX6KwCOFMjsOy7eeLPBshDFQYWWs-OeYao5SPbmqX_5BnXpPbhzMbIBYcYeeFKXSIiKhaUEyskgJuwkhR66GD3MXKj3QrFhRcWXy4wOUP0lkJQNQuS9qMsyKQeSZuWB37F9A9c-PUyZitS9-7W0QmSlq2OiDeSWFY2A0Oiv5W6FAotAq86GJtZSOQ7oajmPtuC_n8vE0fbQ6fNaosattCXsQO) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0bc61bf73055445b95abba965f20854b&_e=vLsWO5GBayZ342r4U4yYGJpQBINJJsZ-zOpzgSYpa3qb4GngeVKT1L7ElnN_7jyjCxreX7Ed1_ki4pQmcjE_jNDJ38vRuw5VmGRctCqjX6KwCOFMjsOy7eeLPBshDFQYWWs-OeYao5SPbmqX_5BnXg68Fr--m6q2UOtz61NmQOCP57xxmGbHNBHhEcayAOwAieYEexlncgMVxHuS6Ztol3Qi12kNZ7Bkoe1LnnYuig5U0I_t7RQ6PFBwCW2xooicwTke6wVKiKOjxDGW9TGtyIxyLU2NJSa_Pj8XwFx6qzmTXXkPUErZeYn5_GU2Wr72). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0bc61bf73055445b95abba965f20854b&_e=vLsWO5GBayZ342r4U4yYGJpQBINJJsZ-zOpzgSYpa3qb4GngeVKT1L7ElnN_7jyjCxreX7Ed1_ki4pQmcjE_jNDJ38vRuw5VmGRctCqjX6KwCOFMjsOy7eeLPBshDFQYWWs-OeYao5SPbmqX_5BnXqTZItxMpJ6inRVGzOsoKwrebg_OCcD09yg7g2X-deoSZR7S4TJmsTOLgTS7cdEXA5xA53fvbVJkTf3DX2Q93V_tDdf6QbXnVPjBbXfMGf6cZmzQcDeoknx0ciKq6R8UVDBbPzvcf_FXcX4U1n-JauKoiHgAJvsk0xzHxUn9qx1J)

name: Full Mag News
subject: We are in the midst of a great crisis
body:
You understand that the anti-American Left is working every day to undermine intelligent patriotism and radically transform our free system of government and our American way of life.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=34d4c75d31da44aa9be9ccbde963b3fc&_e=oL68y1Cm-bF-MeHM7SiFfZgKVhj6qi_kYZZdI2891hoHlz3r0wGWL-7oDfrcldmrLY3erR7rP5AmjcEfMIGFg8RWO332TWv55RlCrF3tw8vmSKN5tot3E2u75S2k8iFon3AOi18-CY9l_2LLh9jd8mHEDUJXn0sMp68tQBEbWs8OVf-wBgAr3FP67E0uRk_93QjjRrvVrRUlJppMXiwYf8B8dkW92BLHfjJVytPdIgXzYkFDR2U_XwHiqnPJtSYqQ25cOnq0zrMaNJRFWdjeDpzyu28wrfRb6KftpzdgO34-bmAuiJi3OH_Z5FzFacZhWFgwSaG-zfEkqkP5BQfK0uVsJZ-pDQd_Kp3ZIGDR9jvy-yXr7axKhwmWJ4fbLqIP)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I am writing to you today because we are in the midst of a great crisis. And fortunately, you understand this ...

You understand that the anti-American Left is working every day to undermine intelligent patriotism and radically transform our free system of government and our American way of life.

You understand the urgency of the situation as we approach 2024--a **critical year** for America...

We must engage the anti-American Left on the battlefield of education to defend liberty and constitutional government.

Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades.

**Your generosity helps us to counter an anti-American education agenda that includes promoting radical gender ideology to young schoolchildren and encouraging college students to celebrate terrorism.**

That's why we're asking for your year-end support to continue and expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.**

**We must do more.**

With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation.

That's why we've set a goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2024.

Your generous donation will help us to ...

* **Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our monthly digest of liberty.** With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to more than 7,000,000 households and businesses in 2024.
* **Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses.** Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2024.
* **Restore excellence to American K-12 education.** Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

We cannot do this work without you ...

Hillsdale needs your support for its work on behalf of liberty because the forces arrayed against it on the battleground of education are many and powerful.

They are also incredibly well-funded, with Hollywood, Big Tech, mega-corporations, and liberal billionaires like George Soros on their side.

Hillsdale College relies on the support of citizens like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty and want their children and grandchildren to enjoy the blessings of liberty and the American way of life.

**To do our work on behalf of liberty, we need your help.
**
As I've explained in the past, Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts** --as it does all of its work--while refusing to accept **one penny** of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. Most of our supporters' contributions are in this range.

We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2024, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye-2023](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=34d4c75d31da44aa9be9ccbde963b3fc&_e=oL68y1Cm-bF-MeHM7SiFfZgKVhj6qi_kYZZdI2891hoHlz3r0wGWL-7oDfrcldmrLY3erR7rP5AmjcEfMIGFg8RWO332TWv55RlCrF3tw8vmSKN5tot3E2u75S2k8iFon3AOi18-CY9l_2LLh9jd8mHEDUJXn0sMp68tQBEbWs8OVf-wBgAr3FP67E0uRk_93QjjRrvVrRUlJppMXiwYf8B8dkW92BLHfjJVytPdIgUc7k6WY1Q2amLNH4QlQ_4eGaU2o21NmBNvb257NMnWDeOiDCl_ZtQAw9SVEvNsw4GFENPF6g3kX70aQ99Tp7neSDIkiNb7UaOoqJPNwhvQw_3u_3yhX6J9ZXMX8qBwSXtdg4XDbvoABaNzVVY90VKA)**

In the coming year, the anti-American Left will pull out all the stops to keep its stranglehold on government and on education alike.

It will continue in its efforts to undermine intelligent patriotism in our schools and to radically transform our free system of government.

It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty hangs in the balance.

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift before the December 31 deadline.

Every dollar you give will get us closer to our **$6,000,000** online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2024.

Thank you for your generosity. We are grateful for friends like you who understand what is at stake at this critical time for our nation.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Full Mag News

clean_body: You understand that the anti-American Left is working every day to undermine intelligent patriotism and radically transform our free system of government and our American way of life. This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, I am writing to you today because we are in the midst of a great crisis. And fortunately, you understand this ... You understand that the anti-American Left is working every day to undermine intelligent patriotism and radically transform our free system of government and our American way of life. You understand the urgency of the situation as we approach 2024--a critical year for America... We must engage the anti-American Left on the battlefield of education to defend liberty and constitutional government. Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. Your generosity helps us to counter an anti-American education agenda that includes promoting radical gender ideology to young schoolchildren and encouraging college students to celebrate terrorism. That's why we're asking for your year-end support to continue and expand our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. We must do more. With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation. That's why we've set a goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions in 2024. Your generous donation will help us to ... Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with Imprimis , our monthly digest of liberty. With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of Imprimis to more than 7,000,000 households and businesses in 2024. Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses. Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2024. Restore excellence to American K-12 education. Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. We cannot do this work without you ... Hillsdale needs your support for its work on behalf of liberty because the forces arrayed against it on the battleground of education are many and powerful. They are also incredibly well-funded, with Hollywood, Big Tech, mega-corporations, and liberal billionaires like George Soros on their side. Hillsdale College relies on the support of citizens like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty and want their children and grandchildren to enjoy the blessings of liberty and the American way of life. To do our work on behalf of liberty, we need your help. As I've explained in the past, Hillsdale College conducts its educational outreach efforts --as it does all of its work--while refusing to accept one penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between $25 and $100. Most of our supporters' contributions are in this range. We will also need a significant number of $500 to $1,000 donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated. Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2024, we urgently need your help. You can safely and securely renew your support using this link: In the coming year, the anti-American Left will pull out all the stops to keep its stranglehold on government and on education alike. It will continue in its efforts to undermine intelligent patriotism in our schools and to radically transform our free system of government. It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty hangs in the balance. That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift before the December 31 deadline. Every dollar you give will get us closer to our $6,000,000 online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2024. Thank you for your generosity. We are grateful for friends like you who understand what is at stake at this critical time for our nation. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6ef481ad1524527981f30d47b3c0653&_e=ytOeM_IDlq_FWZPnjsB2Tswh4wD09kCjkAL02_8Ui2esxSSOh7Hl2Zyhu2k6cfdVxH5aRhJTtPRNZ8StVr6Jge1PWf0NMMKEAqRSzQd5KWJ3ZjAx2A37qNvURbbUjgFWhSp4UqM9ika2lSjIJDe25anbxEKlSN2UsC6rjzIYo2b85gGK7O4OXIVKIBzvCSo_w12qdyr9os4qb_FXO316QODeZim5WbN3z1H_ZlU4FgcdWKyZdEdHQk3qE5lyu1FRrO1sgiL8T--s-UiPLBHkYb6cXNUrfGNx8hf5yMJajdIaZhfA7tDWcswT6HSneaXsypKMI0L1nHJ3uAfbl9tBW9RtUOpPCnC_iHH9TYD-VG8UfdKHBNrxmUnC5vtE6gzoR0in29wGmJiDf4Nkma5CA3e_HQRhvM5-5zkNB_0fwRlYTaHrtSVlEYfa_SZbWZHf)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6ef481ad1524527981f30d47b3c0653&_e=ytOeM_IDlq_FWZPnjsB2Tswh4wD09kCjkAL02_8Ui2esxSSOh7Hl2Zyhu2k6cfdVxH5aRhJTtPRNZ8StVr6Jge1PWf0NMMKEAqRSzQd5KWJ3ZjAx2A37qNvURbbUjgFWhSp4UqM9ika2lSjIJDe25anbxEKlSN2UsC6rjzIYo2b85gGK7O4OXIVKIBzvCSo_w12qdyr9os4qb_FXO316QODeZim5WbN3z1H_ZlU4FgcdWKyZdEdHQk3qE5lyu1FRrO1sgiL8T--s-UiPLBHkYdlFWjzWR9nCGMcL3XzZLIYDl_SVvsUcp-Oz4x8yZCm4sc-4FtXX6legIoTMZ2BT2mythyyefd2p8zZ4ulhonq9XIzotvTRSkEq6auff4mB2lQR5ROBrxQIBNsUFCH_HShWUNuyx3YUuA7p91tZ6wgD1fFF-ef0Ev86XR1UDQJB6)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6ef481ad1524527981f30d47b3c0653&_e=ytOeM_IDlq_FWZPnjsB2Tswh4wD09kCjkAL02_8Ui2esxSSOh7Hl2Zyhu2k6cfdVxH5aRhJTtPRNZ8StVr6Jge1PWf0NMMKEAqRSzQd5KWJ3ZjAx2A37qNvURbbUjgFWhSp4UqM9ika2lSjIJDe25anbxEKlSN2UsC6rjzIYo2b85gGK7O4OXIVKIBzvCSo_w12qdyr9os4qb_FXO316QODeZim5WbN3z1H_ZlU4FgcdWKyZdEdHQk3qE5lyu1FRrO1sgiL8T--s-UiPLBHkYWlS9hW03en_HWI3Kg6qWqgwLlknGVSyx2Yc7EMyqFsCgDHKWiJTVj7kMTLZVkGlniMXQW9jDcOEqHZY62zQM-P1z9TjpsVqcbbVggFhZChLUqvR8Udd64xwk1AxvwbCyij6de4Jj4NfL-l--JoDcNIxSZQSj4R4hTLOjLBGpEma)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6ef481ad1524527981f30d47b3c0653&_e=ytOeM_IDlq_FWZPnjsB2Tswh4wD09kCjkAL02_8Ui2esxSSOh7Hl2Zyhu2k6cfdVxH5aRhJTtPRNZ8StVr6Jge1PWf0NMMKEAqRSzQd5KWJ3ZjAx2A37qNvURbbUjgFWhSp4UqM9ika2lSjIJDe25anbxEKlSN2UsC6rjzIYo2b85gGK7O4OXIVKIBzvCSo_w12qdyr9os4qb_FXO316QODeZim5WbN3z1H_ZlU4FgcdWKyZdEdHQk3qE5lyu1FRrO1sgiL8T--s-UiPLBHkYZeo1jl4UeovEujwwtNnk4rBQmZbM1ZP4mSqm9KylwqulqyN7c8cqIBNhc5X3iLT3m-r-MXDeY1ID1PJTtTWXH1VLEVCpTdOtyYr1ahq4qFevSJx-DO81iAO4A-Kr2MLxU9J_m-_JpNboVOHSK__9fY328ocnqIxKkQzPDld5NeX).
