name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: We are in the midst of a great crisis
body:
You understand that the anti-American Left is working every day to undermine intelligent patriotism and radically transform our free system of government and our American way of life.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a47059a121934ef889b9239942fd9bb6&_e=DVWahmhTxbMtr-kTDHlBPq2JMtvdrldXeL6FG7tciLktNcZN6VFYsr41iUIWWFziWxCxtoRezEaSb9_F4zNib3V1OShvI2W3CrR95qUvhqBch3gixyyu3vGhoL4xJ-wC2g7guaXAd1nZaNsO6rqeqbEjpRxynQyYH5j2M-A3oKzyo7rG6yTGnbGntx5B4p7o7le7b5KjY93OQV038dG5pUGjmmY99Ac_TKmGR_h55SIaHZ7hCpYuiNsdQhPFv9EkzWOI11ufDLZ5sdV4_Dm36hS8tI904SQ0dqLkO5T46R6vHVQZHzoBm4gSfN6T1rm-_rACJCvSIqmngtZAZHOzfEfWIgXBnEMdvKCvHyoEXWIkEeWK0J1TaP1EvDywjCrp)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I am writing to you today because we are in the midst of a great crisis. And fortunately, you understand this ...

You understand that the anti-American Left is working every day to undermine intelligent patriotism and radically transform our free system of government and our American way of life.

You understand the urgency of the situation as we approach 2024--a **critical year** for America...

We must engage the anti-American Left on the battlefield of education to defend liberty and constitutional government.

Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades.

**Your generosity helps us to counter an anti-American education agenda that includes promoting radical gender ideology to young schoolchildren and encouraging college students to celebrate terrorism.**

That's why we're asking for your year-end support to continue and expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.**

**We must do more.**

With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation.

That's why we've set a goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2024.

Your generous donation will help us to ...

* **Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our monthly digest of liberty.** With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to more than 7,000,000 households and businesses in 2024.
* **Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses.** Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2024.
* **Restore excellence to American K-12 education.** Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

We cannot do this work without you ...

Hillsdale needs your support for its work on behalf of liberty because the forces arrayed against it on the battleground of education are many and powerful.

They are also incredibly well-funded, with Hollywood, Big Tech, mega-corporations, and liberal billionaires like George Soros on their side.

Hillsdale College relies on the support of citizens like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty and want their children and grandchildren to enjoy the blessings of liberty and the American way of life.

**To do our work on behalf of liberty, we need your help.
**
As I've explained in the past, Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts** --as it does all of its work--while refusing to accept **one penny** of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. Most of our supporters' contributions are in this range.

We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2024, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye-2023](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a47059a121934ef889b9239942fd9bb6&_e=DVWahmhTxbMtr-kTDHlBPq2JMtvdrldXeL6FG7tciLktNcZN6VFYsr41iUIWWFziWxCxtoRezEaSb9_F4zNib3V1OShvI2W3CrR95qUvhqBch3gixyyu3vGhoL4xJ-wC2g7guaXAd1nZaNsO6rqeqbEjpRxynQyYH5j2M-A3oKzyo7rG6yTGnbGntx5B4p7o7le7b5KjY93OQV038dG5pUGjmmY99Ac_TKmGR_h55SIbQJy-Bqf-REPGGgjO90-uGHAg-rjLWT5PIe2VX4TEzzZ13Z1kWnzhK3Zv-5oCIe-grTRSmCzQlC8NHMrwpScvxOrQvWkeKzV005Nu9XIV3zn4Lzw0OomWRuGIs0GyW1rG8YMPqpCaX9axD1_og2G9)**

In the coming year, the anti-American Left will pull out all the stops to keep its stranglehold on government and on education alike.

It will continue in its efforts to undermine intelligent patriotism in our schools and to radically transform our free system of government.

It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty hangs in the balance.

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift before the December 31 deadline.

Every dollar you give will get us closer to our **$6,000,000** online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2024.

Thank you for your generosity. We are grateful for friends like you who understand what is at stake at this critical time for our nation.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Freedom Nation Today
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=a47059a121934ef889b9239942fd9bb6&_t=HplcOiqPCAXOXw-WAeN_RaJLDR2ODQznhwqzK8b9LYWpKdqRYSOY067Y9e-o8bvH5kpk0U5vnlkTvdWqQ51pWq-ygTULtZrmnRViNTe2Z7uDVz1lj7LviEG9WLh5-pDbEmfWx91kyXQPUtvKpFqtKAyiwPs0vr5XytNyEk2tZO8%3D)

As I've explained in the past, Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts** --as it does all of its work--while refusing to accept **one penny** of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. Most of our supporters' contributions are in this range.

We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2024, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye-2023](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4095eac9c884421abaf7f87524ddb80f&_e=HbfGjCa-gWpAKxcz9tGQpf1j4LD7POW9wsI7OR0dWpDtBmqjkXHLRWbcCJmN1274anwZ5Gj2ydA5fuUdpYzYS4gz5iBPd9qyJ9x_kHwt4BMkVj6k4HVTqdsOgSWvsKhmVwUW7HIswBsk-TcnPnVw57rg64o7OZ5HnsvljyYLj7zbubUnuB-cg1Ua5oUVyfCB_T5wCw_fiXU09mk-8Y2h8kRMT6zAwpZkwIKN37KC5n_oVs4Qcy3t7p4SwYZ6wMtjziwvUqOa5YIAX-l3JY9H74Yfz1K-vhB-CNJvXMvcp_G12NpYrSlWz7whrFRS-bSFBpNwn9TkJHm-Zqw3TWYg7aBfLdELwMc7zX9H-XWKyrO4gjPz8720EELETXD8H7hh)**

In the coming year, the anti-American Left will pull out all the stops to keep its stranglehold on government and on education alike.

It will continue in its efforts to undermine intelligent patriotism in our schools and to radically transform our free system of government.

It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty hangs in the balance.

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift before the December 31 deadline.

Every dollar you give will get us closer to our **$6,000,000** online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2024.

Thank you for your generosity. We are grateful for friends like you who understand what is at stake at this critical time for our nation.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: How you can defeat radical leftism
body:
Unfortunately, a conservative victory in the next election is not enough to save our country.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9379022efc854a328115cf1186b7abcd&_e=veRh6HyUj7oN0l5CKsLgEKUTVg9AZpzMYr4yw6PAq19ylmY5zthRbIE2nuO0A_D8HIctip79Q1hEySMKPZY5ZoyvH0kU_Uac7kIWib82rL4jsXKNwFL1XPDoXzlLpwAoTVPEXq-YbgKhn9bPkflKuiMoI9yUcRZAPhqW0GtjCrbJMkskWGJ6HUNf7aIwzbamAHKRFWSkFt9WaiPLz0O4Fn70jFgUsv7yrxWvFuhYin5VCQHUnYL1GBYd8UQreFypwkLQQkMbV9QnsWn2PK--MCOdYE_B4kjYdXGvyorYQ2DmKNry5WiTDJ-Hw9-0YYekEKAjSNkQ_RBDNORYcZikiPdIzUuO0cWKpUbaPhXFlCg%3D)

Dear Fellow Patriot,

The next presidential administration could be a turning point for our country.

After years of inflation, open borders, reckless spending, and rampant crime, America desperately needs effective governance grounded in our founding principles.

Unfortunately, a conservative victory in the next election is not enough to save our country.

That's because today, the deep state controls D.C.

**Regardless of who is in office, career bureaucrats in our federal agencies like the Justice Department, Environmental Protection Agency, and the State Department independently push their own leftist agendas.

** In order to implement common-sense, conservative policies, we must have a plan to rein in these agencies and replace these leftist bureaucrats with principled conservatives.

The Heritage Foundation has that plan--called Project 2025.

**Through Project 2025, The Heritage Foundation has united 80 conservative organizations and is leading the charge for the next presidential transition plan.**

Heritage's policy scholars created a comprehensive policy book and a plan to implement it starting day one of the next administration.

These policies include securing our borders, ensuring election integrity, and reversing the growth of regulations, spending, and inflation.

Additionally, we're identifying and training qualified patriots to staff the next administration and replace the leftist bureaucrats - ending their control of the deep state.

**The radical leftist mainstream media has published several panicked articles attacking Heritage and Project 2025.**

But as we like to say, if the leftist media is angry at you, you're over the target.

As 2024 rapidly approaches, we're kicking Project 2025 into high gear.

Will you help us make this much needed program a massive success? Will you support Project 2025 with a special gift today?
**
****If you 're ready to ensure the next presidential administration can enact conservative policies you and I believe in, please make a tax-deductible year-end gift to The Heritage Foundation using the secure link below.

[https://secured.heritage.org/eoy-campaign/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9379022efc854a328115cf1186b7abcd&_e=veRh6HyUj7oN0l5CKsLgEKUTVg9AZpzMYr4yw6PAq19ylmY5zthRbIE2nuO0A_D8HIctip79Q1hEySMKPZY5ZoyvH0kU_Uac7kIWib82rL4jsXKNwFL1XPDoXzlLpwAoTVPEXq-YbgKhn9bPkflKuiMoI9yUcRZAPhqW0GtjCrbJMkskWGJ6HUNf7aIwzbamAHKRFWSkFt9WaiPLz0O4FhrKGOzGSsJsEq8tks3LbjdTIbRjbLUN75ioU_QeGcIFtlZY1hKk4DgBcRJStbU66PJid42_mGTCOJdmY7U_cge1pTZ6alBRRJXhSlWOWb8t276U3sAwIyGgTYjZkkV_E2hxLfbvRHv05GT0YxXyVco%3D)**

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.

name: Team Kennedy
subject: What This Campaign is About
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Uniting the nation around the ideals we all share.

|
---
| | | **Uniting the nation around the ideals we all share.
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_12_17_23_email_1rs_2_nd&n=1)
|

Dear Peter,
This campaign is picking up a head of steam that the Mainstream Media can no longer ignore, censor, or caricature.
This campaign is about Healing the Divide between Democrats and Republicans, conservatives and liberals - by uniting the nation around the ideals we all share.
This campaign is about restoring the right to free speech and ending censorship, which has no place in America.
**This campaign is about...**
* Protecting and re-building the hollowed-out Middle Class by ending the "forever wars". There will be NO MORE WARS under my watch;
* Getting corrupt corporate influence out of government, so that our agencies can protect the public instead of enriching the corporations;
* Using the “peace dividend” to rebuild America's infrastructure and create millions of well-paid, skilled jobs;
* Flipping the script on immigration - instead of a flood of illegal immigrants and a trickle of legal immigrants, let's seal the border to stop illegal immigration and allow an appropriate level of lawful, orderly immigration; and,
* Making housing affordable again by building hundreds of thousands of new homes and giving first-time home buyers access to low interest rates.

**This campaign is about returning America to the path we were on before the assassinations of JFK, RFK, and Martin Luther King.**
Reigniting our shared American values is a costly endeavor–an extremely worthwhile one, which is why our end of year funding goal of $6 Million is so important.
[Please chip in today to help us achieve ballot access in each of the 50 states](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_12_17_23_email_1rs_2_nd&n=2)**— and begin healing and uniting America.**
[CONTRIBUTE $5 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_12_17_23_email_1rs_2_nd&n=3)
[CONTRIBUTE $25 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=25&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_12_17_23_email_1rs_2_nd&n=4)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=100&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_12_17_23_email_1rs_2_nd&n=5)
[CONTRIBUTE $240 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=240&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_12_17_23_email_1rs_2_nd&n=6)
[CONTRIBUTE $1,000 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=1000&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_12_17_23_email_1rs_2_nd&n=7)
[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_12_17_23_email_1rs_2_nd&n=8)
High poll numbers don’t matter if you’re not on the ballot for voters to choose, and _only our campaign has the ability to secure that spot_. It will be a grassroots effort with in-person centers in all 50 states, because no corporate-funded Super PAC will do it for us.
We are at a critical moment. We're headed toward victory, and we are at crunch time to get the resources to see us through. **Now is the moment!**
[This is why we are turning to you again for help.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_12_17_23_email_1rs_2_nd&n=9)
The future of our country is in question today. Now we must stay the course! We hope to hear from you.
Team Kennedy

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don't say this to shock or scare you - I say it because it's true. _What we see today didn 't happen overnight. It's the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **... and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I'd know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ - radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my "comrades" made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan - then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I've dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn't tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That's why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** - and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I'm asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I'll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7867064d50354af3bc99a782e7610e79&_e=Cgu9EBN37BUd4dUmoiuLgwjUgTJcIYAhJ6qnFgJIVazdnIZ-jK1lsHiKEjPe2U-Ql3dawz3ymS6_vt4Tz3Wu91xp49UxomhNB_VIdyGP7RJezTpqD_eY6P4Hjd-VkYbSmFHhB1qjxunwpvIY73QXx4cNsPWTW1iFZSF03LPSj8csaGbSSyvXGt14eLkLAgU2ridm3MMTMJ5z_5G5mQ5lgAfZrMidgPi9RJmZ8C909zC7FucylGd6Ypnu54KUBJ4IdpghbHNa4zAU_qfnI6P2tDWm1xV6QZabx8S1A0y8dNWEjcZqNbri6AFCHeNEjO-9ChJsvxR24_6hLfzznh0fwXmPvrgjR2C6e9K6-SSuPbUHQ_1k3Yzg8VBysDOJQG2dS-YtApto_tc4XDZWvcGoyA%3D%3D)** When you think of "the enemy within" you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn't be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we've seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making - but most of the American people have no clue what we're up against. **That 's why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state - and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as "white supremacists" and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... "A Great Book" - Dinesh D'Souza "_The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life." - Mark Levin "David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation." Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within -- and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We've reached the point in our history that will decide our future - and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That's why I'll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left's evil agenda to every American patriot.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7867064d50354af3bc99a782e7610e79&_e=Cgu9EBN37BUd4dUmoiuLgwjUgTJcIYAhJ6qnFgJIVazdnIZ-jK1lsHiKEjPe2U-Ql3dawz3ymS6_vt4Tz3Wu91xp49UxomhNB_VIdyGP7RJezTpqD_eY6P4Hjd-VkYbSmFHhB1qjxunwpvIY73QXx4cNsPWTW1iFZSF03LPSj8csaGbSSyvXGt14eLkLAgU2ridm3MMTMJ5z_5G5mQ5lgAfZrMidgPi9RJmZ8C909zC7FucylGd6Ypnu54KUBJ4IDJvx7RO13jO0Ql7IVaKBiPH5ANOd2WVqINjRMpzCgBCq4CTU_oUUvIZTvpcv6PDgbE8O42mMrrqFhKH-d-Fb0soZA7bABrk5shezdVh9HlpE3IAmZfKMk7l8njuawTAItbMY8ViGCHIAATe_C_Uc-A%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don't simply disagree with us about how to make our country better - they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama's own words "radically transform" America. **And they don 't care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it's up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I'll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7867064d50354af3bc99a782e7610e79&_e=Cgu9EBN37BUd4dUmoiuLgwjUgTJcIYAhJ6qnFgJIVazdnIZ-jK1lsHiKEjPe2U-Ql3dawz3ymS6_vt4Tz3Wu91xp49UxomhNB_VIdyGP7RJezTpqD_eY6P4Hjd-VkYbSmFHhB1qjxunwpvIY73QXx4cNsPWTW1iFZSF03LPSj8csaGbSSyvXGt14eLkLAgU2ridm3MMTMJ5z_5G5mQ5lgAfZrMidgPi9RJmZ8C909zC7FucylGd6Ypnu54KUBJ4IeygqMH2vSGYM0xlv8wrCqQOGNcsxuZP55zFss4a21JhxAXjhgCFFdU9YfhaFufXbNFAv0cFpAikyyrYsjoZ96ilsXKTUhsUw9Y33xxIrQawLf060dujfwvA725CPbPt1UkIuS-VAfVTL8O2pGiSM3g%3D%3D)**

When you think of "the enemy within" you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn't be wrong. But make no mistake: The real mastermind is Barack Obama. Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we've seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making - but most of the American people have no clue what we're up against. That 's why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state - and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as "white supremacists" and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... "A Great Book" - Dinesh D'Souza "The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life." - Mark Levin "David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation." Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within -- and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We've reached the point in our history that will decide our future - and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don't simply disagree with us about how to make our country better - they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama's own words "radically transform" America. And they don 't care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it's up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. subject: Sign: Thank the jury members who finally made Rudy pay for his lies
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Thank the jury for ordering Rudy to pay $148 million for his dangerous lies](https://default.salsalabs.org/T905592e9-3126-49bd-9e4c-9916ec92528b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7b05f8ef-5216-4e89-8288-60dbe7b52d93/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Rudy Giuliani was sued by two Georgia election workers, Ruby Freeman and her daughter, Wandrea "Shaye" Moss, for spreading dangerous lies and conspiracy theories about them after the 2020 election. **And the jury has ordered him to pay big -- [$148 million](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9752a563-2512-439c-87d7-25a61a20ccb7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). And we want to thank them. ****[Please join us and thank the jury for ordering Rudy to pay for his dangerous lies](https://default.salsalabs.org/T839eb123-7dc2-4e42-b796-ef86b09033d4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) >>** Giuliani's defamatory statements wreaked havoc in Ruby and Shaye's lives and they were met with threats of violence from the MAGA crowd. They asked for $24 million each for defamation, emotional distress and punitive damages. And the jury decided that wasn't enough. And we agree. And even if he can't ever pay it all, it will be hanging over his head for the rest of his life. And it serves him right, for making their lives hell. [**Please join us and thank the jury for ordering Rudy to pay for his dangerous lies >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40beb379-5270-4f1f-aec6-2232b6708dc7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

subject: B+L Weekly Reads: Delco Judge Rejects Dems' Power Grab | Elite Universities' Edifice Rebuked + More ⚡🔔
body:
News + editorial to start your week. | | | |
---
| | |
### __Broad + Liberty's_ Weekly Reads:_
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c6fa64d702&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| _**Delco judge shoots down Democrats' power-grab**_
---
| A Delaware County judge ruled Wednesday the Democrat-led county council overstepped its authority earlier this year when it passed an ordinance allowing itself to **reject Republican nominees to the county’s bipartisan election board** — a violation of the law and of decades of bipartisan precedent. The court struck down the attempt at one-party rule in Delco, but the fight isn’t over yet. [Read more at _Broad + Liberty_.](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1d062637d0&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### _Other Top Stories..._
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=75d1031aea&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
University of Pennsylvania president **Liz Magill** resigned last weekend, but the controversy over campus antisemitism is far from over. As **Guy Ciarrocchi** explained this week, [the problem is not with Magill but with the whole rotten edifice](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=187d850c12&e=b7b3eddce2) of elite universities across the country. “Magill didn’t misrepresent Penn’s values,” he writes, “she stated them loudly, clearly, and repeatedly.” And that’s the problem.
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a8ae27953f&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
Another symptom of our society’s ills is the wave of crime that is still sweeping the nation’s cities, even if it has receded slightly from its 2020 heights. **Criag Snyder** wrote for us about the [senseless murder of a security guard at Macy’s](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d8456dae32&e=b7b3eddce2) (né Wanamaker’s) this month and how a society that too often justifies criminality as “resistance against an unjust society” **invites tragedies** like this one to occur.
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=35379e202e&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
And finally this week, a deep dive into the November election data by **Liv DeMarco** and **Beth Ann Rosica** shows that [some local election results may offer a path forward for suburban Republicans](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1dbd49f46f&e=b7b3eddce2) — a hopeful note amid a generally dismal year for the GOP in local races.
---
|
---
| _**What We’re Reading...**_
---
| **James Bennet** , one-time editor of the _New York Times_ , wrote this week in _The Economist_ about [the madness of the cultural revolution that swept him and others right out of a job at the Grey Lady](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8b24236918&e=b7b3eddce2). It confirms nearly everything conservatives thought about the **insanity that swept newsrooms** in that _annus horribilis_ of 2020 in a lengthy essay that really gets at the question the rest of us were asking of the mainstream media: What on Earth were they thinking?
---
|
---
| **_Broad + Liberty_ is funded exclusively by readers like you.**

Your generous support ensures that _Broad + Liberty_ can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather sweep under the rug. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject matter, please let us know in the contribution form or at [editors@broadandliberty.com](mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com).

As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_

body:
Let’s get to work!
| | | | |

| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta8eb8121-87b9-4944-9584-b47916834dac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---

| |
---
| | | | | Peter, it’s Tom Suozzi. Blue Amp Action asked me to reach out with an important message. **Big news!! I was officially nominated as the Democratic nominee to take back the seat formerly held by George Santos!** Now, we have a special election on February 13, 2024. That is only 68 days from now!! This will be a tough special election. National Republican groups will spend millions against me. With your help and the help of a grassroots team **we can win NY-03.** [**Your help has never been more important!! So, Peter, I’m humbly asking for your support. Can you rush a split donation between me and Blue Amp Action right now to help win this pivotal special election in NY-03 and elect Democrats around the country?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T00bdbfd0-97c3-4c30-b39d-a28626ede379/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)****
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3ff99ddc-1fe0-414f-ac90-685338ea5ab1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thank you so much for your support. Tom Suozzi
---
| | |
---
|

| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

| [](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=ff41d8087af3437a97ddb01695a9b631&_e=4GvMObrNdWehvbhETgbXAsRA0t6AxGo_zOncouvsTQ1iggX2U_3gKQV_FkTXQHMEacYu7kb-8nI1_3OwI_pQFtuuFSBLheOehXt7qxKH16xbQrlhQlW4T96Xt0U50gixqoJZiMNYVkm6IjSCXxi4zfzFifX39sIXxBwfZmJLp_Xcp0evLPqwPzCbxvwXI-izYPvS2m7fsAHMvyvp-9LivF9DShUco0vux5pcEV6VzHXXmkIc8AqHWdL6EneI2czbN3YjNU7EV8aNxK-7FqukVZV0RucfpR6d-_h8RYWty4peEcJ87AsEhVyEfyNE-cL_IUn0wO9gDesP5geH8fAbyI0ZMy5iNjG4u9E5iOdHKsNhWqDa_6xMDs8T-Qst8Z5-qcHL5H2wryrWgsTObP2oog%3D%3D)
**TRUTH: The nuclear family is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.**
Fellow American,

My two parents who brought me into this world and my wife, Apoorva, and our two sons, are the most important people in my life. Family is a grounding institution, one that matters and is worth preserving.

I have talked about how America is losing its sense of national identity and losing our ability to believe in God — we absolutely cannot lose and degrade the importance of family. The fabric of our country is built on the love and care we give to future generations and in making sure our country continues to thrive with each passing year, not just election cycles.

| [** FOR OUR FUTURE GENERATIONS **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=ff41d8087af3437a97ddb01695a9b631&_e=4GvMObrNdWehvbhETgbXAsRA0t6AxGo_zOncouvsTQ1iggX2U_3gKQV_FkTXQHMEacYu7kb-8nI1_3OwI_pQFtuuFSBLheOehXt7qxKH16xbQrlhQlW4T96Xt0U50gixqoJZiMNYVkm6IjSCXxi4zfzFifX39sIXxBwfZmJLp_Xcp0evLPqwPzCbxvwXI-izYPvS2m7fsAHMvyvp-9LivF9DShUco0vux5pcEV6VzHXXmkIc8AqHWdL6EneI2czb0TqPx2NUd99iIoaJ_EMP57L5b4A8qxoYMXlgz6T0sbesyQXDfFqQMWteG-zeNrabiEKVkERKT-fenuan3wStPKVHl9t_YIe7kDfuvJT4cYpcmcT4UAXWjstxL06MiJA_uiN41vidnDUXr7N70sklPw%3D%3D)

We’ve gotten lazy just being against the other side, forgetting what we actually stand for. The nuclear family is the foundation of a flourishing nation. I have loved meeting the families who come in droves to our campaign events. We all want a better opportunity for our future generations and children.

[**I refuse to continue letting my sons grow up in a country where many people cannot even answer what it means to be an American. Our family’s top mission in the White House: revive our national character and the importance of the family institution. Apoorva and I are ready for the challenge.**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=ff41d8087af3437a97ddb01695a9b631&_e=4GvMObrNdWehvbhETgbXAsRA0t6AxGo_zOncouvsTQ1iggX2U_3gKQV_FkTXQHMEacYu7kb-8nI1_3OwI_pQFtuuFSBLheOehXt7qxKH16xbQrlhQlW4T96Xt0U50gixqoJZiMNYVkm6IjSCXxi4zfzFifX39sIXxBwfZmJLp_Xcp0evLPqwPzCbxvwXI-izYPvS2m7fsAHMvyvp-9LivF9DShUco0vux5pcEV6VzHXXmkIc8AqHWdL6EneI2czb9mxr_GqS0tMispmUPfUztis00XEvul_JAqD5FIoISCJhUZy5N3Qkd_YjP1Zas37SL8c6E20qFGJp7eaWi_76VlX-Yc05OcMjqKqrM_14yWJWKTyX0eaWSCP47HQ8mqadycxldbMMh3O1HnocZ6bUVQ%3D%3D)

We won’t be able to save what’s worth saving in this country if we do not first fight for the institution of the family.

Thank you,

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

As a 20-year member of the La Crosse County Board, Tara has proven she has what it takes to transform our communities for the better.

Now, she's kicking off her campaign for Congress because _**she can’t sit on the sidelines while our rights are being taken away**_. Extremist Derrick Van Orden is more concerned with the MAGA agenda than the people he claims to represent, and we must flip this seat in 2024.

Tara is a problem solver. She's ready to use her experience to fight for our rights– _restoring reproductive rights, protecting Social Security and Medicare, improving our public schools, ensuring everyone has a good job, and so much more._

We're building a progressive movement to take back Wisconsin's 3rd congressional district, but to elect Tara, we need your help. **Today, Donald Trump is holding a MAGA rally in Nevada for the _third time this year._**

| | Patriot,

---
When I first established _**THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST**_ all the way back in February, I never imagined I’d actually be writing these words...
---
_But, with the Witch Hunt now headed to the**SUPREME COURT** , the Trust has never been more important in DEFENDING our movement._
---
The sitting president – who is on track to lose in a LANDSLIDE – is turning to the courts to subvert the will of voters and remain in power for 4 more years.
---
**You have my solemn word: I will fight this tyrannical abuse of power with every fiber of my being.**
---
_...The very survival of our Free Republic depends on it._
---
But I will humbly admit that I cannot win this fight all on my own.
---
_That is why I’m asking you, Patriot, at this historic moment, to become a Founding Member of**THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST** to peacefully defend our movement from the endless witch hunts._
---
**_And upon acceptance, you will receive your very own Founding Membership Card as proof of your membership within my inner circle of trusted defenders._**

And upon acceptance, you will receive your very own Founding Membership Card as proof of your membership within my inner circle of trusted defenders. | | | THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST FOUNDING MEMBER: dpwillis67@gmail.com OFFER: Founding Membership (2023-2024) STATUS: PENDING | Thank you, Donald J. # [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75329831/444339789/18334046?refcode=UTS_FR_90DC_231217_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1ODY0OWZmLWVkOWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=S3Oqe51WwXjLTyhOFMYbMmzoBMZ_6jXPaNzo0psRXXU=)
Hey Peter, it's Jacky Rosen.
My faith has _always_ been a core part of my values and my work in the Senate. I'm guided and motivated by the Jewish principle of "Tikkun Olam," which means to repair the world and leave it in a better place than how we found it.
It’s why I ran for office, becoming the first former synagogue president and third Jewish woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. And it’s why I'm proudly fighting to bring positive change to communities in Nevada and across the country. **But right now, I need your help.**
National Republicans are doing everything in their power to flip my seat red: **Mitch McConnell handpicked my opponent to run against me, and he's being propped up by a shady GOP billionaire. Now, polling shows me 2 points down in a race that experts say could decide Senate control.**
_**[I'm relying on your immediate grassroots support to defend this seat so I can keep up the fight for our shared values. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: AIPAC donor urges GOP voters to switch parties to vote against Jamaal Bowman.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

The attacks on progressive incumbent Jamaal Bowman are only getting more
aggressive the closer we get to his June 2024 primary election.

First, we learned AIPAC was recruiting someone to challenge Jamaal. Then,
out-of-touch career politician George Latimer officially announced his
campaign for New York’s 16th congressional district.

Now, an AIPAC donor is actually encouraging Republicans to temporarily
switch their political party registration in order to vote against Jamaal
in the primary:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231217-jb.1pyMvq&refcode=em20231217-32348&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=32348%2E1203867%2E_oMQxP ]The Intercept: AIPAC Donor Urges Jewish Republicans to Switch Parties
to Vote Against Jamaal Bowman in Primary

AIPAC and its right-wing donors will stop at nothing to unseat courageous
progressive champions who are challenging the status-quo and standing up
for human life by demanding a ceasefire. They’d rather someone like
Latimer in power who will support sending weapons and billions of dollars
to Israel, no conditions or questions asked.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231217-jb.1pyMvq&refcode=em20231217-32348&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1002&akid=32348%2E1203867%2E_oMQxP ]We have to fight back NOW. Will you please split a grassroots
contribution of $3 or more to Justice Democrats and
Jamaal’s campaign to help us protect his seat?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231217-jb.1pyMvq&refcode=em20231217-32348&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1021&akid=32348%2E1203867%2E_oMQxP ]Contribute $3

With six months until the New York primary election and hundreds of
millions of dollars at AIPAC’s disposal, there’s no time to waste. We need
a groundswell of people power to re-elect Jamaal and keep him fighting for
the progressive change we deserve.

Thanks for anything you can pitch in to fuel our work,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1022&akid=32348%2E1203867%2E_oMQxP ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1023&akid=32348%2E1203867%2E_oMQxP ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231217-32348-footer&t=1024&refcode2=32348_1203867__oMQxP&akid=32348%2E1203867%2E_oMQxP

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=32348%2E1203867%2E_oMQxP

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com
clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, The attacks on progressive incumbent Jamaal Bowman are only getting more aggressive the closer we get to his June 2024 primary election. First, we learned AIPAC was recruiting someone to challenge Jamaal. Then, out-of-touch career politician George Latimer officially announced his campaign for New York’s 16th congressional district. Now, an AIPAC donor is actually encouraging Republicans to temporarily switch their political party registration in order to vote against Jamaal in the primary: [ ]The Intercept: AIPAC Donor Urges Jewish Republicans to Switch Parties to Vote Against Jamaal Bowman in Primary AIPAC and its right-wing donors will stop at nothing to unseat courageous progressive champions who are challenging the status-quo and standing up for human life by demanding a ceasefire. They’d rather someone like Latimer in power who will support sending weapons and billions of dollars to Israel, no conditions or questions asked. [ ]We have to fight back NOW. Will you please split a grassroots contribution of $3 or more to Justice Democrats and Jamaal’s campaign to help us protect his seat? [ ]Contribute $3 With six months until the New York primary election and hundreds of millions of dollars at AIPAC’s disposal, there’s no time to waste. We need a groundswell of people power to re-elect Jamaal and keep him fighting for the progressive change we deserve. Thanks for anything you can pitch in to fuel our work, Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a ceasefire through [ ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them using [ ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this critical moment. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

subject: The experts were right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
here's what you need to know about my race
| | |
---
Friend, I'm running to defeat Rick Scott — and the results of this election could determine which party controls the Senate. Here's what you need to know about my race:
**_First,_** election analysts from _CNN , FiveThirtyEight_, and _Roll Call_ ranked Rick Scott as one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot in 2024.
**_Then_****,** a new poll showed that the experts were right — this race is already a statistical tie! Floridians are sick and tired of Rick Scott threatening to take away their rights, raising their costs, and trying to end the Social Security and Medicare benefits they’ve worked hard for.
**_Now,_** with grassroots momentum on our side, experts are calling this race Democrats' best chance to expand the Senate majority and stop Mitch McConnell from retaking power. **But I just got news that we're $9,223 short of our FINAL weekly goal before we head into end-of-quarter.**
If we fall short here, it'll be a massive setback. **And Rick Scott, Mitch McConnell, and all their megadonors will undoubtedly weaponize that setback against me when our fundraising numbers become public, for the final quarter of 2023, in just a couple weeks.**

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: An update on where we’re at with student debt cancellation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Warren for Senate: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/370?source=em-header&t=1001&akid=1856%2E4032634%2EqgCHU6

I believe that the Biden
administration should use all its tools to provide relief to as many
Americans as possible.

That’s why I joined my colleagues this week in urging the Secretary of
Education to leverage his existing and full authority under the Higher
Education Act to strengthen the department’s proposed rule for borrowers
to receive relief.

Let’s back up for a second and review where we’re at with student debt
cancellation.

Since the far-right Supreme Court struck down President Biden’s initial
student debt relief plan by claiming that he didn’t have the legal
authority to cancel student debt (he does), President Biden swiftly
implemented two other measures to expedite debt relief for a wide range of
borrowers.

One of those steps is launching a process of negotiated rulemaking to
pursue debt forgiveness under the Higher Education Act. But
after taking a look at the
draft of the rules emerging from this negotiated rulemaking process, I
believe that we could do a lot more.

[ https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-studentdebt/?source=EMZ18E_STU_E_20231217_V1S1&t=1006&akid=1856%2E4032634%2EqgCHU6 ]I’ve proposed the actions below to strengthen the proposed student debt
relief rule. If you agree that the Administration should follow these
steps and provide student debt relief for as many borrowers as possible,
please add your name here — and let’s build strong momentum for these
demands.

[ https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-studentdebt/?source=EMZ18E_STU_E_20231217_V1S1&t=1007&akid=1856%2E4032634%2EqgCHU6 ]ADD YOUR NAME

While I commend the Biden Administration for making strides in this fight,
I believe that their proposal could be strengthened through the following
steps:

* Eliminate all debt that exceeds the original principal balance of the
loan due to runaway interest. Under the current rule, the “Secretary
may waive all or a portion of the amount by which a borrower’s total
outstanding balance exceeds the original principal balance of the
loan.”
* Provide full cancellation, not just a waiver of interest, for those
who have repaid enough to cover their original principal. The draft
rule doesn’t extend relief to borrowers who repaid enough to cover
their original principal.
* Eliminate the sudden cliff that would give full relief to borrowers
whose loans first entered repayment at least 25 years ago, but no
relief to other similar borrowers. The proposed rule would extend
relief only to borrowers who entered repayment 25 years ago or more by
July 1, 2025. However, a borrower who hits the 25-year mark on July 2,
2025 would be ineligible for relief. I believe the Education
Department should remove the cutoff date for borrowers who have been
in repayment for decades, and instead permit them to become eligible
for relief on a rolling basis.
* Extend relief to additional categories of borrowers with financial
hardship and create a general category for unforeseen forms of
hardship. I’m urging the Education Department to expand the
income-based indicators of financial hardship, and use some other
non-income-based indicators.
* Extend relief to borrowers who have been victims of student loan
servicer misconduct or error. The current draft text does not include
protections for borrowers who have faced predatory loan servicer
practices, such as forbearance steering, overcharging, or failing to
enroll borrowers who asked to be placed in IDR plans for which they
were eligible.
* Eliminate the need for borrowers to submit burdensome applications by
basing eligibility for relief on information that the Education
Department already has or that it can acquire from other agencies. The
rule should extend relief to borrowers automatically, without
requiring them to submit applications. The Education Department can
largely base relief on information already in its possession through
payment history databases, Free Application for Federal Student Aid
(FAFSA) applications, and on information from other federal agencies.

I’m passionate about this.
I got my degree from a state school that cost $50 a semester. That
opportunity just isn’t available today — and tens of millions of Americans
are getting crushed by student debt.

[ https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-studentdebt/?source=EMZ18E_STU_E_20231217_V1S1&t=1008&akid=1856%2E4032634%2EqgCHU6 ]If there are opportunities to relieve this burden for them, we need to
take them. If you agree, please add your name here to signal your support
for these amendments, and let’s fight side by side to make this plan as
strong as possible.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

Donate: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1043?t=1011&akid=1856%2E4032634%2EqgCHU6

Facebook: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/365?t=1002&akid=1856%2E4032634%2EqgCHU6
Twitter: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/367?t=1003&akid=1856%2E4032634%2EqgCHU6
Instagram: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/368?t=1004&akid=1856%2E4032634%2EqgCHU6
YouTube: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/369?t=1005&akid=1856%2E4032634%2EqgCHU6

name: Wendy Davis
subject: Where can I even start?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/13292?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20231217-WendyDavis-WendyDavisAllredTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20231217-WendyDavis-WendyDavisAllredTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=12928%2E9716520%2Ej9C_kL)
It's Wendy Davis. Where do I even start?

As we speak, the anti-choice laws engineered by Texas Republicans like Ken Paxton, Greg Abbott, and Dan Patrick and supported by Ted Cruz are forcing women to flee our state to receive needed and emergency health care.

**Nobody deserves the trauma or the _unbearable_ emotional and physical stress that Texas’ abortion ban has wrought.**

I'm outraged by what extremists in our government are putting women through. _They are not reflective of who we are_ – **[and that’s why it's essential that we elect leaders like my friend, Colin Allred, who will defend women's reproductive rights. Can you split a donation between Colin and the DSCC right now to help send Colin to the U.S. Senate and defeat anti-abortion Republicans?](https://go.dscc.org/go/13292?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20231217-WendyDavis-WendyDavisAllredTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20231217-WendyDavis-WendyDavisAllredTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=12928%2E9716520%2Ej9C_kL)**

| | [Donate](https://go.dscc.org/go/13292?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20231217-WendyDavis-WendyDavisAllredTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20231217-WendyDavis-WendyDavisAllredTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=12928%2E9716520%2Ej9C_kL)
---

Decisions around reproductive care are _deeply_ personal and painful. But right now, our failed leaders are endangering pregnant women's health in order to push their extremist agendas and further their political careers.

We deserve better, and that starts with defeating anti-abortion extremists like Ted Cruz and electing leaders – like Colin – with a record of standing up for the dignity and rights of Texas women.

We can't wait any longer to take action, so please: **[Can you split a gift between Colin and the DSCC right now to help Colin, defeat Ted Cruz, and beat anti-abortion Republicans? Together, we can ensure that Texas women are treated with the dignity and respect that we deserve.](https://go.dscc.org/go/13292?amount=5&t=7&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20231217-WendyDavis-WendyDavisAllredTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20231217-WendyDavis-WendyDavisAllredTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=12928%2E9716520%2Ej9C_kL)**

| | Peter, just take a guess at how much money Angela’s self-funding millionaire opponent has spent on advertising so far. He’s already spent **$11 MILLION**. And we still have several _months_ to go before Maryland’s primary. Angela doesn’t have personal wealth to pour into her campaign to run expensive ads to millions of Marylanders. _In fact, we haven’t run a single TV ad yet._ But if her opponent has this kind of cash to throw around before 2024 even begins, we know we’ll face a money landslide in the new year. **But fortunately, elections aren’t won by the highest bidder.** When it comes to grassroots momentum, _we’re the wealthy ones_ – **we know we can count on Angela’s top supporters to help us prepare for this fight.** [**Your contribution will help level this uneven playing field – and ultimately, elect Angela Alsobrooks to the Senate. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: I edited this email, and EVERY email
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Hey there, I wanted to make sure you saw my note from a couple weeks ago about why I write or edit every email I send. The truth is, email fundraising makes up a whole lot of what our campaign raises (online contributions account for about a third of what we raise every quarter!) and it’s important to me that when an email hits your inbox that you know that it is because your support is what will help us win this election.
Our final FEC fundraising deadline is on December 31, which means emails like this from campaigns like mine will (sadly) only become more frequent. [**I don’t like clogging up your inbox, so trust me when I say we only send so much because your support really is a massive help to reaching our goals and helping keep Michigan’s competitive open Senate seat blue.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dec23.ZG_uWI&refcode=em231217-1-tt&t=1&akid=919%2E135344%2E9obL4b)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dec23.ZG_uWI&refcode=em231217-1-tt&t=2&akid=919%2E135344%2E9obL4b)**
Thanks for all the support – it means a lot!
Elissa
\---------- Begin forwarded message ---------
From: Elissa Slotkin
Subject: I edit every email I send
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dec23.ZG_uWI&refcode=em231217-1-tt&t=3&akid=919%2E135344%2E9obL4b)

Team --
I know your inbox is FULL of emails right now from political campaigns and every store you’ve ever shopped at trying to get you to participate in their holiday deals.
Given the glut of emails, I wanted you to know this important point: unlike many political candidates, I write or edit every single email I send you. Including this one. Seriously. Here’s a photo of me editing this email, before it lands in your inbox:
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dec23.ZG_uWI&refcode=em231217-1-tt&t=4&akid=919%2E135344%2E9obL4b)
Why do I write or edit every email? Because I never want our emails to feel like they are scamming, tricking you, or simply repeating what every other candidate sends. I will never use fake deadlines or sky-is-falling tactics. I will, instead, give you the truth, plain and simple, about the stakes of our race and the role your support plays in making sure we win this open Senate seat in Michigan.
In my three previous races, I've gone against corporate-backed GOP opponents and I've won. How? By having strong grassroots support -- from people like you contributing what you can. Contributions of $5 here, $50 there, really are the building blocks for the rest of our campaign.
And the truth is that this Senate race will be one of the most expensive in the country. Michigan is the _only open competitive Senate seat in the country,_ which means millions of dollars of national Republican money will pour into our state to fund the nasty attack ads on TV that we all hate.
[**So when I email you, it’s because contributions from these emails will help determine what our campaign can accomplish over the next year. So if you’re able, your support today would be a massive help.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dec23.ZG_uWI&refcode=em231217-1-tt&t=5&akid=919%2E135344%2E9obL4b)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/128?c0=ebs-em-dec23.JuoF8-&refcode=em231217-1-tt&t=24&akid=919%2E135344%2E9obL4b)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-dec23.4FQez0&refcode=em231217-1-tt&t=25&akid=919%2E135344%2E9obL4b)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-dec23.XsjWsV&refcode=em231217-1-tt&t=26&akid=919%2E135344%2E9obL4b)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-dec23.BggGbr&refcode=em231217-1-tt&t=27&akid=919%2E135344%2E9obL4b)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-dec23.-ustVI&refcode=em231217-1-tt&t=28&akid=919%2E135344%2E9obL4b)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-dec23.qFDyf8&refcode=em231217-1-tt&t=29&akid=919%2E135344%2E9obL4b)**
---
****
Thank you for your continued support. It makes writing these emails worth every line!
Elissa (really!)

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=30&akid=919%2E135344%2E9obL4b).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=31&akid=919%2E135344%2E9obL4b)

name: Matt Dolan
subject: Defeat Sherrod Brown in 2024
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DOLAN FOR OHIO
body:
Help us Get America Back on Track

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Your help is really appreciated.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Know how I know you’re one of my most committed supporters?
#

Peter:
Know how I know you’re one of my most committed supporters?
You’re reading this email. A lot of people support this campaign, and some come in and out. But not everybody sticks with me. You have, and just opening this email and reading to this point is a good sign that you’ve got my back, even if I haven’t convinced you to donate yet.
And that’s good, because I need your help.
Kari Lake is attacking us every day of the week. Kyrsten Sinema is sitting on more than $10 million. And the Republican establishment in Washington are funneling a ton of time and effort into targeting Arizona — because they know if they can defeat us, they can take back the Senate.
Whether or not we’re able to beat them back and hold the Senate comes down to whether we raise the resources we need.
And whether we raise the resources we need comes down to whether or not people chip in to this campaign.
That’s a lot of pressure, I know. I’m feeling it too. But that’s why we need you. It’s why we have to hit our goals ahead of this critical FEC deadline at the end of the year.
If we all come together right here, right now, we can do it. So please:
[**Can you make your first donation to my campaign right now? With hundreds of people pitching in alongside you, it’ll add up fast.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec23.csjDeB&refcode=em231217-1&t=1&akid=1566%2E734936%2Ef9nJ-a)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

name: Katie Porter
subject: Straight to the point!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
When questioning witnesses during congressional hearings, each Member has just a few minutes.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=34924%2E3422442%2EdbR9ZV)
When questioning witnesses during congressional hearings, each Member has just a few minutes. I always try to cut the fluff and get right to the point so I can secure answers for the American people. I’ll do the same in this email!
**Why does donating before the end of the year make a difference?** Our end of quarter deadline falls on December 31st, and after then, we have to publicly report the amount of money we’ve raised the past three months. Pundits, super PACs, and our opponents will look for any signs of weakness in our report. An unimpressive haul could signal we’re falling behind, and encourage super PACs to pour more money into supporting our opponents. On top of that, we’ll be making important budget decisions in January, and if we don’t meet our goal, we’ll be forced to make cuts.
---

**How’s the race looking?** Competitive and really close! Recent public polling shows me slightly trailing Adam Schiff, and has shown the leading Republican in this race gaining some traction. Remember, we need to at least make the top two in March in order to move on to the general in November. With roughly a third of voters undecided, we have a lot of ground to cover.
---

**Does $3 really make a difference?** Yes! Our average contribution this quarter is $21.33. Every single dollar adds up. I’m the only candidate in this race who has never taken corporate PAC money and is rejecting federal lobbyist money, so you can be assured that I really do count on supporters like you.
---
[**Derek, can you pitch in today to help us meet our end of quarter deadline and reach key voters?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231217?refcode=EMAO23_1_QAA_20231217_V1_F&refcode2=34924_3422442_dbR9ZV&akid=34924%2E3422442%2EdbR9ZV)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231217?refcode=EMAO23_1_QAA_20231217_V1_F&refcode2=34924_3422442_dbR9ZV&akid=34924%2E3422442%2EdbR9ZV)
Thanks!
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAO23_1_QAA_20231217_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=34924_3422442_dbR9ZV&akid=34924%2E3422442%2EdbR9ZV)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=34924%2E3422442%2EdbR9ZV)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=34924%2E3422442%2EdbR9ZV)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

Peter, yard signs are a crucial (yet expensive) part of running a winning political campaign. Especially in a state like Alaska, where many rural Alaskans don’t have internet access, yard signs are one of the only ways voters can show their support and get the word out. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75339583/444366251/-132524621?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231217_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzJlM2VhNzItZmI5Yy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=w9RsFObu_MtVS96CFyDoo2GyNu2f_O-XMS_SaZ0noek=) | [DONATE $10 TO COVER THE COST OF YARD SIGNS >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75339584/444366252/-132524621?amount=10&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231217_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzJlM2VhNzItZmI5Yy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=w9RsFObu_MtVS96CFyDoo2GyNu2f_O-XMS_SaZ0noek=)

Last year, yard signs helped me increase my name recognition throughout Alaska, and showed Alaskans that there was real enthusiasm behind my candidacy.
**But here’s something you might not know: Yard signs in Alaska cost way more than they do in the lower 48** , and they often have to be delivered to my supporters by mail.
**Peter, I want my supporters to be able to get the word out about our campaign no matter where they live in Alaska. But without your support, our reach will be limited, and we risk losing this seat to an extremist. **
[_**Will you split a donation of $10 between HER Time and I before midnight to help cover the cost of yard signs and deliveries all throughout Alaska so we can keep fighting for everyone? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75339585/444366253/-132524621?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231217_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzJlM2VhNzItZmI5Yy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=w9RsFObu_MtVS96CFyDoo2GyNu2f_O-XMS_SaZ0noek=)

Peter, I was outraged – but sadly not shocked – when this update came across my phone: Today, almost exactly halfway into my first term in office, I’m doubling down on that commitment. [**I want to make sure to hear from as many of you as possible. That’s why today, I’m asking you to fill out our priorities survey to let me know your thoughts heading into 2024.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlfE27RHrigaS8Y5HCAFF3HMqLwfhiLtODUiK0ZZbkdkc21-rXNsEIDhv5PZ97hLsBVhqB60NyzOeM7qmXWmz1GEswvnTEsgibJz5HFq_03QKXeBzdDr_dSCalyshSHPI2lOA4OEGlPQA0PiDrMVB7oD-ZtgpCc_ZoiPKWssXRqww1xI47qUEKKOycTBZ45UF6MkJfaDMGvRkK5tMx0Y_NMmnF3dly87IaZ3VGf7Dazj5aL2_sFZ7ygMXaOpFIH8nznla7NIDJbfwA3aaj31EWYNFGuY9KUQSZHhGwvIDj3oNEN7BVrDMRr4iqmTnwN4ocR5rrHPh9-UqESx8gY2UX-/427/6EJD4P9LSkGux67CV7XpLw/h1/DSnr1qkiQ3D2NdpdCjj3pdI4o4fyVob_xXeFMref7GQ) There are going to be extremely close races in this district and nationally, with tremendous impact on the fate of our country. Stopping the worst extremism can only happen if we hold this seat and help Democrats keep a chamber in 2024. **What you share with us will have an impact on our plans for next year.** We're hoping to get lots of responses because the more people that weigh in, the better we can understand what's on people’s minds across IL-17 and America. [**I want to make time to hear from you. Please fill out my quick survey letting me know your biggest priorities as we head into the new session of Congress.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlfE27RHrigaS8Y5HCAFF3HMqLwfhiLtODUiK0ZZbkdkc21-rXNsEIDhv5PZ97hLsAKgxegJsZDA_tjB6yi_XlVpM3nLjE50L6OQSJmQbI7-RdABVwrFzjss-_j80zUX2OPBh7qbtXmVOf5V1FMTxvdM0SDjp3EgcKxTx_OvjJXPUiramBNSJ5K8nwRA3N7fQw3_Ipt1Cjs3EZO-WColt2HtkR4tcKY46DzaSvZrcrukqkvMdDBPlKfkHA6izOAz8ckqFHdLQ6QCo8nrdhT5WMDqqPDa_CSsQlEsBOUW_9tIASmDWnT_XFaTKhnOW7LdkH9W9Y4wkMfyrec_xhN5ZRz/427/6EJD4P9LSkGux67CV7XpLw/h2/qb7ztBFsFiRAm6KBAQfluL5Ss-0r16ZQDfdM61T1Ck4)

Since the end of _Roe v. Wade_ , individuals seeking abortion care in states with bans or restrictions have often turned to places like Illinois to exercise their rights. And anti-choice extremists have already been empowered by the Supreme Court’s decision to overturn Roe v. Wade and are trying like Hell to intimidate and harass women hoping to exercise their rights. This week we saw that horrifying abuse of power exercised in Texas against Kate Cox. **Trying to trap women without recourse — even if it cost them their lives.** Not satisfied with the havoc they’ve wreaked, the right-wing majority on the court is going after mifepristone _even in states that allow abortions_ — setting us on the path to a national abortion ban and a new dystopian landscape of laws. **Maintaining this seat is crucial to safeguarding our rights and freedoms, not just in Illinois but in keeping a check on this rogue court legislating from the bench.** [**Will you help me defend IL-17 and push back against the Supreme Court legislating from the bench by chipping in just $5 today?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPNYjaSf0HiRB1luFcP1Zl2QNDFwGHQl7XAgpYungOwajKT5Vs9U9B5EGXTwU29K5CByUgNhtojXcUOie718PYo75-QlBHMBZ9MB44y9gDjhVK8tih9rfA_BA7bkHwxPcVjTiuv94yJeftbLdK0-zh1S7gaqWQdKG6txPuiJlDFlBgHs80YeBBVLkecnDKtondR8wlZa7-t_mKd0i0Cr5Anj6dha4yWFQHwlwLr_LgCh_5lifpIaH2sz243yNUWofNlXfNMoDnyFpZextsspnAyuk3Gvt2Xt-JPKpSLx28QPDzvZHemjeymPj2LXVwxupP64_hvxTr0MK84MhxOtMkSCn8AQgN8TK-aiiLnp25RLf3Znq0okEwwOogxrCLevu6UB7w0X-AHGVfxY4yr6tR7GnNp3Whx8jaWxTjOzCX7oU/427/6EJD4P9LSkGux67CV7XpLw/h3/epfcbVImC-dyWi0fETEV7LLKuQa0NgxGVcEGWQR6v-U)

Protecting the right to an abortion and making sure all women have access to full reproductive care is a top priority. I want to ensure we can codify _Roe v. Wade_ back into law, and I absolutely will not stand for any attempts to make these injustices any harder on women seeking to exercise a fundamental right. The federal government and the courts have no business in your healthcare decisions. And I will never accept a country where women are forced to carry pregnancies against their will. **A blue Congress next cycle would go a long way toward checking the Supreme Court’s power. And the first step toward flipping the House blue is defending key swing districts like IL-17.** [**Will you pitch in $5 or any amount you can spare to ensure that IL-17 stays blue and Illinois remains a sanctuary for those seeking abortion care?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPNYjaSf0HiRB1luFcP1Zl2QNDFwGHQl7XAgpYungOwajKT5Vs9U9B5EGXTwU29K5CByUgNhtojXcUOie718PYo75-QlBHMBZ9MB44y9gDjhWMLac-mr1FM9pMkY8Wa1ttWFr6-CDPadGXgH-_TiyZjZCWVPp5C3Dc-yZBD-gzfPryXNgJUq8Xh-52wK4S3clbfrulx6s0euXWfh04siweZOIp2bey9id7xYq2ti1Cv3J77894yRxf0XWwrq3UEmzo_hh2S57pmjCsc2aBAnAyLTPxUFAS-SL3WiBtUjc_XcjraViaUpt5BqzMwL9L7rNCxzC6wWfCpMoanEZQazNZkBD1FQrbW-upKaR3m0DZZ1G9Ck8ptSYE9hXT-TApPo2M3L8xnwU0oRqHj3PrtIpD3QxVOtheZGyZWw_ylkBVIq8/427/6EJD4P9LSkGux67CV7XpLw/h5/g38Mj3Naowv0G9cJ_3cbF4480Oiwb1f5z810x3Qsbl8) Thank you,
\- Eric

clean_body: | | | Peter, I was outraged – but sadly not shocked – when this update came across my phone: Today, almost exactly halfway into my first term in office, I’m doubling down on that commitment. There are going to be extremely close races in this district and nationally, with tremendous impact on the fate of our country. Stopping the worst extremism can only happen if we hold this seat and help Democrats keep a chamber in 2024. What you share with us will have an impact on our plans for next year. We're hoping to get lots of responses because the more people that weigh in, the better we can understand what's on people’s minds across IL-17 and America. Since the end of Roe v. Wade , individuals seeking abortion care in states with bans or restrictions have often turned to places like Illinois to exercise their rights. And anti-choice extremists have already been empowered by the Supreme Court’s decision to overturn Roe v. Wade and are trying like Hell to intimidate and harass women hoping to exercise their rights. This week we saw that horrifying abuse of power exercised in Texas against Kate Cox. Trying to trap women without recourse — even if it cost them their lives. Not satisfied with the havoc they’ve wreaked, the right-wing majority on the court is going after mifepristone even in states that allow abortions — setting us on the path to a national abortion ban and a new dystopian landscape of laws. Maintaining this seat is crucial to safeguarding our rights and freedoms, not just in Illinois but in keeping a check on this rogue court legislating from the bench. Protecting the right to an abortion and making sure all women have access to full reproductive care is a top priority. I want to ensure we can codify Roe v. Wade back into law, and I absolutely will not stand for any attempts to make these injustices any harder on women seeking to exercise a fundamental right. The federal government and the courts have no business in your healthcare decisions. And I will never accept a country where women are forced to carry pregnancies against their will. A blue Congress next cycle would go a long way toward checking the Supreme Court’s power. And the first step toward flipping the House blue is defending key swing districts like IL-17. Thank you, \- Eric If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:____ | ** | ---|--- | | ** | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States | | Sent via . body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75340622/444368785/-248329306?refcode=em-12.17.23-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTcxZDhjYy1mZDljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAji2el24haJMQoUxreo7r9Pu9lPW87ZEJKRDzEvh6s=) Hi there - Wisconsin Secretary of State Sarah Godlewski here. After the results of the 2020 election were tallied and it was clear President Biden won, ten Republicans in Wisconsin chose to ignore the will of the people. Instead, they posed as fake electors for President Trump. **This was fraud, folks. Plain and simple. ** In fact, these ten Republicans just settled a lawsuit admitting their actions were “part of an attempt to improperly overturn the 2020 presidential election results.” The fake electors plot may have been foiled, but the danger from these anti-democracy extremists still lurks: one of these fake electors, Robert Spindell, currently serves on the Wisconsin Elections Commission. Spindell’s actions are all part of a larger, coordinated effort to overturn the will of the people – and they can’t go unchecked. **That’s why I’m calling for his immediate resignation from the Wisconsin Elections Commission. ** While we work to remove bad actors like Spindell who put our democracy at risk, Democrats are focused on the work of protecting free and fair elections in Wisconsin and beyond. My friends at the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State are gearing up for the long fight ahead, but they need the support from grassroots Democrats like you.
