subject: Republicans are ATTACKING libraries!
body:
Libraries across the country are under attack.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75341777/444372479/-1734779286?refcode=12-17-23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkMWVjYjlkLWZmOWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=84j_odwy2fl4Sn0XDodLhum1nr3A5o6qbJRFZAnNNkg=)
---
| | Friend, Libraries across the country are under attack. Republican representatives have called them “liberal grooming centers” and have suggested replacing them with church-owned alternatives. The GOP is so desperate for an enemy that they’re now villainizing libraries and librarians. Let that sink in. Instead of focusing on the well-being of their constituents, Republicans are trying to cancel the public library system. **[This is ridiculous and a complete waste of time. Public libraries are crucial pillars of our communities and we won’t let Republican lawmakers get rid of them. Can you chip in $10 so we can keep up our work and expose their lies and protect our libraries and our democracy?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75341779/444372480/-1734779286?refcode=12-17-23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkMWVjYjlkLWZmOWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=84j_odwy2fl4Sn0XDodLhum1nr3A5o6qbJRFZAnNNkg=)** If the GOP gets their way, librarians could face jail time for allowing kids to read books. Of all the people to try and villainize, Republicans are choosing librarians, who only want to help educate the public. **[There’s no way you support this witch-hunt against librarians because it is absolutely ridiculous. If you want to stop the GOP’s crusade against our public libraries, contribute $10 so we can keep working to fight back against the corrupt Republicans attacking libraries and our most important public square, our democracy. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75341781/444372482/-1734779286?refcode=12-17-23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkMWVjYjlkLWZmOWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=84j_odwy2fl4Sn0XDodLhum1nr3A5o6qbJRFZAnNNkg=)** The GOP could be focusing their attacks on any number of issues, like Congressional corruption or attacks on our democracy, but instead they’re harassing librarians. It’s shameful and it needs to stop. **[If you agree that the GOP’s witch-hunt against librarians is a waste of time and resources, chip in $10 today so we can work to protect libraries from corrupt Republicans across the country.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75341783/444372484/-1734779286?refcode=12-17-23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkMWVjYjlkLWZmOWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=84j_odwy2fl4Sn0XDodLhum1nr3A5o6qbJRFZAnNNkg=)** Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action

# # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # | | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=b4963744ba134770b7492f5b60d588ca&_e=7XcweQU76AXyK3gB0pbIP3GThIPSYrb2tk4GsNpgFXCe0x_N5mv-mtADCoYZmu2Y4vr8vmR71XlX-hErkXIgJUXN3waOcfZ48Dow-2VJxXM-2vZnLV7NGyXuqvtkFOzRpXZ9CLh8-IBdRXYwK7bLDF0XcE5repkUjEnii57t8HsGvPOBi-VkZ_VOTXi7A54cAvM6Si8tFJpKB2Uzciwf045s2HIOsxaK-93Z8cgjeBKgAemXYN-eOBPYZzBUHsra0WIidMhuYr9nyN8LQYCx2e6Faywy-FlJn-xZDPsOMzvYbvGc5K_rYDSZfeMVRxrr52qP5Qs8Ruf_SNq07aLtacw7poASUuHYP5kux31q_h5-sp3GGeOHV79SFKufIGUnwERVxRnTVDLZlCpcl7NUCJRjKBoHKI1RyOkIvjWVwdPfKncPPmNFjXx08Q5oKVbbKo1BXJuK_NgOMOOhKlTS4rwkNb4FdsnO9VWe82-_YZRSADb2tDdUJTB0OSne_X5X)
---
| | Patriot,

---
According to a Senior DC Law Enforcement Official, the Biden Department of Justice has been diverting extra FBI special agents to go after me, my staff, and my supporters.
---
**These agents have been “REASSIGNED” from special task forces that crack down on __terrorism__ and __child exploitation__.**
---
Welcome to Biden’s America!
---
In the eyes of Crooked Joe and his Department of “Justice,” a political outsider who wants to drain the swamp, put “America First,” and make our country great again is more dangerous than terrorists and sick individuals who exploit children.
---
If these are the decisions being made by the Department of Justice, it’s no wonder our country is FAILING right now.
---
Very soon, your favorite President will be back in the White House to root out these sinister forces in Washington, restore justice, secure the border, fix our economy, protect our rights, and, very simply, Make America Great Again!
---
**But right now, Crooked Joe’s rotten-to-the-core Department of Justice is asking the Supreme Court to INTERVENE in the 2024 election to remain in power.**
---
**_The Supreme Court has given us a 12/20 deadline to issue our response_ ... _I trust you know that your support has never been more critical._**
---

clean_body: # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # | | | | | Patriot, According to a Senior DC Law Enforcement Official, the Biden Department of Justice has been diverting extra FBI special agents to go after me, my staff, and my supporters. These agents have been “REASSIGNED” from special task forces that crack down on terrorism and child exploitation. Welcome to Biden’s America! In the eyes of Crooked Joe and his Department of “Justice,” a political outsider who wants to drain the swamp, put “America First,” and make our country great again is more dangerous than terrorists and sick individuals who exploit children. If these are the decisions being made by the Department of Justice, it’s no wonder our country is FAILING right now. Very soon, your favorite President will be back in the White House to root out these sinister forces in Washington, restore justice, secure the border, fix our economy, protect our rights, and, very simply, Make America Great Again! But right now, Crooked Joe’s rotten-to-the-core Department of Justice is asking the Supreme Court to INTERVENE in the 2024 election to remain in power. The Supreme Court has given us a 12/20 deadline to issue our response ... I trust you know that your support has never been more critical. Of course, if you are doing poorly right now due to the very corrupt people in charge of our country who are actively working against our hardworking and decent citizens, please do not even think about making a contribution at this time. I mean it! | | Thank you, Donald J. name: Wendy Davis
subject: No woman deserves this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
Friend, it’s Wendy Davis. Where do I even start?
The anti-choice laws engineered by Texas Republicans like Ken Paxton, Greg Abbott, and Dan Patrick and supported by Ted Cruz are forcing women to flee our state to receive needed and emergency health care.
**Nobody deserves the trauma or the _unbearable_ emotional and physical stress that Texas’ abortion ban has wrought.**
I’m outraged by what extremists in our government are putting women through. _They are not reflective of who we are_ – [**and that’s why it’s essential that we elect leaders like my friend, Colin Allred, who will defend women’s reproductive rights. Can you split a donation between Colin Allred and The Long Run right now to help send Colin to the U.S. Senate?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.fIsyEE&refcode=em231217-1-t2&t=1&akid=5079%2E196590%2EceUjpd)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.fIsyEE&refcode=em231217-1-t2&t=2&akid=5079%2E196590%2EceUjpd)
Decisions around reproductive care are _deeply_ personal and painful. But right now, our failed leaders are endangering pregnant women’s health in order to push their extremist agendas and further their political careers.
We deserve better, and that starts with defeating anti-abortion extremists like Ted Cruz and electing leaders – like Colin – with a record of standing up for the dignity and rights of Texas women.
**[We can’t wait any longer to take action, so please: Can you split a gift between Colin and The Long Run right now to help Colin defeat Ted Cruz? Together, we can ensure that Texas women are treated with the dignity and respect that we deserve.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.fIsyEE&refcode=em231217-1-t2&t=3&akid=5079%2E196590%2EceUjpd)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Colin Allred and The Long Run immediately:_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.DOalXw&amount=5&refcode=em231217-1-t2&t=22&akid=5079%2E196590%2EceUjpd)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.b8lq5e&refcode=em231217-1-t2&t=23&akid=5079%2E196590%2EceUjpd)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.L4odF1&refcode=em231217-1-t2&t=24&akid=5079%2E196590%2EceUjpd)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.t95SKi&refcode=em231217-1-t2&t=25&akid=5079%2E196590%2EceUjpd)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.1D4yMD&refcode=em231217-1-t2&t=26&akid=5079%2E196590%2EceUjpd)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.fIsyEE&refcode=em231217-1-t2&t=27&akid=5079%2E196590%2EceUjpd)
Thank you,
Wendy Davis

We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=5079%2E196590%2EceUjpd). name: Ritchie Torres
subject: I’ve never seen anything like this, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
It's almost unbelievable.

| **Peter, I’ll be honest with you:** In all my years of public service, I’ve never seen as much dysfunction, incompetence and extremism as I have with House Republicans of the 118th Congress.

__In 2023 alone, they have:__
* Led our government to the brink of a shutdown... _multiple times._

* Ousted a sitting Speaker of the House for the first time in history — from THEIR OWN party!

* Led an impeachment inquiry against President Biden with no factual evidence.

This isn’t just about a small group of far-right extremists with political agendas anymore, Peter — **the entire GOP is taking demands from Donald Trump, and undermining our democracy in the process.**

The fight against their extremism and obstruction can only go so far if I’m fighting it alone, Peter – _and we know how crucial it is for us to stop them._ **[That’s why I need to hear from you: Do you approve of House Republicans?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75342425/444375061/2001466651?refcode=RTFC_20231217_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGI3ZDRmZC0wMTlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wbvtmk-tEcc0O65vpLYY7_huVQ9X-E1oUKPT2n6Ungc=&emci=515589e6-829b-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=98b7d4fd-019d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=34594689)** | [NO, ABSOLUTELY NOT »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75342426/444375062/2001466651?refcode=RTFC_20231217_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGI3ZDRmZC0wMTlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wbvtmk-tEcc0O65vpLYY7_huVQ9X-E1oUKPT2n6Ungc=&emci=515589e6-829b-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=98b7d4fd-019d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=34594689)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

clean_body: It's almost unbelievable. | Peter, I’ll be honest with you: In all my years of public service, I’ve never seen as much dysfunction, incompetence and extremism as I have with House Republicans of the 118th Congress. In 2023 alone, they have: Led our government to the brink of a shutdown... multiple times. Ousted a sitting Speaker of the House for the first time in history — from THEIR OWN party! Led an impeachment inquiry against President Biden with no factual evidence. This isn’t just about a small group of far-right extremists with political agendas anymore, Peter — the entire GOP is taking demands from Donald Trump, and undermining our democracy in the process. The fight against their extremism and obstruction can only go so far if I’m fighting it alone, Peter – and we know how crucial it is for us to stop them. | My data team tells me I need 5,000 responses for significant results – please respond so we can get accurate data. Thank you, Ritchie | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. name: LucasKunce.com
subject: We’re counting on everyday people like you to power this campaign forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Will you personally endorse Lucas Kunce today?
#
Peter — we’re coming to you today with an important ask:
**[Will you personally endorse Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20231217_endorse-lucas?t=1&akid=4405%2E614464%2EoVeeo8)**
Since January, Lucas has assembled a record-breaking coalition to defeat Josh Hawley and take Missouri’s Senate seat back for working people.
He united Missouri’s election-winning labor movement behind our campaign, earning historically early support from the Missouri AFL-CIO, Missouri Fire Fighters, and dozens of other union locals across the state.
He put our Senate race on the map, pulling in critical endorsements from national organizations like Social Security Works and League of Conservation Voters.
And just last week, Jason Kander, the veteran and Democrat who nearly flipped Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat in one of the closest elections of the 2016 cycle, officially threw his support behind Lucas in the race against Josh Hawley.
Our momentum has never been stronger. But ultimately, we’re counting on everyday people like you to power this campaign forward, defeat Josh Hawley, and elect Lucas Kunce next November.
**So now, we’re coming directly to you to ask:[will you join the workers, leaders, and national organizations supporting Lucas Kunce in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race by adding your personal endorsement today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20231217_endorse-lucas?t=2&akid=4405%2E614464%2EoVeeo8)**
**[ENDORSE LUCAS KUNCE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20231217_endorse-lucas?t=3&akid=4405%2E614464%2EoVeeo8)**
Together, we’re building a powerful grassroots movement to take back power from corrupt, cowardly politicians like Josh Hawley and finally put real working people in charge of our country.
Thanks for all your support, Peter.
Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20231217-4405-footer&t=4&refcode2=4405_614464_oVeeo8&akid=4405%2E614464%2EoVeeo8)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=4405%2E614464%2EoVeeo8). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I don’t even send you the *really* crazy stuff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Our democracy is in crisis. I’ve been saying it for years. And we can’t give up fighting for it, because that’s exactly what these MAGA extremists are counting on.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4778%2E5257348%2ElBel4c)
Hi Derek — Before I ask you to **[pitch in to my campaign ahead of our FEC deadline at the end of the month](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231217_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4778%2E5257348%2ElBel4c)** , I want to explain why this deadline is so important.
We’re just weeks away from the GOP’s Iowa Caucus.
As we speak, Donald Trump is dominating the GOP primary field by an average of 47.5 points. _It’s not even close, and hardly any of them have the guts to stand up to him directly and do anything about it_.
**But I have** — and I will again, if I must.
If Trump steamrolls the primary field on his way to the nomination, we may have a Republican nominee convicted of felonies, who cannot even vote for himself.
And we would be dangerously wrong to think that he can’t possibly win.
Our democracy is in crisis. I’ve been saying it for years. **And we can’t give up fighting for it, because that’s exactly what these MAGA extremists are counting on.**
**That’s why this deadline is so important.** It’s our last one before the FEC quarter comes to a close and we begin making our final arguments to the people of California to win this U.S. Senate primary.
And it’s the last chance to build up our defenses before Donald Trump becomes the Republican nominee in all but name and puts me squarely in the crosshairs of his presidential campaign’s attacks.
**[With this in mind, I’m personally asking you to pitch in $3 or anything you can spare ahead of our upcoming deadline.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231217_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=5&akid=4778%2E5257348%2ElBel4c)**

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/wy6tBRGZhsYaYEfJBeGktg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnYdnkP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYXZpZC1ob3Jvd2l0ei1mcmVlZG9tLWNlbnRlci9kZDMwZDdhMS0yOTI1LTRmZGEtOWY1Zi1hNWExZjA0OTg1NTA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMxMjE3X0JER19ESEZDX09CRTJfUkVOX1BBLUFGUlcDc3BjQgplfAo0f2V14YqeUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/wy6tBRGZhsYaYEfJBeGktg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnYdnkP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYXZpZC1ob3Jvd2l0ei1mcmVlZG9tLWNlbnRlci9kZDMwZDdhMS0yOTI1LTRmZGEtOWY1Zi1hNWExZjA0OTg1NTA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMxMjE3X0JER19ESEZDX09CRTJfUkVOX1BBLUFGUlcDc3BjQgplfAo0f2V14YqeUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** The Left is at war with America. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.

name: South Bay CRA
subject: Christmas Outreach LA
body:
Tonights Christmas Party Last Nights Party Please read below for our Christmas Outreach Last night, the South Bay Republican Assembly gathered for
| |
---
|
---
# Tonights Christmas Party
---
---
|
---
# Last Nights Party
**Please read below for our Christmas Outreach**
Last night, the South Bay Republican Assembly gathered for an unforgettable Christmas Party, where the spirit of the season blended with the enthusiasm of like-minded individuals. Festive decorations, spirited conversations, and a shared commitment to values created a joyous atmosphere, allowing attendees to revel in the moment. The event not only showcased the unity and camaraderie within the South Bay Republican Assembly but also marked a memorable celebration that underscored the strength of community and the warmth of the holiday season.
The evening reached its pinnacle with the surprise presentation of two prestigious awards for Republican of the Year. I was honored to receive one of these awards from our own board in the SBCRA, and the other went to an exceptional woman in the South Bay, Janice Webb, the Chair of the 66th Assembly Central Committee. As the room filled with anticipation, the deserving winners were recognized for their outstanding dedication, leadership, and contributions to the principles upheld by the South Bay Republican Assembly. These awards not only celebrated individual accomplishments but also served as a testament to the collective strength and commitment of the assembly's members to making a positive impact in their community.
The Christmas Party was more than just a festive gathering; it was a moment to honor excellence and inspire continued dedication to the Republican values that bind the South Bay community together.
Nena Gates
# Outreach
'Tis that time once more! We're embarking on our Christmas outreach initiative and gearing up to spread joy to those in need. The support from this community has been nothing short of incredible over the past two years, significantly contributing to the success of our outreach efforts. Last year, with your help, we were able to bring smiles to the faces of over 150 needy families through thoughtful gift-giving. This year, my hope is to double that impact.
Here's what we're on the lookout for:
For Kids:
New Clothes, Shoes, and Toys
Toddlers (boys and girls, 2-5 years old)
6-12 years old (boys and girls)
13-18 years old (boys and girls)
For Newborns:
Diapers
New This Year - Young Adults:
Items for young men and women
Example: Shoes, Clothes, Makeup, Cologne, Perfume, Electronics
For Parents:
Gift cards for necessities
Food
Groceries
Gas
Shopping
Your generosity has the power to make a significant difference in the lives of those less fortunate. Let's join forces once again and make this Christmas season even more special for our community. Together, we can extend the spirit of giving and bring warmth to the hearts of many.
Thank you for your continued support and compassion.
You can give at these links
[Give at paypal at this link Paypal.me/derrickgates](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/4872?id=55835.93.1.714f36f5b285e0e60084f2e6c2e28153)
Cash App $derrickgatesmin
Venmo @Derrick-Gates-4tes below.
|
---
|
---
## My Husband Derrick Gates is running for Central Committee
---
Dear friends and fellow Conservatives, I am thrilled to announce that I am running for an official seat on the 66th Assembly District Central Committee. As some of you may know, I have been serving as an alternate on the committee for some time now. Over the past two years, I have also been actively involved in multiple posts within the party. I am proud to have been elected to the California Republican Assembly state board of directors as the Senate director for the 24th District, chaired the Faith Outreach committee for the CRA, and served as a delegate for the California State Party. These experiences have given me a deep understanding of the values and principles that are important to our party and have prepared me to effectively represent our district on the central committee. As a member of the central committee, I will work tirelessly to ensure that conservative values remain at the forefront of our party's agenda. I believe that my position on the LAGOP, which is the largest Republican party office in the nation, will allow me to have a greater impact on decisions that affect our party and our community. I have already been able to influence many decisions as an alternate, and I am confident that I can make an even greater impact as an elected member. While some have urged me to run for the congressional seat of the 36th district, I believe that my calling is to bring balance to the party for the next few years. This will not only benefit the party but also other candidates and myself in the long run. Federal races can be expensive to operate, and I have learned from my previous run for Congress that it takes time to build relationships and secure the support needed to win. My goal is to help fix the foundation of the party while building relationships with those who can help me in the future. I am asking for your prayers and support as I take this important step on my journey. Please look for me on the primary ballot on March 5, 2024. Early voting begins on February 24, 2024. Your vote for me, Derrick R. Gates, for the 66th Assembly Central Committee, will help ensure that our conservative values continue to be represented in our district and beyond. Thank you for your support and dedication to our party. Sincerely,
Derrick R. Gates
[Click for officialderrickgates.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/4872?id=55835.94.1.e17bfd90b25b0891d8ebb7e357cb8c4d)
---
|
---
|
---

After two weeks of negotiations in the United Arab Emirates, world leaders celebrated a [historic agreement](https://substack.com/redirect/bbe74937-34a5-4aa3-93c5-df270e16b535?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at the COP28 Summit last Wednesday. For the first time, a global agreement addresses the need to ramp down fossil fuel extraction and consumption--while ignoring enforceable targets, historical [failures](https://substack.com/redirect/9fcc8d86-a860-4a39-bfb1-9c40934a37bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to meet ambitious climate goals, and a series of elephants in the proverbial room that a national hero tried to warn us about before he was assassinated 60 years ago.
Want to help your friends stay informed? This post is public and free, so share it with them!
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=139844404&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM5ODQ0NDA0LCJpYXQiOjE3MDI4MzYyNDMsImV4cCI6MTcwNTQyODI0MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.-KYp9qRXDymJ3POLsjnjAiwLYnoNmN2RZOylHsrMuNY)
[R]ich countries claim to care about climate chaos, but not enough to do much about it. The COP 28 agreement reflects essentially no progress from that problematic baseline.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fb8b1dd7-cf62-403c-82fa-30211d2ab104?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Image: [Midia NINJA](https://substack.com/redirect/9413a842-3601-40f0-b4b6-2d6ad96b20e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), licensed through Creative Commons
### **The first hole in the bucket: enforceability**
The COP28 agreement reflects an ambitious vision. In particular, it is being widely celebrated because it arguably represents the emergence of a long overdue global consensus on two related points. First, it aims to invite a future based on renewable energy. As a corollary, it envisions "transitioning away" from non-renewable sources like fossil fuels, whose consumption has [shifted](https://substack.com/redirect/6ef56685-cf67-4b3e-a3c6-fa2659dc859f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the global climate beyond the ranges that human societies have experienced before.
Remarkably, in the 30 years that the United Nations has hosted climate talks, the new COP28 agreement is [the first time](https://substack.com/redirect/4f9acb5c-f428-42e0-acc4-5ca7569705da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that a final decision text has ever merely referenced fossil fuels.
But while the vision of the agreement is worthwhile, the agreement itself offers [few concrete or enforceable steps](https://substack.com/redirect/ae211673-dec7-4ecb-b390-2f60ce37ff8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) towards it. For instance, leaders announced [$400 million in commitments](https://substack.com/redirect/d59a6a0c-7cad-44d2-ae1e-a43f7514754d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to a fund to help offset the cost of climate disasters in developing countries, but that is ultimately merely a drop in the bucket addressing the impacts of climate chaos while doing little to stem its sources.
Similarly, the new agreement envisions "Tripling renewable energy capacity globally and doubling the global average annual rate of energy efficiency improvements by 2030," but it leaves those goals [unspecified](https://substack.com/redirect/1ae8ecfc-7a85-43bc-8cf2-b906ecc2c788?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at the insistence of countries including China and India. By allowing countries to contrive any convenient baseline for measurement of future progress, the agreement's text effectively invites its own subversion.
It also reflects an optimistic [belief](https://substack.com/redirect/c27369f8-1fca-4bca-a6c6-259570eed0ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in technology that the climate catastrophe has already exposed as ultimately fraudulent. For instance, the agreement calls for "Accelerating zero- and low-emission technologies, including...nuclear, abatement and removal technologies such as carbon capture and utilisation and storage...."
But there is no technology that can make continued reliance on fossil fuels sustainable, while history [suggests](https://substack.com/redirect/88ad217d-e363-43fe-a3b2-987769c8f327?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that technological progress often comes at the cost of marginalized communities whose [inclusion](https://substack.com/redirect/a3f7f84d-8d55-4606-9745-eb2ac2440b80?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in a sustainable future is critical to achieving it.
Proponents of technological solutions to climate catastrophe dream of a breakthrough, but relying on one to emerge is the equivalent on betting the future of human civilization on a horse race.
Finally, the agreement invites an expansion in extraction of some fossil fuels, "recogni[zing] that transitional fuels can play a role in facilitating the energy transition while ensuring energy security." In particular, liquified natural gas (LNG) burns more cleanly than other forms of fossil fuels, but it remains problematic. It may even be [worse](https://substack.com/redirect/1ae8ecfc-7a85-43bc-8cf2-b906ecc2c788?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) than other fossil fuels due to methane leaks associated with the fracking increasingly necessary to extract LNG. These are just some of the reasons why insightful critics have described the COP28 agreement as "riddled with [cavernous loopholes](https://substack.com/redirect/c501a5f0-a5ca-4598-8575-4359a65eec44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for [the] fossil fuel industry."

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..h63jx3jSe_FPG3zDqHGZqwrLJeRdciiRWLgk4_N307Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=139844404)
While the COP28 agreement does reflect theoretical progress, much more must be done to keep fossil fuels and other nonrenewable resources in the ground. To celebrate the text merely because it recognizes for the first time that fossil fuels are problematic is charitably, and requires ignoring the [accelerating](https://substack.com/redirect/95b8bd44-fcb0-4252-b0d3-5306c750cd47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) nature of the contemporary climate crisis.
### **A second hole in the bucket: capitalism**
Developing countries have for decades [observed](https://substack.com/redirect/7f3fb099-ec34-49d0-9154-d171e5645a1b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that the rules of the international trading system are effectively rigged, forcing developing countries to offer natural resources to international buyers through markets dominated and skewed by rich countries and institutional investors from them.
Meanwhile, many practices that drive climate chaos, like burning wood or dung for household heating, are driven by [poverty](https://substack.com/redirect/455643d1-b053-4eae-a9a1-ec3a329bcfbe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and economic inequality. In other words, rich countries claim to care about climate chaos, but not enough to do much about it. The COP 28 agreement reflects essentially no progress from that problematic baseline.
Until rich countries meaningfully invest in developing countries to offer alternative pathways to development that do not rely on the extraction of natural resources, their concerns about climate chaos remain disingenuous. That was one reason that the new loss and damage fund for vulnerable countries is so important.
But international funds to help developing countries recover from climate-related natural disasters do nothing to help stem the tide of greenhouses gasses. They help ameliorate impacts, but do nothing to address root causes.
Addressing root causes would require foreign direct investment in development countries in order to offer alternative development pathways that do not rely on extracting natural resources. Supporting democratic restraints on market-driven rapacity would also help.
But rather than support sustainable development or meaningful democracy in the global South, wealthy countries have instead done everything possible to impede it.
American support for former Brazilian president Jair Bolsanaro provides an apt example. A notorious autocrat fairly described as [the Donald Trump of Brazil](https://substack.com/redirect/06db5df9-5f7f-4c12-94da-b585c9a1a06d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), he oversaw a massive [expansion](https://substack.com/redirect/0cd3a948-21a6-4b0a-89de-0727964c500a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of deforestation in the Amazon, undermining the capacity of the region to sequester carbon precisely because he respected neither public nor global opinion until he was removed from office.
The connection between climate chaos and capitalism is an inconvenient truth that the COP 28 agreement continues to ignore.
### **A third hole in the bucket: militarism**
It's striking that the COP28 agreement was negotiated in the midst of an [ongoing genocide](https://substack.com/redirect/f6e89eae-c769-4c81-beea-e73a08e42ae0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Gaza to which both Washington and Tel Aviv remain committed, despite a [global uprising](https://substack.com/redirect/69409472-880a-40db-9879-54b814dadaa2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Even attempts within rich countries to organize mass work stoppage have proven insufficiently influential, although they have proceeded [without](https://substack.com/redirect/c6d69cae-2a51-4c17-96e6-59984caa9558?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the critical support of organized labor or leaders challenged to remember the meaning of solidarity.
On the one hand, discussions about military aggression and international human rights are usually shorn from those about climate chaos. Yet each of these spheres critically influence each other.
The Pentagon is our planet's [largest](https://substack.com/redirect/e8ae15e2-699e-43d5-a060-207dd78a638b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) institutional source of carbon pollution. The amount of petroleum on which the military industrial complex relies is staggering. A single fighter jet can consume up to [385 gallons of jet fuel per minute](https://substack.com/redirect/fc58c112-344a-4018-b42c-32b72141d462?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). But the Pentagon's rapacious consumption doesn't convey even a fraction of how militarism forces climate catastrophe.
Washington's international belligerence has directly contributed to historic releases of greenhouse gasses, while editors of major newspapers have joined policymakers in [a continuing cover up](https://substack.com/redirect/98c70ef1-e298-4599-bb4e-493691029528?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) surrounding the latest example.
The ecocide inherent in the use of defoliant [Agent Orange](https://substack.com/redirect/dd1022e9-7a48-491d-ad59-69f7cdfbe8b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) across southeast Asia during the war on Vietnam offers an earlier example of this pattern. Interestingly, the investigative journalist who exposed the worst human rights abuses by the US military in Vietnam, Seymour Hersh, is the very same writer who more recently documented [Washington's attack on the Nordstream pipeline](https://substack.com/redirect/f79bbb1e-e5e6-4ade-b55f-0d3c841e6f83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) last year.
Hersh has done [more than any living writer](https://substack.com/redirect/c27c7e53-48dc-4a92-8e22-74c3ea51c9e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to expose crimes and coverups by the American "defense" establishment, yet co-opted editors at major newspapers across the United States continue to [ignore](https://substack.com/redirect/eefb63d2-9fc6-4352-a6ae-e96b0011defb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) his findings, deferring to Pentagon sources who have lied on the record repeatedly about everything from torture to weapons of mass destruction.
This is one way that disinformation attains the status of official narrative. It reflects gaslighting on a mass scale, not unlike the claim across Washington that Pax Americana represents a "[rules based order](https://substack.com/redirect/e8295312-1d25-4744-9319-dafda13674de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" when the reality is both more straightforward, and unfortunately, seemingly timeless: "might makes right."
But the Pentagon's engineering of climate chaos stretches far beyond its ecocidal actions and relentless consumption of fossil fuels. No one in Washington has been willing to publicly observe how the military industrial complex has deployed its formidable resources over and over again to force natural resources onto global markets over the objections of local governments.
Few Americans remember the origin story of U.S. relations with Iran, or why Washington has been existentially opposed to the government of one of the planet's most ancient civilizations for the past 50 years.
The saga begins in 1953, when a [democratically elected](https://substack.com/redirect/c9aa593a-0aa0-4992-9db8-8c3e96facac4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Iranian president tried to [nationalize the country's oil and gas reserves](https://substack.com/redirect/59420204-e2e1-45c3-a16a-bc29010ed1fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), taking them off the international market to avoid economic predation by the west. The response was one among any number of [CIA interventions](https://substack.com/redirect/5fbdb85f-cfa0-43e3-9ac0-87d8629e94d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), removing the democratically elected leader, and putting in place a brutal dictator whose abuses then inspired a revolution in 1979 eventually co-opted by right wing theocrats.
Few histories better represent the absurdly prolific incompetence of the Washington policy establishment, or its hateful contributions to a species-wide calamity that will only continue to grow worse in the future.
While the CIA's intervention in Iran presents the most direct example of how militarism has fueled climate catastrophe, it is far from the only one. Each of the [dozens](https://substack.com/redirect/85194feb-45ed-489b-bdf5-0ee42ab4762b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of CIA "interventions" across the world to deny democracy in the service of enabling capitalism fit this unfortunately sordid--and continuing--pattern.
Paid subscribers can access a further section describing how Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. forecast the climate crisis, and warned an unfortunately ignorant country about how to stop it long before most observers realized the crisis was at hand. Even his most ardent supporters tend to downplay the prescience and profundity of Dr. King's legacy, which stretches far beyond the [unsuccessful struggles for civil rights](https://substack.com/redirect/ea3a70fb-6bd2-41a0-90b4-0d59a676cd47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for which he is most widely remembered...

clean_body: The first global agreement explicitly addressing fossil fuels indicates theoretical progress, but ignored massive blind spots to which MLK drew attention before his assassination 60 years ago | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? The first global agreement explicitly addressing fossil fuels indicates theoretical progress, but ignored massive blind spots to which MLK drew attention before his assassination 60 years ago | | | Dec 17| | | ∙| | Preview ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | After two weeks of negotiations in the United Arab Emirates, world leaders celebrated a at the COP28 Summit last Wednesday. For the first time, a global agreement addresses the need to ramp down fossil fuel extraction and consumption--while ignoring enforceable targets, historical to meet ambitious climate goals, and a series of elephants in the proverbial room that a national hero tried to warn us about before he was assassinated 60 years ago. Want to help your friends stay informed? This post is public and free, so share it with them! [R]ich countries claim to care about climate chaos, but not enough to do much about it. The COP 28 agreement reflects essentially no progress from that problematic baseline. | | ---|---|--- Image: , licensed through Creative Commons The first hole in the bucket: enforceability The COP28 agreement reflects an ambitious vision. In particular, it is being widely celebrated because it arguably represents the emergence of a long overdue global consensus on two related points. First, it aims to invite a future based on renewable energy. As a corollary, it envisions "transitioning away" from non-renewable sources like fossil fuels, whose consumption has the global climate beyond the ranges that human societies have experienced before. Remarkably, in the 30 years that the United Nations has hosted climate talks, the new COP28 agreement is that a final decision text has ever merely referenced fossil fuels. But while the vision of the agreement is worthwhile, the agreement itself offers towards it. For instance, leaders announced to a fund to help offset the cost of climate disasters in developing countries, but that is ultimately merely a drop in the bucket addressing the impacts of climate chaos while doing little to stem its sources. Similarly, the new agreement envisions "Tripling renewable energy capacity globally and doubling the global average annual rate of energy efficiency improvements by 2030," but it leaves those goals at the insistence of countries including China and India. By allowing countries to contrive any convenient baseline for measurement of future progress, the agreement's text effectively invites its own subversion. It also reflects an optimistic in technology that the climate catastrophe has already exposed as ultimately fraudulent. For instance, the agreement calls for "Accelerating zero- and low-emission technologies, including...nuclear, abatement and removal technologies such as carbon capture and utilisation and storage...." But there is no technology that can make continued reliance on fossil fuels sustainable, while history that technological progress often comes at the cost of marginalized communities whose in a sustainable future is critical to achieving it. Proponents of technological solutions to climate catastrophe dream of a breakthrough, but relying on one to emerge is the equivalent on betting the future of human civilization on a horse race. Finally, the agreement invites an expansion in extraction of some fossil fuels, "recogni[zing] that transitional fuels can play a role in facilitating the energy transition while ensuring energy security." In particular, liquified natural gas (LNG) burns more cleanly than other forms of fossil fuels, but it remains problematic. It may even be than other fossil fuels due to methane leaks associated with the fracking increasingly necessary to extract LNG. These are just some of the reasons why insightful critics have described the COP28 agreement as "riddled with for [the] fossil fuel industry." Want to stay informed? Sign up for a free subscription, or consider a paid subscription to help expand my work exposing bipartisan corruption and efforts to challenge it. While the COP28 agreement does reflect theoretical progress, much more must be done to keep fossil fuels and other nonrenewable resources in the ground. To celebrate the text merely because it recognizes for the first time that fossil fuels are problematic is charitably, and requires ignoring the nature of the contemporary climate crisis. A second hole in the bucket: capitalism Developing countries have for decades that the rules of the international trading system are effectively rigged, forcing developing countries to offer natural resources to international buyers through markets dominated and skewed by rich countries and institutional investors from them. Meanwhile, many practices that drive climate chaos, like burning wood or dung for household heating, are driven by and economic inequality. In other words, rich countries claim to care about climate chaos, but not enough to do much about it. The COP 28 agreement reflects essentially no progress from that problematic baseline. Until rich countries meaningfully invest in developing countries to offer alternative pathways to development that do not rely on the extraction of natural resources, their concerns about climate chaos remain disingenuous. That was one reason that the new loss and damage fund for vulnerable countries is so important. But international funds to help developing countries recover from climate-related natural disasters do nothing to help stem the tide of greenhouses gasses. They help ameliorate impacts, but do nothing to address root causes. Addressing root causes would require foreign direct investment in development countries in order to offer alternative development pathways that do not rely on extracting natural resources. Supporting democratic restraints on market-driven rapacity would also help. But rather than support sustainable development or meaningful democracy in the global South, wealthy countries have instead done everything possible to impede it. American support for former Brazilian president Jair Bolsanaro provides an apt example. A notorious autocrat fairly described as , he oversaw a massive of deforestation in the Amazon, undermining the capacity of the region to sequester carbon precisely because he respected neither public nor global opinion until he was removed from office. The connection between climate chaos and capitalism is an inconvenient truth that the COP 28 agreement continues to ignore. A third hole in the bucket: militarism It's striking that the COP28 agreement was negotiated in the midst of an in Gaza to which both Washington and Tel Aviv remain committed, despite a . Even attempts within rich countries to organize mass work stoppage have proven insufficiently influential, although they have proceeded the critical support of organized labor or leaders challenged to remember the meaning of solidarity. On the one hand, discussions about military aggression and international human rights are usually shorn from those about climate chaos. Yet each of these spheres critically influence each other. The Pentagon is our planet's institutional source of carbon pollution. The amount of petroleum on which the military industrial complex relies is staggering. A single fighter jet can consume up to . But the Pentagon's rapacious consumption doesn't convey even a fraction of how militarism forces climate catastrophe. Washington's international belligerence has directly contributed to historic releases of greenhouse gasses, while editors of major newspapers have joined policymakers in surrounding the latest example. The ecocide inherent in the use of defoliant across southeast Asia during the war on Vietnam offers an earlier example of this pattern. Interestingly, the investigative journalist who exposed the worst human rights abuses by the US military in Vietnam, Seymour Hersh, is the very same writer who more recently documented last year. Hersh has done to expose crimes and coverups by the American "defense" establishment, yet co-opted editors at major newspapers across the United States continue to his findings, deferring to Pentagon sources who have lied on the record repeatedly about everything from torture to weapons of mass destruction. This is one way that disinformation attains the status of official narrative. It reflects gaslighting on a mass scale, not unlike the claim across Washington that Pax Americana represents a "" when the reality is both more straightforward, and unfortunately, seemingly timeless: "might makes right." But the Pentagon's engineering of climate chaos stretches far beyond its ecocidal actions and relentless consumption of fossil fuels. No one in Washington has been willing to publicly observe how the military industrial complex has deployed its formidable resources over and over again to force natural resources onto global markets over the objections of local governments. Few Americans remember the origin story of U.S. relations with Iran, or why Washington has been existentially opposed to the government of one of the planet's most ancient civilizations for the past 50 years. The saga begins in 1953, when a Iranian president tried to , taking them off the international market to avoid economic predation by the west. The response was one among any number of , removing the democratically elected leader, and putting in place a brutal dictator whose abuses then inspired a revolution in 1979 eventually co-opted by right wing theocrats. Few histories better represent the absurdly prolific incompetence of the Washington policy establishment, or its hateful contributions to a species-wide calamity that will only continue to grow worse in the future. While the CIA's intervention in Iran presents the most direct example of how militarism has fueled climate catastrophe, it is far from the only one. Each of the of CIA "interventions" across the world to deny democracy in the service of enabling capitalism fit this unfortunately sordid--and continuing--pattern. Paid subscribers can access a further section describing how Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. forecast the climate crisis, and warned an unfortunately ignorant country about how to stop it long before most observers realized the crisis was at hand. Even his most ardent supporters tend to downplay the prescience and profundity of Dr. King's legacy, which stretches far beyond the for which he is most widely remembered... ## Christmas Outreach
---
|
---
'Tis that time once more! We're embarking on our Christmas outreach initiative and gearing up to spread joy to those in need. The support from this community has been nothing short of incredible over the past two years, significantly contributing to the success of our outreach efforts. Last year, with your help, we were able to bring smiles to the faces of over 150 needy families through thoughtful gift-giving. This year, my hope is to double that impact.
Here's what we're on the lookout for:
For Kids:
New Clothes, Shoes, and Toys
Toddlers (boys and girls, 2-5 years old)
6-12 years old (boys and girls)
13-18 years old (boys and girls)
For Newborns:
Diapers
New This Year - Young Adults:
Items for young men and women
Example: Shoes, Clothes, Makeup, Cologne, Perfume, Electronics
For Parents:
Gift cards for necessities
Food
Groceries
Gas
Shopping
Your generosity has the power to make a significant difference in the lives of those less fortunate. Let's join forces once again and make this Christmas season even more special for our community. Together, we can extend the spirit of giving and bring warmth to the hearts of many.
Thank you for your continued support and compassion.
You can give at these links
[Give at paypal at this link Paypal.me/derrickgates](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=106833.114.1.8c339b49a34317a857f4e484baacc9d7)
Cash App $derrickgatesmin
Venmo @Derrick-Gates-4
| |
---
---
## 66th Assembly Central Committee
---
|
---
Dear friends and fellow Conservatives,
I am thrilled to announce that I am running for an official seat on the 66th Assembly District Central Committee. As some of you may know, I have been serving as an alternate on the committee for some time now. Over the past two years, I have also been actively involved in multiple posts within the party. I am proud to have been elected to the California Republican Assembly state board of directors as the Senate director for the 24th District, chaired the Faith Outreach committee for the CRA, and served as a delegate for the California State party. These experiences have given me a deep understanding of the values and principles that are important to our party and have prepared me to effectively represent our district on the central committee.
As a member of the central committee, I will work tirelessly to ensure that conservative values remain at the forefront of our party's agenda. I believe that my position on the LAGOP, which is the largest Republican party office in the nation, will allow me to have a greater impact on decisions that affect our party and our community. I have already been able to influence many decisions as an alternate, and I am confident that I can make an even greater impact as an elected member.
While some have urged me to run for the congressional seat of the 36th district, I believe that my calling is to bring balance to the party for the next few years. This will not only benefit the party but also other candidates and myself in the long run. Federal races can be expensive to operate, and I have learned from my previous run for Congress that it takes time to build relationships and secure the support needed to win. My goal is to help fix the foundation of the party while building relationships with those who can help me in the future.
I am asking for your prayers and support as I take this important step on my journey. Please look for me on the primary ballot on March 5, 2024. Early voting begins on February 24, 2024. Your vote for me, Derrick R. Gates, for the 66th Assembly Central Committee, will help ensure that our conservative values continue to be represented in our district and beyond.
Thank you for your support and dedication to our party.
Sincerely,
Derrick R. Gates

name: Susan Wild
subject: Sorry to bother you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
I already have multiple Republican opponents vying to replace me in Congress, and some of them have deep pockets.

| Peter,

I hate to bother you on a Sunday, but this is important.

I already have multiple Republican opponents vying to replace me in Congress, and some of them have deep pockets.

I know the elections feel far off, but now is the time to build a strong foundation to fight off Republican attacks.

**I hate having to ask for your hard-earned money, but even $5 would go a long way in ensuring we have the resources we need to be successful, like campaign staff, advertising, and voter outreach.[_Can you spare $5, $15, or even more right away?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75345087/444385133/-1389333689?refcode=BLU-SWC-20231217-Z-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDAzZDMzMC0wYzlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lpju91LEpzoxKWVQPkB8ymtG1QmYR2-d9SrQu1WqKxQ=)**

name: Congressman Maxwell Frost
subject: Join me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
We can win in Florida
| | |
---
Friend —
Let’s talk about Florida. I know some people like to write us off, but I know that in 2024 we can prove them wrong. We’re a diverse state full of people who believe that we all have a right to a better future. **I am proud to support Debbie for the U.S. Senate because I know she’s the leader who can make that vision of a better future a reality for millions of Floridians —[ and I hope you’ll join me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75345123/444385285/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk503-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzIzMWYzNzctMGM5ZC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YHz26EiNrn0w0jh7GgVsv736wyFTpsXS0_MwpvwVeKc=)**
In my district, and everywhere I go around the state I hear Floridians talk about the issues they’re facing, and the inaction from our leaders in the GOP. We’re on the front lines of the climate crisis, but Rick Scott has dismissed it as “nuisance flooding.” We’re one of the last safe havens for abortion in the South, but Rick Scott has supported a national abortion ban. We’re the state with the largest enrollment in the Affordable Care Act, but Rick Scott is still pushing to repeal it. We’ve witnessed mass shooting after mass shooting in our state, but in the Senate, Rick Scott has voted with the NRA 100% of the time.
These are all debates that should have been settled years ago — but GOP extremists like Rick Scott are trying to keep them alive in Florida. We can’t let them.
Debbie is a candidate who understands the challenges Floridians face every day. Like so many Floridians, she is an immigrant who is proof that the American Dream is a reality. She’s a mom who understands the importance of quality education and safe schools. She’s a daughter who is her aging mother’s caretaker, and has seen how critical programs like Medicare and Social Security are. She understands the gun violence crisis because she lost her father to gun violence, and has dedicated her career to creating a safer world. **Debbie represents Floridians. Rick Scott represents himself.**
This election has the potential to change our state for the better, but Debbie is up against Rick Scott and his multimillion-dollar fortune. That’s why I’m asking you today: **[Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to help Debbie build a grassroots movement that can defeat Rick Scott?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75345124/444385286/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk503-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzIzMWYzNzctMGM5ZC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YHz26EiNrn0w0jh7GgVsv736wyFTpsXS0_MwpvwVeKc=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75345125/444385287/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk503-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzIzMWYzNzctMGM5ZC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YHz26EiNrn0w0jh7GgVsv736wyFTpsXS0_MwpvwVeKc=)

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Pat Harrigan
subject: Your response to this will decide everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
| | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2907c4fad541452aada986369ab7187b&_e=S48_IKsSYihe_cwaIKl3kjXbrK-fK8EmhH7T3SLgiFcb4CyjYnNChdgF3bFqrRzfDweoVy6QX4cMDqoasKHnQDsaZBISKOFvawMzmz1zuUtxRqDIAjOqDDZL0uuJFCJmi_wezXolZdn8fLHwhL9wFh3-TgyoiY5fkwY3Jde4iEPlAUzNZhOvEBYPYC5HpDO1qOFUBOs8gGDdGWr2fN42AiSBrD44fKTg504H-_p2zp7uH8NGt8LfzqQV_gb5WsDco3TTFRFJVZSBA1dwRgxRIcNnANNqxR1XwLS8hmv5UX8%3D)
---
Fellow American, This is the first and last email I'll ever send you.

You see, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way.

**But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. **

My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat.

After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. And most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls.

**I 'm also a GOP candidate in the MUST WIN race in NC-10, a district that Congressman McHenrys just retired from and one that WILL decide who controls Washington.**
Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden already have $100 million bucks ready to trash our GOP candidates in every swing district on the map.
---
[**That 's why I'm humbly asking if you'll chip in just a few bucks today.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2907c4fad541452aada986369ab7187b&_e=S48_IKsSYihe_cwaIKl3kjXbrK-fK8EmhH7T3SLgiFcb4CyjYnNChdgF3bFqrRzfDweoVy6QX4cMDqoasKHnQDsaZBISKOFvawMzmz1zuUtxRqDIAjOqDDZL0uuJFCJmi_wezXolZdn8fLHwhL9wFgUVwrxhUQkl9l9sVJKSJdXSUm9fnZA4m5fAFzfpzhyQmVuL8jWyJwlY4uzFIta6IktOxp8bcBa86keFQuKYfoNc3r5vqhaEu4i1h_fDZrI8XqXq95JwKS-8K7WTJyWyItFnpo7Rzz2WU1XjUKlAjeQ%3D)
---
The talking heads and political know-it-alls say I can't win this race. But I bet you've heard that one before...

I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but starting a grassroots campaign is tough - **really, really tough. **

The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to victory we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts.

[Please have my back on this one:](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2907c4fad541452aada986369ab7187b&_e=S48_IKsSYihe_cwaIKl3kjXbrK-fK8EmhH7T3SLgiFcb4CyjYnNChdgF3bFqrRzfDweoVy6QX4cMDqoasKHnQDsaZBISKOFvawMzmz1zuUu4UX7nWNSHfPKu3W7kkeTOFWx07umObDatp9cUz6g7pyLu07AWCmIb-L-bSOrWoD46DgJVPIZlyRZbrj2UUlAnW8af4w-R_zs_C6HMFu8cC8XymFyGddKdyZelnFYy7ozq0RRtgT1W2OHbTZuGsToiG9u4XugGpGiobDWzFshbRfxSP5hbsRFSIT7QV2X4kac%3D)
---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $10**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2907c4fad541452aada986369ab7187b&_e=S48_IKsSYihe_cwaIKl3kjXbrK-fK8EmhH7T3SLgiFcb4CyjYnNChdgF3bFqrRzfDweoVy6QX4cMDqoasKHnQDsaZBISKOFvawMzmz1zuUtxRqDIAjOqDDZL0uuJFCJmi_wezXolZdn8fLHwhL9wFgSGuRN4ZNdApAVC4qofeHpWQ6rDge3X_UHq0t2qp60dVb0gIq1Th-0oYybO2zDsAtxaetE6H77D0mXFekAgwo8X4iXrcQl9gSIlvv2wMIwJM1ksPDARALomXhyHHgVQsu-9o7xXdTuvQqapd6EfsnA%3D)

You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat. After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. And most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls. I 'm also a GOP candidate in the MUST WIN race in NC-10, a district that Congressman McHenrys just retired from and one that WILL decide who controls Washington. Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden already have $100 million bucks ready to trash our GOP candidates in every swing district on the map. The talking heads and political know-it-alls say I can't win this race. But I bet you've heard that one before... I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but starting a grassroots campaign is tough - really, really tough. The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to victory we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts. Look, I'm not a politician. I'm nothing flashy or special, just a regular guy who loves this country more than anything. So, I'm opening my heart to you today in hopes you'll stand with me. I won't give you empty promises & fancy slogans. That's not me. But I'll give you my word as a veteran that I'll fight with all I have to do what's right and make you proud. Thank you & God bless. ---|---
Far-right Republicans in Raleigh passed restrictive legislation designed to give their party an edge in upcoming elections. Their anti-voter law could make it harder for North Carolinians to vote, especially folks who may be more likely to vote for Democratic candidates.
Roy is deeply committed to ensuring that every voter’s voice is heard. We should be protecting folks’ fundamental right to vote — not rolling back their freedom.
Peter, let Roy know if you agree.
**[Do you support voting rights protections in NC and across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75346522/444390498/1800174926?refcode=ea.1732203a-109d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ms=ea.1732203a-109d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzMyMjAzYS0xMDlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HAkRUSAIRb2NHRRh49U9RqQOK6JF6V5C_Xd25EQjYUU=&emci=b5be8c30-659b-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=1732203a-109d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=1049176)**
[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75346523/444390499/1800174926?refcode=ea.1732203a-109d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ms=ea.1732203a-109d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzMyMjAzYS0xMDlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HAkRUSAIRb2NHRRh49U9RqQOK6JF6V5C_Xd25EQjYUU=&emci=b5be8c30-659b-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=1732203a-109d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=1049176) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75346524/444390500/1800174926?refcode=ea.1732203a-109d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ms=ea.1732203a-109d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzMyMjAzYS0xMDlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HAkRUSAIRb2NHRRh49U9RqQOK6JF6V5C_Xd25EQjYUU=&emci=b5be8c30-659b-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=1732203a-109d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=1049176)

name: David Hogg
subject: Unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roland Gutierrez For Texas
body:
You’re receiving this message because of your past support of Democratic candidates and causes. Roland Gutierrez is running to defeat Ted Cruz for Senate. We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ifYYiIyK0UCnX-4gLHfqiQ2?unsubscribedata=BxYVtZlnfM28yk4Wh6FQqJZnctJ30feSAiThztaR%2BwJRKJi%2FiW1CxAvddAKBzyJEcFxWfMl5VmizAb70pWNu16vPTtL4oWSTVlkjPDpgWEgA1i9KVKFktuKX67R07rJHo6Kv%2BHCsBM3TFM69xPyidZ029sa88RDqLGLaBJpHLptxc2MhoQSzwhN0hZrBrLzJO7B59ypD95rZ45RIpPZQjmyyDEswqrOx8kfcf5I%2BGlThWQLIyjlRCEZmXFlqdmbgJ9gsW37A8mtDnuSFzuFfMUSubafSUd%2FGlzKElPTyuyfIUmPvK4NScgSAeUtxQNxQEfQZ8dTj4zuQvMEK%2FXOWaw0R%2FXjk88GyrZdZ0%2FVrDg4dMauo5YcQmzRDM7EENZXi%2F2%2BIhcOt70eP4xFe6GbpMH7y4r8va0eN3HFAykyxXCmg1kIW9Cgvc7m00OM%2FQctE .
secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25 [secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25]
Hey, it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
Hey Peter — it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives.
The GOP and conservative special interest groups have been playing a 50-year chess game to elect far-right extremists to every level of government to manipulate our country and attack our rights and freedoms. They are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for personal gain.
But badass young people have a habit of being underestimated, from March For Our Lives to the Sunrise Movement to the Movement for Black Lives. And when we demonstrate our collective power, we scare the shit out of Republicans.
That’s why with an incredible team, we launched Leaders We Deserve — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future.
We can’t do this without you by our side. Will you become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Roland Gutierrez today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
I’ll be blunt: There is no shortage of people who want us to fail. And unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change.
It’s part of why despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats.
Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding the power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions to keep Gen Z candidates from winning. They think that they can continue to manipulate the system to keep us out of elected office.
Let’s prove them wrong, Peter.
That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you become a Founding Donor to Leaders We Deserve by splitting a donation with Roland Gutierrez today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
Let’s do this,
David Hogg Co-founder,
Leaders We Deserve
Democrat Roland Gutierrez is running for US Senate to defeat Ted Cruz. Texans deserve leaders who will look out for their best interests. We need you in this campaign. Can you donate $5 right now to help Roland win this race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

body:
Trump Train News

This single court ruling calls our ENTIRE Conservative House Majority into question.

_**[We have one last chance to save our Majority but it won't be easy.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bf249fa284cd4734b9dc7ccee3f1b62f&_e=xQ5iRRK48Q2NrwGKEasWFfGIoXuyOZJ4acF7lV4Pq-kI_IFSvhIp6Tjx0q5jYUyyylLioSZHnIjvwDfL38XsHj7OlkT65frZxDFs4PFbDt4_Zctb5S-nrF3YH_fz3-0rlvm6mhSGLYpE9kr51rZ4BgXk0vmCGESqWyNySBQBWZqS2e4rzheP_3W8Bbmu2SrJGmIijL9_bQCNqdycs9-9EfaJfgO6H4a0ucgEHGtZMHqeVlQluKwGMF9ePvUx9SEOEjtj3x6deIDpPE9ViRkgi1FixoEpzFninEhtCtl7MBqe1gbF3zeiWYt6Nt1CuEycryr5rUauLdDczkxWMWdgTu1FUa10E_mg9IH16T8VPZ5N96dTSnqKZXiFjhjMcs7-7irxZKf5rUQwMY-XHuTexg%3D%3D "We have one last chance to save our Majority but it won’t be easy.")**_ We are now forced to run MORE ads to make sure our positive message sinks in with voters... Earlier this month, I asked if beating Marsha Blackburn was worth a small donation to you, and SO many of you stepped up to say it was. I can’t tell you how grateful I am to each of you. But there’s still a long way to go. = | = Let’s do this, Gloria \----Original Message---- From: Gloria Johnson Date: Fri, Dec 8 Subject: Is beating Marsha Blackburn worth $3 to you? Today, I’m only asking for $3 — it’s not much, but it could be ALL the difference in our race. It could be the difference between allowing corporate PACs to buy this race and reclaiming this seat for The People of Tennessee. It could be the difference between reelecting a politician in thrall to the gun lobby and replacing her with a leader ready to stand tall for victims of gun violence. It could be the difference between allowing Marsha Blackburn to fulfill the MAGA agenda or defeating her once and for all. = In a race like ours where voter turnout is critical, just $3 could mean everything. $3 means more fliers, yard signs, TV ads, radio spots, and more opportunities to reach voters. It means more time knocking on doors than dialing for dollars. It means keeping up dollar-for-dollar with my opponent’s corporate PAC backers — all with grassroots strength. = = --- = --- Let’s do this, Gloria Johnson = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests.
