body:
The Democrat judge in my SHAM TRIAL just said...
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kcFu2zAQRL-GuskQdymROuhgl3CLOgh6KVL0YmxIyt5ApFSJipG_L2Q4ub4ZLOZhKU4D9x-d0AcBcGW_CACBewFwUoc_z83p5WTL_eFnXdqmVrcthW8CIH9M4av6uLILkXjYqLaF78AZcK4IndQVGCVbqItrJyW4HnrCXgeFXkt8pRrJaGOwfTV9wR1UgBKkli0aBbuaPLi6cUgQfItSqOrGaefHRIN_y_Map50bYzF015yn5T7pKOC4BLfOYXfjNAe_NTZG76GkGGZ2VL6NnHLZr8nPxAunS-nGGDnnEAQckxvAuKauPWgdKk2qF3hcczzH4HmNAu3Dt9ngMq6zCwKt4zM9mKM4EV-SQPvp9JmMKYeUBVpZNa0S0JzTwF6g_f3rnzn9fX6n9g7vL0H79LT__sMa9VLMnZ9uPAy8NFqo6rJN2OT-BwAA__8VXox8)
---
Friend,
The Democrat judge in my sham _“corporate death penalty”_ trial in New York has made crystal clear that he could care less about evidence – _especially evidence that PROVES my innocence!_
In fact, before my attorneys even had the opportunity to present the mountain of evidence and testimony, this judge had _already_ presumed me guilty of “fraud.”
But now, after demonstrating my INNOCENCE in court – and that this is nothing more than another one of the Left’s vicious witch hunts – **my attorneys have requested a directed verdict to wrap up this trial IMMEDIATELY and CLEAR me of these phony charges.**
But what did this judge (_who’s donated to Democrats, I might add!_) have to say _**before**_ even reading the motion?...
_**“There's no way I’m going to grant that.”**_
This is a slap in the face of _true_ justice!
**When you enter the courtroom PRESUMED GUILTY – _and are still presumed guilty after PROVING YOUR INNOCENCE_ – then we’re no longer living in America, Friend.**
We might as well be living in Maoist China or Stalinist Russia, for that matter! And under Crooked Joe’s regime, that’s _exactly_ what we’ve got.
A sitting president and ruling party who have weaponized our justice system to try and destroy their leading opponent and the ONE and ONLY MAN who can defeat them in 2024.
But, as I’ve said time and again, they can attack me all they want, strip me of my constitutional rights, threaten me with life in prison, force me to take a mugshot, and seek the “corporate death penalty” against me and my family, but there’s ONE THING they will _NEVER_ get away with...
_...Robbing YOU of your country! _
Because ___WE_ will **NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER** to their tyranny!
With YOU at my side, we will counter their lies, attacks, and vicious witch hunts at every turn. We will prevail just as we always have.
And come November 5, 2024, we will receive the ultimate vindication – and the ultimate prize: **_an America made GREAT AGAIN!_**
_If you’re struggling right now due to the crooks, thugs, and fools currently running our country, then please don’t donate at this time. I only wanted to update you on this grave injustice of a “trial.”_

clean_body: The Democrat judge in my SHAM TRIAL just said... | | | Friend, The Democrat judge in my sham “corporate death penalty” trial in New York has made crystal clear that he could care less about evidence – especially evidence that PROVES my innocence! In fact, before my attorneys even had the opportunity to present the mountain of evidence and testimony, this judge had already presumed me guilty of “fraud.” But now, after demonstrating my INNOCENCE in court – and that this is nothing more than another one of the Left’s vicious witch hunts – my attorneys have requested a directed verdict to wrap up this trial IMMEDIATELY and CLEAR me of these phony charges. But what did this judge (who’s donated to Democrats, I might add!) have to say before even reading the motion?... “There's no way I’m going to grant that.” This is a slap in the face of true justice! When you enter the courtroom PRESUMED GUILTY – and are still presumed guilty after PROVING YOUR INNOCENCE – then we’re no longer living in America, Friend. We might as well be living in Maoist China or Stalinist Russia, for that matter! And under Crooked Joe’s regime, that’s exactly what we’ve got. A sitting president and ruling party who have weaponized our justice system to try and destroy their leading opponent and the ONE and ONLY MAN who can defeat them in 2024. But, as I’ve said time and again, they can attack me all they want, strip me of my constitutional rights, threaten me with life in prison, force me to take a mugshot, and seek the “corporate death penalty” against me and my family, but there’s ONE THING they will NEVER get away with... ...Robbing YOU of your country! Because _WE will NEVER,EVER SURRENDER to their tyranny! With YOU at my side, we will counter their lies, attacks, and vicious witch hunts at every turn. We will prevail just as we always have. And come November 5, 2024, we will receive the ultimate vindication – and the ultimate prize: an America made GREAT AGAIN! If you’re struggling right now due to the crooks, thugs, and fools currently running our country, then please don’t donate at this time. I only wanted to update you on this grave injustice of a “trial.” Thank you, | Donald J. name: Nikki HQ
subject: Reaching out one last time for your thoughts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Hi team, Our team noticed that fewer folks than usual responded to our December Issues Survey after Nikki shared it over the weekend. **We get it.** The holidays are upon us and people are focused on things besides the upcoming election, but Nikki and our entire team mean it when we say that your input is valuable to our fight. So we’re reaching out one last time to share our survey and ask if you can take just a minute or two to let us know what issues are top of mind right now as we wrap up the year and head into 2024. **[Before our December Issues Survey expires at midnight, will you take a moment to share your priorities with Nikki and the rest of our team?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75347090/444392711/839761357?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20231217_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzdmNzNmZC0xNDlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=55wos5lsl1VwNSwla1-7blm1Fhjbx7lJCY1oscxbIpY=&emci=327f73fd-149d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=3c7f73fd-149d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=13891387)** | [SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75347091/444392712/839761357?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20231217_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzdmNzNmZC0xNDlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=55wos5lsl1VwNSwla1-7blm1Fhjbx7lJCY1oscxbIpY=&emci=327f73fd-149d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=3c7f73fd-149d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=13891387)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Nikki Budzinski
Date: Sunday, December 10, 2023
Subject: Cup of coffee
We submitted **2,860 signatures** from across all seven counties in IL-13 to run for reelection, which is **three times** the number of signatures required to file.
I am blown away by the enthusiasm and support from our grassroots movement, and I am so excited for our road ahead.
And with 2024 around the corner, it’s important that I hear directly from you about what issues matter most to you and your family. My number one priority is building a grassroots movement that moves people in all seven counties across IL-13 forward.
While I would love to chat with you over a cup of coffee, surveys like this are the second best way for me to learn more about your priorities and what issues you’d like to see me fighting for in Washington.
**[Will you take a moment to complete our final issues survey of the year? Click here to share your thoughts with us in our December Issues Survey>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75347092/444392713/839761357?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20231217_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzdmNzNmZC0xNDlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=55wos5lsl1VwNSwla1-7blm1Fhjbx7lJCY1oscxbIpY=&emci=327f73fd-149d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=3c7f73fd-149d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=13891387)**

clean_body: | Hi team, Our team noticed that fewer folks than usual responded to our December Issues Survey after Nikki shared it over the weekend. We get it. The holidays are upon us and people are focused on things besides the upcoming election, but Nikki and our entire team mean it when we say that your input is valuable to our fight. So we’re reaching out one last time to share our survey and ask if you can take just a minute or two to let us know what issues are top of mind right now as we wrap up the year and head into 2024. | Thank you for making your voice heard. — Team Nikki \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Nikki Budzinski Date: Sunday, December 10, 2023 Subject: Cup of coffee We submitted 2,860 signatures from across all seven counties in IL-13 to run for reelection, which is three times the number of signatures required to file. I am blown away by the enthusiasm and support from our grassroots movement, and I am so excited for our road ahead. And with 2024 around the corner, it’s important that I hear directly from you about what issues matter most to you and your family. My number one priority is building a grassroots movement that moves people in all seven counties across IL-13 forward. While I would love to chat with you over a cup of coffee, surveys like this are the second best way for me to learn more about your priorities and what issues you’d like to see me fighting for in Washington. Thank you! Your input is a crucial part of our campaign. — Nikki = Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States ** | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com | Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

# Join us TOMORROW for an Iowa Update on Zoom with Ryan Binkley.
On January 15, the Iowa Caucus will be the first presidential primary of 2024. Iowa plays a pivotal role in election year politics, and can change the course of the primary race, literally overnight!

Ryan and the Binkley 2024 team will be on Zoom **tomorrow,** December 18, to discuss the Caucus and how you can be involved. The meeting starts at 7pm CT / 8pm ET.

Be sure to register at the link below. See you tomorrow!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75348295/444396843/476240636?refcode=em_eng_2023.12.17_b1_stvbhq_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWY0N2I4ZmYtMWE5ZC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CqzrXF4R8_iESAQYB9rtLnPQyHLFhfl9OuG4dzIBO08=)
Friend – Janelle’s parents, both teachers, taught her that education was the key to a better, safer world.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75348296/444396844/476240636?refcode=em_eng_2023.12.17_b1_stvbhq_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWY0N2I4ZmYtMWE5ZC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CqzrXF4R8_iESAQYB9rtLnPQyHLFhfl9OuG4dzIBO08=)** _Janelle’s 4th grade class._
And now, throughout her entire career in public service, Janelle has fought to put her parents' teachings into practice.

**Educational opportunity opens so many doors for children across America.** If we want to ensure that all Oregonians can get ahead, we _have_ to ensure education is affordable and accessible.

We know Janelle won’t stop fighting until the job is done, but she needs to know if you’re in this too. That’s why we want to know:
|

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Re: Sen. Joe Manchin’s announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek — In
just a moment, [ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2209?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231217_FR_mmfr_0_3MO_TammyBaldwin_TammyBaldwin_NA_mmfr.2.11&t=1001&akid=6533%2E1827488%2E6OFnvD ]I’m going to ask you to split a donation between Tony
Evers and my campaign before our mid-month deadline tonight. But first, I
hope you’ll let me explain why your support is so critical today.

Senator Joe Manchin’s announcement to not seek reelection to the U.S.
Senate shook up our race in a huge way.

Republicans are now basically guaranteed to flip West Virginia, meaning
they’re just one seat away from taking back the Senate majority.

That also means the GOP will have even more resources to pour into our
state, so we need to prepare for the fight of our lives.

Wisconsin is already home to some of the most expensive and competitive
races in our country, and I’m already one of Mitch McConnell’s top targets
to defeat.

The stakes are too high to let the GOP take back our Senate majority and
push their dangerous right-wing agenda, so I’m personally asking:

clean_body: Derek — In just a moment, [ ]I’m going to ask you to split a donation between Tony Evers and my campaign before our mid-month deadline tonight. But first, I hope you’ll let me explain why your support is so critical today. Senator Joe Manchin’s announcement to not seek reelection to the U.S. Senate shook up our race in a huge way. Republicans are now basically guaranteed to flip West Virginia, meaning they’re just one seat away from taking back the Senate majority. That also means the GOP will have even more resources to pour into our state, so we need to prepare for the fight of our lives. Wisconsin is already home to some of the most expensive and competitive races in our country, and I’m already one of Mitch McConnell’s top targets to defeat. The stakes are too high to let the GOP take back our Senate majority and push their dangerous right-wing agenda, so I’m personally asking: [ ]Can I count on you to split a donation between Tony Evers and my campaign before tonight's deadline? Any amount will go a long way toward helping us defend Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate seat and our Democratic majority. name: Fred Guttenberg
subject: I’m with Debbie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
Friend
I’m writing to you today because I am proud to endorse Debbie Mucarsel-Powell for U.S. Senate in Florida.
I love Florida, and am proud to call it home — but our state has been victim to some of the worst mass shootings in our country. Florida families, including mine, have been shattered by shootings in Parkland, Fort Lauderdale, and Orlando.
I know from personal experience that Florida desperately needs a leader in the United States Senate who cares about public safety and fiercely defends the right of every Floridian to live free of gun violence. Debbie Murcasel-Powell is that leader. Meanwhile, as a Senator, Rick Scott has sided with the gun lobby every time.
Debbie is up against a man who bought this Senate seat for himself last time round — and still only won by less than 1%! I hope you’ll join me in supporting Debbie Mucarsel-Powell for Senate by splitting a gift between her campaign and Serve America — with grassroots support, I know she can deliver the leadership Florida deserves. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
Thank you for being in this fight. I know Debbie, and I know we can build a brighter future for Florida.
Fred Guttenberg
Brady PAC National Advisory Council
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton [https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton] https://twitter.com/sethmoulton [https://twitter.com/sethmoulton] https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en] https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/]

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Bayer-Monsanto’s Roundup is threatening people, pollinators, and our planet
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2202913?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **Friend — imagine flying over 3,000 miles to Mexico, traveling at about 50 miles a day without knowing where you can stop to rest or where your next meal will come from. **Right now, brave and magnificent monarch butterflies have completed their epic migration south, where they’ll remain for the winter. When these fascinating creatures return, they will search for _milkweed plants_ to reproduce and lay their offspring. These vital plants also act as the **_only food source_** for the little caterpillars before they spread their iconic black and orange wings as adult butterflies. Sadly, at least _**850 MILLION**_ milkweed plants have vanished over the last 20 years, contributing to the **devastating loss of 90% of the North American monarch** during the same period. That’s because monarchs cannot survive without this essential vegetation. Experts are pointing to _glyphosate_ — the active ingredient in Bayer-Monsanto’s flagship product Roundup and the most widely used herbicide in the world — as a key driver for the decimation of milkweed. **So, Friend, the solution is clear:** _**If we want to SAVE the dwindling monarch butterfly population → we must replenish milkweed. If we want to replenish milkweed → we must stop the rampant use of Roundup.**_ [_**Will you take urgent action right now and tell Bayer-Monsanto to STOP selling toxic Roundup before our planet’s precious monarchs are wiped out for good?**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2202914?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2202915?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Losing precious pollinators like monarch butterflies could have drastic consequences for our planet’s ecosystems, including disrupting our food supply. But there are also direct risks that Roundup poses to human health. Glyphosate has been linked to **_cancer, reproductive harms, and other serious medical issues_** in people. And children are the most vulnerable!
**If you didn’t think it could get any worse, think again, Friend.** Rather than address the data and adjust its practices, Bayer-Monsanto has instead been caught intentionally deceiving the public by manipulating science and obstructing pesticide regulations. In other words, this greedy pesticide corporation has actively pushed Roundup on to customers for the sake of profit — __**even though they KNOW it isn’t safe for people, pollinators, or the planet!**__
Bayer-Monsanto MUST be held accountable for its **dangerous deceit and lies** that are threatening our Earth and its living beings! But we need _YOUR_ voice today if we’re going to fight back against the powerful pesticide industry. _**Please don’t let our planet down, Friend.**_ [_**TAKE ACTION NOW: Add your name to demand that Bayer-Monsanto END the production of Roundup immediately! >>**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2202916?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2202915?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for speaking up for monarch butterflies and our planet,
Friends of the Earth**
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)
---

[Click here to unsubscribe](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Faction.foe.org%2Fpage%2F2555%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3Fea.broadcast.id%3D279721&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC)

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: It’s exactly $36.76
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=920%2E135344%2EjeiedE)

Friends,
We've sent a number of emails your way lately, so we thought it was important to share what these messages mean to Elissa's campaign for Senate in Michigan.
As you know, this is a grassroots-funded campaign. But what you may not know is that a very large number of contributions made to our campaign come from emails like this one – **and a full 92% of all contributions to our campaign are under $100.** To be exact, the average donation made via email is $36.76.
$36.76.
That number represents the building blocks of our campaign. While other campaigns are relying on personal fortunes, corporate PACs, and megadonors like Betsy DeVos to fund their campaigns, we’re counting on a whole bunch of people chipping in $36.76 or whatever they can to get us over the finish line.
So when you see our campaign rising in the polls, hiring staff across the state of Michigan, and going up on TV, it is the response to emails like this that make it all possible. All of it. And it’s why we (sorry!) email so often.
[**Our very important FEC fundraising deadline is less than two weeks away and we are counting on a lot of $36.76 donations today in order to stay on track to reach our goals. So we’re asking: Are you in? Every donation will help defend this seat and protect the Democratic Senate majority.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dec23.ZG_uWI&refcode=em231217-2-tt&amount=36.76&t=2&akid=920%2E135344%2EjeiedE)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/128?c0=ebs-em-dec23.JuoF8-&refcode=em231217-2-tt&t=3&akid=920%2E135344%2EjeiedE)**

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=bdd2c91ccbee4faca213b9d6b13dee25&_e=Qm8oHApSiL7cQlRE4d205i9y2ZU7-rSbiWPfp_WkSCzarSCiSRaBRvdrFaSE5K3ZUomvfv8DZ2NpcWD7gYRb5Dl1tp2lpP2aFzrREvGzb7JHHotemXQSB-5--lVDPtDEo-2NWM_bHcjXq1ru22s5iHXfuv2Hgk9b9ORud0739NsIAkZqpDYGC5ePQSK_KIC4d5Vn5ywf5x0UDFebFiHmGkXc_BQHgSCaAtwFVfLcquHT0ud-7PKIB6OEKlzRFiABaDIyQh9DHz3H6c1hSO0-1GmlPWlDsy5qrwnf-6qoehngXaEn0a1hZEdVGwVKY98_12OLfy60BianAGd3XDE8GQtw8dNX2MaeaJsxD55ZmlXXyc9HK4G0SLSJ_eOi6WXawMXsBE9RXb3FnQUjikg6erD6G45MZudAhOUJ0X891uo%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=bdd2c91ccbee4faca213b9d6b13dee25&_e=Qm8oHApSiL7cQlRE4d205i9y2ZU7-rSbiWPfp_WkSCzarSCiSRaBRvdrFaSE5K3ZUomvfv8DZ2NpcWD7gYRb5Dl1tp2lpP2aFzrREvGzb7JHHotemXQSB-5--lVDPtDEo-2NWM_bHcjXq1ru22s5iHXfuv2Hgk9b9ORud0739NsIAkZqpDYGC5ePQSK_KIC4d5Vn5ywf5x0UDFebFiHmGkXc_BQHgSCaAtwFVfLcquHT0ud-7PKIB6OEKlzRFiABaDIyQh9DHz3H6c1hSO0-1JIXaHzX2w2J2zZD4LLEtMDxgO7rTK2Aknwz3OqEB8SyTt6c3z9U8YSfRCrdtYcFkkUUVypQd15D_8U_LXAlPPtjT1SXt5UQFx1NZ5boLTqlXrYAQpXmfj1GT-z0RnJotjDykFltEz6MBIAHUcFn3LY%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=bdd2c91ccbee4faca213b9d6b13dee25&_e=Qm8oHApSiL7cQlRE4d205i9y2ZU7-rSbiWPfp_WkSCzarSCiSRaBRvdrFaSE5K3ZUomvfv8DZ2NpcWD7gYRb5Dl1tp2lpP2aFzrREvGzb7JHHotemXQSB-5--lVDPtDEo-2NWM_bHcjXq1ru22s5iHXfuv2Hgk9b9ORud0739NsIAkZqpDYGC5ePQSK_KIC4d5Vn5ywf5x0UDFebFiHmGkXc_BQHgSCaAtwFVfLcquHT0ud-7PKIB6OEKlzRFiABaDIyQh9DHz3H6c1hSO0-1PHOTNYhlAN-N9t5kTFpZKJevu08L9CXLIi7ozi8oAUCk3hKK2S0lbP47nJ31x5R10lt_WMWvR92IaK0TtejAqLEvGzCpLl3VuIHv9miC7vG0wiq6AksDKCyIjVXPhGgEH74EOYjXAQ9RQtCKdmUOeY%3D "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?

clean_body: My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish." Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me. The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC. Politico fired off this headline: " Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson." And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports. Look: These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not really the goal... The real goal of this political ambush is two-fold: 1) smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and 2) scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats. It 's about power and money. Nothing else. That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country. If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority. So here's my final pitch to you: We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now. The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this. Let me make myself perfectly clear: I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative. "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING." That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in? Thanks for all you do. In liberty, Speaker Mike Johnson | "Speaker Mike Johnson" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY" at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else. body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

With Israel carrying out an illegal bombing campaign in Gaza that has murdered thousands of innocent civilians, we're so proud of Peace candidates like Barbara Lee, Bernie Sanders, Ro Khanna, and others who have spoken out demanding an end to indiscriminate bombing.

In response, right-wing allies of Bibi Netanyahu, like AIPAC, have waged a dishonest and well-funded campaign to smear anyone calling for peace.

With AIPAC having pledged to spend "at least $100 million" defeating progressives and primary challenges underway for Rashida Tlaib, Jamaal Bowman and others, Our Revolution gearing up now to defend these important voices of moral clarity in 2024.

That's why we're asking you to send in a $5 recurring contribution or a $10 one-time donation to support progressives standing up for peace. Your donations are critical, and to thank you, we'll send you this brand new Peace Sticker! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13085?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231217_FR_peacestickerRS_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_peacestickerRS&amount=10&t=1011&akid=5071%2E5885482%2E1kHHcU)

GET YOUR STICKER (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13085?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231217_FR_peacestickerRS_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_peacestickerRS&amount=10&t=1013&akid=5071%2E5885482%2E1kHHcU)

Billionaire-funded right-wing groups like AIPAC think they can bully progressives into silence, but with lives on the line, we cannot back down.

We need more voices speaking up and fighting back to demand peace - on the streets and in the halls of power.

That's why we're organizing the progressive movement and mobilizing resources to defend those brave enough to call for an end to the bombing of civilians in Gaza.

Pitch in here, and we'll send you our brand new Peace sticker! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13085?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231217_FR_peacestickerRS_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_peacestickerRS&amount=10&t=1014&akid=5071%2E5885482%2E1kHHcU)

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Peter Willis, With Israel carrying out an illegal bombing campaign in Gaza that has murdered thousands of innocent civilians, we're so proud of Peace candidates like Barbara Lee, Bernie Sanders, Ro Khanna, and others who have spoken out demanding an end to indiscriminate bombing. In response, right-wing allies of Bibi Netanyahu, like AIPAC, have waged a dishonest and well-funded campaign to smear anyone calling for peace. With AIPAC having pledged to spend "at least $100 million" defeating progressives and primary challenges underway for Rashida Tlaib, Jamaal Bowman and others, Our Revolution gearing up now to defend these important voices of moral clarity in 2024. That's why we're asking you to send in a $5 recurring contribution or a $10 one-time donation to support progressives standing up for peace. Your donations are critical, and to thank you, we'll send you this brand new Peace Sticker! () GET YOUR STICKER () Billionaire-funded right-wing groups like AIPAC think they can bully progressives into silence, but with lives on the line, we cannot back down. We need more voices speaking up and fighting back to demand peace - on the streets and in the halls of power. That's why we're organizing the progressive movement and mobilizing resources to defend those brave enough to call for an end to the bombing of civilians in Gaza. Pitch in here, and we'll send you our brand new Peace sticker! () GET YOUR STICKER () When we organize, we win! Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. clean_body: | | | | \- - - | Peter, I wanted you to be the first to know that my first bill was passed. | | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York!_ Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | = \- ==

Fellow American,

name: Lt. Col. Alex Vindman (USA, Ret.)
subject: Please, help keep the new VoteVets ad on the air
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
The objective of this is to continue pressuring Republicans in Congress until they pass aid for Ukraine.
#
Derek, Alex Vindman here.
The team at VoteVets emailed yesterday to let you know that we’re going up on television across the country with a television ad.
The objective here is to continue pressing Republicans in Congress and the Senate until they pass aid for Ukraine. The stakes are extremely high. The situation in Ukraine will become very dire if aid doesn’t start flowing back.
But there’s another element to what’s going on in Congress. The GOP is trying to force draconian immigration measures as their “compromise” on doing the right thing for Ukraine. Unacceptable!
I’m an immigrant. My family escaped communism. My father brought us to the United States seeking a better life. Much the same story for most of our ancestors coming to America.
And doing the right thing to support Ukraine in their fight to defend democracy against a murderous dictator must not come at the expense of compromising the American dream; ending the hopes of migrants seeking freedom and security in the United States.
So please, take a look at this ad. And if you can, make a donation to help us keep it on the air.
**[Fight For Our Allies, Don’t Attack Immigrants** [](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec23-allies-ad.IkO_iL&refcode=em231217-1-30_NOR&t=2&akid=22723%2E3013755%2E63KQq6) **[Make a donation to VoteVets today, keep this aid on the air, and help us get aid for Ukraine across the finish line.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec23-allies-ad.IkO_iL&refcode=em231217-1-30_NOR&t=3&akid=22723%2E3013755%2E63KQq6) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | **[Rush $10 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2934?c0=vv-pac-em-dec23-allies-ad.397zjU&refcode=em231217-1-30_NOR&t=22&akid=22723%2E3013755%2E63KQq6)**

So please, take a look at this ad. And if you can, make a donation to help us keep it on the air. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thanks very much, Alex PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force. Hey Peter, Mifepristone access is officially headed to the Supreme Court — and that’s why we’re trying to rally as much support around the safe and effective abortion medication as we can. [_**Will you add your name today to say you support keeping mifepristone accessible for all? >>>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75350390/444403978/-2093747371?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231217_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2JhMTgwNjktMmU5ZC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NMsoV0tA3LkanJeua3ImZgja3NOaRbmTbMHoB09U57s=&emci=3384a654-439c-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=3ba18069-2e9d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=1720400) Mifepristone is safe and effective, and has uses beyond just abortion. Taking away widespread availability of the drug just to punish women and control our bodies is extremist and wrong, but it’s what the Court is poised to do next year. We’re facing an all out assault on abortion rights, and this is the most existential threat we’ve faced since the reversal of _Roe v. Wade_ last summer. name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: Tim’s story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
Please take a moment to read about this exceptional candidate I’m supporting | [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=de062d2d03634d7c8965896c96b522ef&_t=7hxUTELBqB7YzMCkmcNOYcLIXlkXpNu9-nhhho0hUJQ-cbi56Iisb2XgQFZM2LCYYESC0RYx8txHzy-7vEQ4RIY0JlF5Ektm-Gm_ZlskGs8%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=de062d2d03634d7c8965896c96b522ef&_t=7hxUTELBqB7YzMCkmcNOYcLIXlkXpNu9-nhhho0hUJQ-cbi56Iisb2XgQFZM2LCYYESC0RYx8txHzy-7vEQ4RIY0JlF5Ektm-Gm_ZlskGs8%3D)
---
Peter,

Recently, I received an email from **former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy who is running for the U.S. Senate in Montana**. It moved me so much that I am forwarding it to you today. Please do me a personal favor and take a few minutes to read it - _**it’s compelling.**_

Best Regards,
Kellyanne Conway

\--------------------------------------------
**From:** Tim Sheehy
**Date:** Thursday, December 7, 2023 at 3:30 PM
**To:** Kellyanne Conway
**Subject:** The day 13 Americans were vaporized in Kabul

Kellyanne,

As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, **those are the traits that define me**. I’m proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to **[launch a campaign for the United States Senate this past June.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=de062d2d03634d7c8965896c96b522ef&_e=O4xm219XSF6a_F4InTFWHFzx_5P35fFdWkgK9I8orX91ZnZDW_7gcc10G10MkZjNsBYCp4fT9LQl0z_4YJTI0ZFbBZVDCcsw9OCPtp0Vz3NpPiD5oO84yjmL5FQT-T3w_58k604xZcFYWtqwULyd_a9ui14uFWWtkbGsPWyD2AuVHnKOV9HrcXJkS9WEtQPFn6ADXoxpyjEnam3gN1xMtEMnN3EQSXy5OWX54px155pQMuTZHR45jKrAjUo-KhHCLkF3lk7lffQa_cZBG3O10pWtddx6GX8CiEJg8r4_h7Tz5KLRyMGf9TILr-nlHk1HC5FLjotKc2SlRUxYssnHYJh6QAXxx6PgSMWDDj7dHFUyd9_loKcCfU_0jXRdU5sFLfavgbbYQFOnwWEVUkA5mP5T86HYEb-oa9TZsNJ15vw%3D)**

In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=de062d2d03634d7c8965896c96b522ef&_e=O4xm219XSF6a_F4InTFWHFzx_5P35fFdWkgK9I8orX91ZnZDW_7gcc10G10MkZjNsBYCp4fT9LQl0z_4YJTI0ZFbBZVDCcsw9OCPtp0Vz3NpPiD5oO84yjmL5FQT-T3w_58k604xZcFYWtqwULyd_a9ui14uFWWtkbGsPWyD2AuVHnKOV9HrcXJkS9WEtQPFn6ADXoxpyjEnam3gN1xMtEMnN3EQSXy5OWX54px155pQMuTZHR45jKrAjUo-KhHCLkF3lk7lffQa_cZBG3O10g391k3gYCvwXUeoCEgr6IGKEeWhd4LjRBo51QBh-NS4OR2HTjE4TsWZbsFMUJDMjrUPvuVsOioktOJxv9Boe9C0F7e7-TwKKNY60rHlM28R4kcNR8KFYRyij4tAhZ9wBuCx3mDYzd5jB47A__EbtPg%3D)
This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, _**“I kept thinking to myself, “The adult will come in the room and say, ‘Hey, this is a disaster; we’re going to stop this.’”**_

Every day it got worse.
Every day it was a disaster.
The adult in the room never materialized.

**Then, 13 Americans were vaporized at the gate to Kabul’s airport.** Billions of dollars in military and human assets were left behind – all so Joe Biden could get a press conference saying that he’d pulled the country out of an “endless war.”

I had sat in the homes of the families that we were frantically trying to get out; I had promised them that we weren’t going to leave them behind. _**So, you can imagine the dishonor that I felt**_ because of the promises we weren’t able to keep to the people who’d sacrificed so much to help us combat evil.

**If you're thinking this email is on the longer side, you're right.** If you're short on time and unable to finish reading to the end right now, **[please do me a quick favor and confirm that I have the correct information on file for you](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=de062d2d03634d7c8965896c96b522ef&_e=O4xm219XSF6a_F4InTFWHFzx_5P35fFdWkgK9I8orX91ZnZDW_7gcc10G10MkZjNO3NLKzuZ-NLMLMc2hkGPaPDzb5lZ9sQtnS6iBWeYM4ysDwZpzZpyUow3NJAtAMIlFPPJvv9_HotjF1mQHIsi5480tytXe2pOQk4GoYDNxXo9mRFnpKLvnq9BnWCW11-AJfHCcCmuqUhSk5jk6LtF2BI2CJNGdu06Xowe7X_BVz5BCkKHoqDQjoR4VlNwd39rGYv9sNnmDUIUftw5HP93SDKTx4oaDTIsjKng6IKicGsfc6GMyrMhHDBh5KJK30e0oELVAXrkYHbXAC0TB1RWZ3GyL4MdcWy7LztFMz0ukw33B7fiHGP9r1hbGJMB0klVfog1HiWiEqMrlLENNE7lmz4lBKYnnXuqATPde8gdTtk%3D)** ; my opponent and his allies will not make winning this seat easy.

[**JOIN OUR FIGHT
ENLIST WITH TIM TODAY->** ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=de062d2d03634d7c8965896c96b522ef&_e=O4xm219XSF6a_F4InTFWHFzx_5P35fFdWkgK9I8orX91ZnZDW_7gcc10G10MkZjNsBYCp4fT9LQl0z_4YJTI0ZFbBZVDCcsw9OCPtp0Vz3NpPiD5oO84yjmL5FQT-T3w_58k604xZcFYWtqwULyd_a9ui14uFWWtkbGsPWyD2AuVHnKOV9HrcXJkS9WEtQPFn6ADXoxpyjEnam3gN1xMtEMnN3EQSXy5OWX54px155pQMuTZHR45jKrAjUo-KhHCLkF3lk7lffQa_cZBG3O10kw_ArW8jhyq2NbciUfaUAtmfkZfsalKrPdsESc8bB-aRhbZagKcSKyyEponevhjwIuE2LzPO4jAB77rFeCeCbQElCEbAIcpvYXlEbjIUwWCFTtVNmcNKuzmaBS-7u907kHkJ2oEhWU2doEtd1LZioM%3D)

It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn’t an easy decision; **but the United States needs leaders who understand the sacrifice it’s taken to build our country. When your country calls and needs you, you have to answer. **

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=de062d2d03634d7c8965896c96b522ef&_e=O4xm219XSF6a_F4InTFWHFzx_5P35fFdWkgK9I8orX91ZnZDW_7gcc10G10MkZjNsBYCp4fT9LQl0z_4YJTI0ZFbBZVDCcsw9OCPtp0Vz3NpPiD5oO84yjmL5FQT-T3w_58k604xZcFYWtqwULyd_a9ui14uFWWtkbGsPWyD2AuVHnKOV9HrcXJkS9WEtQPFn6ADXoxpyjEnam3gN1xMtEMnN3EQSXy5OWX54px155pQMuTZHR45jKrAjUo-KhHCLkF3lk7lffQa_cZBG3O10o1CLmBk4JWtJlYYN8pPip7glWgYVua16WWysOFkGeBsuVZW1-WOgP16BKeZwHjXD1-qI-y8GnkM-pABS1wyvKyBeEgRE_4hTtu0EmBlmKlqK2Wr6u7M13D_8_NlAoLQYRVKnL4yMDo2OvnmAo3DCBY%3D)
**Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.** I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. [**ENLIST WITH TIM
CONFIRM YOUR SUPPORT TODAY->** ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=de062d2d03634d7c8965896c96b522ef&_e=O4xm219XSF6a_F4InTFWHFzx_5P35fFdWkgK9I8orX91ZnZDW_7gcc10G10MkZjNsBYCp4fT9LQl0z_4YJTI0ZFbBZVDCcsw9OCPtp0Vz3NpPiD5oO84yjmL5FQT-T3w_58k604xZcFYWtqwULyd_a9ui14uFWWtkbGsPWyD2AuVHnKOV9HrcXJkS9WEtQPFn6ADXoxpyjEnam3gN1xMtEMnN3EQSXy5OWX54px155pQMuTZHR45jKrAjUo-KhHCLkF3lk7lffQa_cZBG3O10ulcAkSFNgOREE9CxUE1r_z-RH4emlrNLLnYsW51sNwDo_0kD-xVmdcPJg9jacU4xltqG7bCrcjllkjfM80AhvKeFEnuHzdyK4gQowqTQQLVDXM_MJC782dEC2Bk36yCi-uXnXLxkP1uYfszQ3QuVWE%3D)

clean_body: Please take a moment to read about this exceptional candidate I’m supporting | | Peter, Recently, I received an email from former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy who is running for the U.S. Senate in Montana. It moved me so much that I am forwarding it to you today. Please do me a personal favor and take a few minutes to read it - it’s compelling. Best Regards, Kellyanne Conway \-------------------------------------------- From: Tim Sheehy Date: Thursday, December 7, 2023 at 3:30 PM To: Kellyanne Conway Subject: The day 13 Americans were vaporized in Kabul Kellyanne, As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams. Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, those are the traits that define me. I’m proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead. This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, “I kept thinking to myself, “The adult will come in the room and say, ‘Hey, this is a disaster; we’re going to stop this.’” Every day it got worse. Every day it was a disaster. The adult in the room never materialized. Then, 13 Americans were vaporized at the gate to Kabul’s airport. Billions of dollars in military and human assets were left behind – all so Joe Biden could get a press conference saying that he’d pulled the country out of an “endless war.” I had sat in the homes of the families that we were frantically trying to get out; I had promised them that we weren’t going to leave them behind. So, you can imagine the dishonor that I felt because of the promises we weren’t able to keep to the people who’d sacrificed so much to help us combat evil. If you're thinking this email is on the longer side, you're right. If you're short on time and unable to finish reading to the end right now, ; my opponent and his allies will not make winning this seat easy. It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn’t an easy decision; but the United States needs leaders who understand the sacrifice it’s taken to build our country. When your country calls and needs you, you have to answer. Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield. I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. I’m reaching out to you today because if this campaign to flip Montana’s U.S. Senate seat is going to be successful, Twice in a row, Joe Biden has pulled us out of two wars for political purposes. We fought in Iraq, I was there. We fought in Afghanistan, I was there. And each time, for political purposes, Biden pulled out our forces and damaged our nation’s reputation in the process. And my opponent in the Senate race, Democrat Jon Tester, supported Biden both times. I want to look at my children and tell them, “Yes, you should serve your country, as your mom and dad did. Your parents put on the uniform; you should do the same.” But when we have a president who is willing to pull the plug on a whim for political purposes, it’s hard to tell future generations the sacrifices in service of God and country will be worth it. So, Kellyanne \- that’s what I’m fighting for. I’m fighting to restore faith in our American way of life. I entered the political arena to ensure the sacrifices my friends made weren’t made in vain. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75350686/444405077/-531765509?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjFlYmIzNy0zMDlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ehC-xmMqLnutwq94SDsOXwYwxCgw7cSts24wDwF_9kA=&emci=e61ebb37-309d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=f61ebb37-309d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=10203249) Folks,

This weekend, Pennsylvania Democratic Party leaders gathered to endorse 2024 candidates for statewide office. _**And in the race for Attorney General, Eugene DePasquale is the front runner!**_

In a field of five candidates, Eugene received 52% of votes – making him the clear choice for PA's Attorney General.

The Pennsylvania Democratic Party knows Eugene is the best candidate to win this race and protect Pennsylvanians’ rights. He's the only candidate in this race who has won statewide – _twice_. He has a proven record of taking on tough fights and delivering results – that's why Democrats are uniting around Eugene. They know that when push comes to shove, Eugene is the only candidate in this race who will protect Pennsylvanians and deliver a win against MAGA extremists.

| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8Y2cBrWulJ_TNEhY1kfNiPW4XPsTfat37nIdaNCT4BEUF0xZHwTG34B8M9NV8rutyw4-iQXZ5Y3vqguEeLbcWvl1A2y9gLgW8RIWCISDHvJ_NMQ5CThekztYkd2y15-PyiHv8NG0lSAhMUbuvxu6VV_jLl9bUrpNBAS8AzbxkC_-eGzaVNPnV9UXM4v07sF8cEEGpNNq5fxPRD5BZ-qJ598Bmky9ZdGmI3PtHrNzAD00420hTwi_iR9Y5ntOWNAwWTKCrvmVZgYc5iw-au_tHO5WP3uwwXCHUCsCckPaEn1V7HSGuglfQNZcCt9Hvq3MxaLHMCSPrprbFVTh_RyFjW8/427/Lwx42c34RRGv4Rvj9-anNw/h0/A_fnctBQpX5lB12ep9uOuXqKWj4dMMXOC6YjYaP9R7Q) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZLt3B3YmMzfTeaUv6D3l9TDms7SZmz4-Gf7x7MJr2CtlB7oIM30Is9z804PDyVT7ympg84k0L5-2ad3FiQQfDfRXNdL2C8472UdY0cdlVp1PoTggYEjGfgdRr40mAbNPBG92q8g2N8aMFWU8KXgOPHrNTKOoxkz6O_nBTo8rSzN_HnV-4fq1ZllT1qoGZp5XoDrFZcFGCWYtSgwQ4bM5-KkGpFiRR3xYGDencX0Lg2p4Aal2bDUVfXZw4huPmUMyOKBNhCb6Tku-MC6Ljkh-kJbnATf91LQFPZTDlGWPlNNVkjUxs_4RaVY9aHG_Ahuo1SwrnD1ff8RgGvpXiODs4YD13aet9rMYQKRGMsRy3KVzFLZ0dCzjJoduPXXIAsFHO/427/Lwx42c34RRGv4Rvj9-anNw/h1/C0I0AUY1fgSnt10JnMWwS6j9ljIeLmQUEToMujgL3PI) Peter, **22 years ago, I cast the most difficult vote of my career.**

Following the horrific attacks on Sept. 11, 2001, President George W. Bush asked Congress to vote on a 60-word war resolution that gave him and future presidents nearly unlimited war powers, exactly the opposite of what the Constitution intended. I knew then, even while the grief was still fresh in our hearts, that it was the wrong decision.

So when the Authorization for Use of Military Force of 2001 joint resolution came to a vote, **I was the _only person_ to vote against it.**

[I was seen as a radical. I was slandered as unpatriotic. I even received countless death threats. But I stood my ground. And I voted against the AUMF again in 2002 in Iraq. Now, decades later, the Democratic party applauds my decision — including my current opponent, Adam Schiff, who voted for both wars.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZLt3B3YmMzfTeaUv6D3l9TDms7SZmz4-Gf7x7MJr2CtlB7oIM30Is9z804PDyVT7ympg84k0L5-2ad3FiQQfDfRXNdL2C8472UdY0cdlVp1PoTggYEjGfgdRr40mAbNPBG92q8g2N8aMFWU8KXgOPHqQR3lL7rSN3eHMBqus5c0uIXJv-jzDlwFgP_bisWmaBPgPddPOIYV7qdoPy8sAQEO7O3_pA5oQ6Alf5D9cSVBL_h3FnaU8A1l3EmRinEVxPE0HvgoLDXI_ePv7jvQM0aU6TaR2dyEH1IZNKF8VPZuqnhZhsUk7auByCBEhZp-Ha4kS_VFUIzT-rQvDgeHZPm6qrtDbXjYEBUejyAvfCta5-PRkfxHgiRoiGCCH-TrVI/427/Lwx42c34RRGv4Rvj9-anNw/h2/Tg-zMG63xnqtDQEcCHcKawgu7N0h7tyZm2p8pMCmADM) | | [Contribute](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZLt3B3YmMzfTeaUv6D3l9TDms7SZmz4-Gf7x7MJr2CtlB7oIM30Is9z804PDyVT7ympg84k0L5-2ad3FiQQfDfRXNdL2C8472UdY0cdlVp1PoTggYEjGfgdRr40mAbNPBG92q8g2N8aMFWU8KXgOPHkzis_YKYOIvaVsHrw2HXiUMRpL2prMddDz21BDHey1MmRiVtBembKxnVe3V85TzVpmDg7EJ8n1bN609C7AygOVmIo6tVAjfULYZ8CaQ9XFYJUd19xN9TU1_21PKfs886Dc03uoxhEVc7io0P1cCFA7Qxpl04Rcgb2jOUfMzZFlo9LcpvlTiGM6RLQciggOhf6PP6bd76bycprZgWCBklC_tAKnyP8Ti5btFy40H2b0K/427/Lwx42c34RRGv4Rvj9-anNw/h3/rUiwGMyopX4Lqu8dAHkaPFSkNk9BplhouzMfM9tuIzg)
---
My father, a retired Army lieutenant colonel, was the first person to call me after the vote. He reminded me that we should never send our troops into harm's way without a clear plan, objective and exit strategy. And he was right.
[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZLt3B3YmMzfTeaUv6D3l9TDms7SZmz4-Gf7x7MJr2CtlB7oIM30Is9z804PDyVT7ympg84k0L5-2ad3FiQQfDfRXNdL2C8472UdY0cdlVp1PoTggYEjGfgdRr40mAbNPBG92q8g2N8aMFWU8KXgOPHmQOjwn67fMoJNneEihoZ6QLdEHVqCKKPlGxPTQ66uN-ms-iEx8fdwjFxibN6uEmIKgbebUvmdhih5auwz__l4hIVRTCx9i96qH76zBjcX37VwYttqH6AoLZUHxT5gslwBF5icStvw8cZUoPKOYckFuOY3Zyl135pKeOZvGdFw72pYYRmTQ1FGhVnKCy4QquHTkIFhU1x48-lPyWXN27LYv-NaZjT8eBYtVhtgjDYElA/427/Lwx42c34RRGv4Rvj9-anNw/h4/HOCu0qqjSGuYj2T3gYoor5DytfnRw38SqA_YAPmYDq0)
**Peter, I am the only candidate in this race who voted against giving the president the authority to wage endless war — both in Afghanistan in 2001 and again in 2002 in Iraq.** So when the Senate voted to repeal authorizations for the use of military force against Iraq this spring, it marked a milestone in a mission that I've worked toward throughout my career in Congress.

Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. warned us of three connected evils in the world: Racism, poverty and militarism. I’ve spent my entire life fighting all three. **That's why I'm running to be just the fourth Black woman in history to serve in the Senate — and I hope I have your full support, Peter.**

I have a proven track record of fighting for what I know is right. And if I'm elected to the Senate, you can count on me to continue this fight for the things that matter most.

**So I have to ask:**[Will you chip in $10 or more right now to help me win my primary and build a progressive future for all? Polls have me statistically TIED with my opponents, and I need your help to pull ahead.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZLt3B3YmMzfTeaUv6D3l9TDms7SZmz4-Gf7x7MJr2CtlB7oIM30Is9z804PDyVT7ympg84k0L5-2ad3FiQQfDfRXNdL2C8472UdY0cdlVp1PoTggYEjGfgdRr40mAbNPBG92q8g2N8aMFWU8KXgOPHtsdWyxCTTBtl7etiUh_9XvTg_jHHZNoSSsx5c2ML0x_xMtbKO8zBaKhVJa3YxkQMVqXFIwOoSHzHiDL2EF7Vnwg3w9xJ76LKfupx2sliLDDWtlTOZW1fnGSb17dQEFQp4fuTy0ibtrzJOFgoodEZR7weOXwFuaUhXbeOvn45g1i2YSmv8ja1ceTrwiD2zqiymGQjL1Hqw8lvD0vSFeWWo0kSHtGGgVusnL7I8jdA6w_/427/Lwx42c34RRGv4Rvj9-anNw/h5/G79P_2K_qEOumoTLRdyaOx_EMhV3IEqI1FfWiIF1jcM)
If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Barbara Lee and The Collective PAC.

* * *

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5O3Wwmdygae0W-34efSvb_hfX51xtIkq_nCgr0tl8iRqUTOndcJRC4vm20WcsKLgv3Eh8V7Z63mPOB4NPT_kbXRuxYBiGhj6BoUvPWVuFYXy53VYby-QwZExw_7IcyiXLNLT4YudDU9yxvPBpOYnIeSfG3Oq7_I5OzH_j8bT7s4nTtj5b-FH8kUmm_-v_0H1V4eLdo_IzKrR6o5LmopCFPIH8JpSzo8uceOmDDWSTxfpAQiD2liwtx9YohKi9oy6rHhaUxJTenyvbISc6tLe1jIMjAg7WBQfFE-64uME-3h9bK34YuFXKSHVBp2G4Z3ogeo5rJi8ABk5ToYaYZqxdZHJOS4rYCtDnDCK0wJSXonCGr40-BAkEay5osRnqVZw/427/Lwx42c34RRGv4Rvj9-anNw/h12/25WDMW_tofWVBxq5jPO-ZR6uO309Cnqj7vw8diuuoMc) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, 22 years ago, I cast the most difficult vote of my career. Following the horrific attacks on Sept. 11, 2001, President George W. Bush asked Congress to vote on a 60-word war resolution that gave him and future presidents nearly unlimited war powers, exactly the opposite of what the Constitution intended. I knew then, even while the grief was still fresh in our hearts, that it was the wrong decision. So when the Authorization for Use of Military Force of 2001 joint resolution came to a vote, I was the only person to vote against it. | | My father, a retired Army lieutenant colonel, was the first person to call me after the vote. He reminded me that we should never send our troops into harm's way without a clear plan, objective and exit strategy. And he was right. Peter, I am the only candidate in this race who voted against giving the president the authority to wage endless war — both in Afghanistan in 2001 and again in 2002 in Iraq. So when the Senate voted to repeal authorizations for the use of military force against Iraq this spring, it marked a milestone in a mission that I've worked toward throughout my career in Congress. Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. warned us of three connected evils in the world: Racism, poverty and militarism. I’ve spent my entire life fighting all three. That's why I'm running to be just the fourth Black woman in history to serve in the Senate — and I hope I have your full support, Peter. I have a proven track record of fighting for what I know is right. And if I'm elected to the Senate, you can count on me to continue this fight for the things that matter most. So I have to ask: If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Barbara Lee and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thank you for being a part of my historic movement for change. — Barbara Lee The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from The Collective PAC, please .

Friend,
When even the _New York Times_ is skeptical of a Democrat judge, you can be absolutely certain it’s a full blown witch hunt:
**“Unconventional Trial Judge Could Remove Trump From His NY Empire”** _“Engoron ruled before the trial began..._ _...Engoron might have already erred when he issued that initial punishment of Trump”_
One biased and vengeful judge – _WITHOUT A JURY _– could potentially invoke the “corporate death penalty” upon me and my family.
But I want to make one point crystal clear: I am not asking for sympathy or pity.
I am writing this solely to show you how dangerous of a place our country is in right now.
Our nation is teetering on the brink of tyranny, where you are presumed guilty and forced to prove your innocence before left-wing prosecutors, judges, and bureaucrats drunk with power.
But I promise you this: when I return to the White House, their reign will be over and America will be a FREE nation once again.
_Times are tough in Crooked Joe’s America. So if you are doing poorly right now, please don’t even think twice about donating. Take care of yourself, and as soon as I’m back in the White House, I will take care of our great nation once again._
[**Please make a contribution to peacefully DEFEND our movement from the never-ending witch hunts – and _together_ , we will WIN BACK the White House and SAVE AMERICA.**](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX-NuYHMDLbhwGG3Vi5I1fbU9hQ5tkkGYYPALN38-ooo2ev3nkbv05gwj9R_tUy9M4AbuZUBMHxjAF31_uen7H53Ov_YO8i1FNV-pPCDAaSv2X9Xn1cKHwyNB1U6cy3YGqzNfFsqDrWQWFbZrRWgKl5jfQFeC3vxxoraKYW9by5cGZlRCxywhFIBYo1Q8MqibBBKwxvRY8MqvlMs3BTN6Ia0bGEu7BSysb2lNK-PSScGp9XbbfHFTnHx7mgczHz63AS_kDX5MFFMeb9FtxhaKV5zO4VAKXnP4BTt2CjZlz2UFyVqYbxgeNpSOAfvaAsM9dNXHnCdtsV6htrS2TyZNWE2dI0M9cvplUwx-ZgY6pLLBhnIcxzJMdRV8wn3f_fh18cDPl6Cejb3ru_ehr_Z0rp5p3GkVSpW8esx4ZD7HwAA__-LOIzp)

We might as well be living in Maoist China or Stalinist Russia, for that matter! And under Crooked Joe’s regime, that’s exactly what we’ve got. A sitting president and ruling party who have weaponized our justice system to try and destroy their leading opponent and the ONE and ONLY MAN who can defeat them in 2024. But, as I’ve said time and again, they can attack me all they want, strip me of my constitutional rights, threaten me with life in prison, force me to take a mugshot, and seek the “corporate death penalty” against me and my family, but there’s ONE THING they will NEVER get away with... ...Robbing YOU of your country! Because _WE will NEVER,EVER SURRENDER to their tyranny! With YOU at my side, we will counter their lies, attacks, and vicious witch hunts at every turn. We will prevail just as we always have. And come November 5, 2024, we will receive the ultimate vindication – and the ultimate prize: an America made GREAT AGAIN! If you’re struggling right now due to the crooks, thugs, and fools currently running our country, then please don’t donate at this time. I only wanted to update you on this grave injustice of a “trial.” Thank you, | Donald J. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Tammy told me I should reach out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Will you pitch in a few bucks to Tammy Baldwin’s reelection campaign today?
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1721%2E35263%2EZVCtYH)
Hey Peter, Arizona Senator Mark Kelly here. I’m reaching out today on behalf of my good friend and colleague Tammy Baldwin, who needs our support as she heads into her most competitive and expensive reelection battle yet. In just a moment, I’ll explain a little more about the importance of Tammy’s race. But first, will you consider **[making a donation to help reelect Tammy and defend our Senate majority?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-dec23.PriOoE&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231217_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1721%2E35263%2EZVCtYH)** Wisconsinites deserve a leader who never backs down in fighting for what’s right and I’ve seen that leadership time and again from Tammy. I even joined her in Wisconsin this summer where I got to see her leadership in action on the campaign trail — _and try one of Wisconsin’s famous cream puffs at the state fair!_ [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-dec23.PriOoE&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231217_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1721%2E35263%2EZVCtYH) The GOP is determined to unseat Tammy Baldwin, actively recruiting two megamillionaires to run against her. And the stakes of her race are _even higher_ now that our colleague, West Virginia Senator Joe Manchin, announced he won’t be seeking re-election — freeing up millions of dollars that Republican groups can now spend on defeating Tammy. I’m no stranger to a tough battle myself, Peter. Last year, the GOP gave it their all to try to unseat me. My far-right opponent had the full backing of Mitch McConnell and National Republicans, who were determined to flip Arizona red and take the Senate. But it was grassroots supporters, including members of this very team, who helped to defend my seat and our Democratic majority. Now, we must come together to do the same for Tammy Baldwin. **That’s where you come in:** **[Will you pitch in a few bucks to Tammy Baldwin’s reelection campaign today? 100% of your contribution will go toward keeping Wisconsin blue and defending our Senate majority.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-dec23.PriOoE&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231217_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=1721%2E35263%2EZVCtYH)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-dec23.4hRD_b&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231217_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=1721%2E35263%2EZVCtYH)

name: Kirsten Gillibrand (personal)
subject: Friend, you've always had my back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
I want to personally thank you
| | |
---
Friend, I want to personally thank you for always standing with me as we take on the toughest fights in Washington.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75351345/444406734/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4659-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmM2ZjE2MS0zNjlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cEuiNDyRqCdE8R81mz9Ix0y94PBbz8Z8xNCqvYudO1c=)
Thank you for having my back when we fought for **health care coverage for 9/11 first responders** and **expanded benefits for veterans** exposed to toxic burn pits. We must ensure that our heroes get the care that they need.
Thank you for supporting my hard-won legislation that **empowers survivors of sexual assault** in the military to seek justice. Together, we took on the Pentagon to win reforms that will create a fairer system for service members.
Thank you for never giving up the fight to **make gun trafficking a federal crime.** After 13 years of advocacy, late nights and whipping votes, my legislation was finally passed in last year's Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. Already, we're stopping the flow of illegal guns into New York.
Thank you for your continued commitment to family rights and gender equity. With your support, I have spent the last decade fighting for **national paid family leave** for all workers. And now, I'm proud to lead the charge to add the **Equal Rights Amendment** to our Constitution — which would finally give us the legal basis to restore reproductive rights across the country.
**My record is about winning real results for the families I swore to serve — not for corporations or megadonors. And none of that would be possible without your continued, tireless support.**
But here's the bad news: Republicans are emboldened after their historic victories in New York last year. **Now, they're laying the groundwork for an even bigger red wave in 2024 — and they're directly targeting my seat.** I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs, so I'm relying on grassroots donors like you to compete with their right-wing megadonors.
**[_Please, friend, you've stood by me so many times before, and I'm counting on you to have my back again. Will you chip in before midnight tonight to join me in this fight for progress and defend our Senate majority? Your support would mean so much to me._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75351346/444406735/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4659-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmM2ZjE2MS0zNjlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cEuiNDyRqCdE8R81mz9Ix0y94PBbz8Z8xNCqvYudO1c=)**

clean_body: I want to personally thank you | | | Friend, I want to personally thank you for always standing with me as we take on the toughest fights in Washington. = Thank you for having my back when we fought for health care coverage for 9/11 first responders and expanded benefits for veterans exposed to toxic burn pits. We must ensure that our heroes get the care that they need. Thank you for supporting my hard-won legislation that empowers survivors of sexual assault in the military to seek justice. Together, we took on the Pentagon to win reforms that will create a fairer system for service members. Thank you for never giving up the fight to make gun trafficking a federal crime. After 13 years of advocacy, late nights and whipping votes, my legislation was finally passed in last year's Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. Already, we're stopping the flow of illegal guns into New York. Thank you for your continued commitment to family rights and gender equity. With your support, I have spent the last decade fighting for national paid family leave for all workers. And now, I'm proud to lead the charge to add the Equal Rights Amendment to our Constitution — which would finally give us the legal basis to restore reproductive rights across the country. My record is about winning real results for the families I swore to serve — not for corporations or megadonors. And none of that would be possible without your continued, tireless support. But here's the bad news: Republicans are emboldened after their historic victories in New York last year. Now, they're laying the groundwork for an even bigger red wave in 2024 — and they're directly targeting my seat. Hello,
Before the 2022 election, Washington didn’t give my husband Adam a chance against Lauren Boebert.
But Adam drove over 24,000 miles, meeting thousands of voters across Colorado’s 3rd congressional district – often with our son, Felix.
**Ultimately, though, we lacked the resources and lost to Lauren Boebert in a recount by _just 546 votes_.** It was the closest congressional race in the _entire_ country.

But Adam drove over 24,000 miles, meeting thousands of voters across Colorado’s 3rd congressional district – often with our son, Felix. Ultimately, though, we lacked the resources and lost to Lauren Boebert in a recount by just 546 votes. It was the closest congressional race in the entire country. We need to raise another $45,000 for Adam’s campaign before his next fundraising deadline to ensure that, this time, we do have the resources to take on Boebert and win – but right now we're still $19,312 short, and we need your help: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Marjorie Taylor Greene... Matt Gaetz... Jim Jordan... Lauren Boebert... Lauren Boebert is the only one of the crazies in Congress that can actually be defeated. = Adam was so close in 2022. He’ll defeat her in 2024. But we’re counting on your help now. = Your support and encouragement mean the world to Adam and our whole family. Thank you again for continuing this journey with us, Katy ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

subject: Biden’s Report Card

body:
| We’d like to hear your perspective on President Biden’s performance so far.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4729%2E5257348%2E_v511m)
Derek —
As we approach the 2024 election year, it’s important to reflect on President Joe Biden’s time in office and the impact of his leadership.
That’s why we’d like to hear your perspective on his performance so far.
[**On a scale from A to F, how would you grade President Biden’s leadership?**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202312-biden-report-card.zputO-&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20231217_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4729%2E5257348%2E_v511m)
[A - EXCEPTIONAL](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202312-biden-report-card.zputO-&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20231217_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4729%2E5257348%2E_v511m)
---
[B - GOOD](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202312-biden-report-card.zputO-&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20231217_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=4729%2E5257348%2E_v511m)
---
[C - AVERAGE](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202312-biden-report-card.zputO-&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20231217_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=4729%2E5257348%2E_v511m)
---
[D - BELOW AVERAGE](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202312-biden-report-card.zputO-&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20231217_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=8&akid=4729%2E5257348%2E_v511m)
---
[F - FAIL](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202312-biden-report-card.zputO-&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20231217_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=9&akid=4729%2E5257348%2E_v511m)
---
Here are some key accomplishments during President Biden’s time in office:
1. The largest clean energy investment in history with the _Inflation Reduction Act_.
2. Historically expanded healthcare services for veterans through the _PACT Act_ , demonstrating support for and utmost appreciation for our nation’s heroes.
3. Rebuilding our nation’s infrastructure with the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ to replace lead pipes, provide clean water, deliver cheaper and cleaner energy to households and businesses, and create good-paying jobs.
4. Signing the first federal gun safety legislation into law in three decades with the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_.
5. Doubled the child tax credit and lifted 40 percent of the kids in America, out of poverty.

Adam is running for the U.S. Senate to protect our democracy, save our planet, and make the economy work for everyone, in California and across the country — and we’re going to need President Biden in the Oval Office to get the job done.
Thanks for your input!
– Schiff HQ
